works.title: A long-lived impact-generated hydrothermal system at the Chicxulub impact structure
works.abstract: Abstract Hydrothermal systems likely played an essential role in the origin of life, both on Earth and potentially on other planets. They form anywhere that heat and aqueous fluids interact, including within cooling hypervelocity impact craters. Longer periods of hydrothermal activity will generate extended windows of opportunity for prebiotic chemical reactions to occur, life to develop, and micro-organisms to thrive and propagate beyond their point of origin. Here, we present radioisotopic age constraints and numerical simulations for the duration of post-impact hydrothermal activity in and around the peak ring of the ~200 km diameter 66 Ma Chicxulub impact structure. We find that hydrothermal activity persisted for at least 8 million years (Myr), which is approximately four times longer than previously estimated by numerical simulations, palaeomagnetic records, and petrographic interpretations at Chicxulub, making it the longest-lived impact generated hydrothermal system documented on Earth.
works.label: flagship

summary_bullets.research_question: 希克苏鲁伯撞击坑后热液活动究竟持续了多长时间？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合放射性同位素年龄测定与数值模拟进行分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 热液活动持续至少800万年，是先前估计的四倍，属已知最长撞击生热液系统。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用同位素直接证明撞击热液系统可延续近千万年，远超模拟预测。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地球与地外生命起源的化学窗口提供关键时间尺度约束。

works.title: Antarctic extension revealed
works.abstract: The tectonic setting of the continent hidden beneath the East Antarctic Ice Sheet remains unclear. Sub-glacial topography combined with geophysical data suggest the existence of a fan-shaped extensional basin with implications for wider Antarctic geology and the overlying ice sheet.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 南极延伸构造的揭示

summary_bullets.research_question: 南极东部冰盖下隐藏的大陆构造背景是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用冰下地形与地球物理数据联合分析揭示深部构造。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现一个扇形伸展盆地，影响南极地质与上覆冰盖。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示该区域扇形伸展构造及其对冰盖的影响。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解南极地质演化与冰盖稳定性提供关键构造约束。

works.title:
An aquaglyceroporin governs cellular water and CO
                    <sub>2</sub>
                    conductance relevant for vesicular mineral formation in a marine calcifier
works.abstract: Many marine organisms generate biominerals by endocytotic uptake of seawater which is modified within calcifying cells to produce an amorphous mineral precursor required to form the mineralized shell or skeleton. In this process, water must be removed from the endocytotic vesicles and the cell to promote concentration of calcification substrates and production of a water-free mineral. Here, we demonstrate that in the sea urchin larva, an aquaglyceroporin (spAQP9) is involved in the cellular calcification process. spAQP9 is found exclusively in the calcifying primary mesenchyme cells (PMCs), and spAQP9 expression is increased during mineralization underlining its role in skeleton formation. Heterologous expression of sp AQP9 in Xenopus laevis oocytes demonstrated that this channel conducts water and carbon dioxide. The water conductance by spAQP9 is sensitive to phloretin with an IC 50 of ∼38 µM and treatment of larvae with phloretin or knock-down of spAQP9 impaired skeleton formation. Immunohistological analyses revealed localization of spAQP9 in vesicles with different subcellular distribution depending on the calcification activity of PMCs. Finally, we developed an in vivo assay to measure cellular and vesicular water permeability in PMCs and found a significant water permeability of the plasma membrane and membranes of calcium-rich vesicles. The results of this work highlight the importance of water transport mechanisms in the mineralization process. Here, aquaporins like spAQP9 represent key players that serve a dual function as a water and CO 2 conductance pathway and thereby can support ion concentration and carbon transport, two processes that are of fundamental importance to promote intracellular mineral precursor formation.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 水甘油通道蛋白调控与海洋钙化生物囊泡矿物形成相关的细胞水分与CO₂传导

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨水通道蛋白如何调控海水钙化生物囊泡内水与CO₂运输以促进矿物前体形成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用海胆幼虫、爪蟾卵母细胞异源表达、免疫组化、体内水通透性测定及基因敲降技术。
summary_bullets.key_findings: spAQP9是一种可同时传导水和CO₂的甘油水通道蛋白，定位于钙化囊泡并影响骨骼形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在活体钙化细胞中揭示水通道蛋白的双重传导功能及其在囊泡矿物形成中的关键作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 表明水与CO₂协同运输是生物矿化的核心环节，为理解海洋钙化机制提供新靶点。

works.title: Geoparks and the future of geoscience outreach
works.abstract: In a century marked by accelerating environmental change, UNESCO Global Geoparks offer a practical model for bringing Earth sciences back into public life.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 地质公园与地球科学公众推广的未来

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何使地球科学重新融入公众生活以应对加速的环境变化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 以联合国教科文组织世界地质公园为实践模型进行分析和论证。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地质公园提供了将地球科学知识与公众联系起来的有效实用模式。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出地质公园作为地球科学公众外联的未来核心载体。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地球科学传播、地质公园管理和环境教育研究者提供实践导向的框架。

works.title: West Antarctic Ice Sheet advance since the early Pliocene
works.abstract: Abstract Current understanding of past ice dynamics in the Amundsen Sea—the most vulnerable part of the West Antarctic ice sheet (WAIS)—remains incomplete, hampering future predictions. Here, sediments from International Ocean Discovery Program Site U1532 on the continental rise reveal that ice-sheet dynamics strongly influenced detrital magnetic minerals supply. Minimal magnetite concentration during ~4.1-3.8 Ma reflects the smallest WAIS extent in the Amundsen Sea sector since ~4.33 Ma. Since ~4.1 Ma, WAIS expansion was closely linked to long-term global cooling. After ~3.2 Ma, elevated fine-grained magnetite indicates a sustained increase in sediment contribution from the Thwaites Glacier catchment. The abrupt ice-sheet expansion at ~3.2 Ma may reflect the crossing of a climatic threshold that triggered qualitative transformations in ice-sheet development. Cessation of major WAIS growth after ~0.9 Ma aligns with stabilized long-term CO 2 levels and ocean temperatures. Collectively, these results underscore the high sensitivity of the Amundsen Sea sector to global climate forcing.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 西南极冰盖自早上新世以来的推进

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究上新世早期以来阿蒙森海区西南极冰盖的动态演变及其对全球气候强迫的响应。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用IODP U1532站位沉积物，分析碎屑磁性矿物的供应变化反演冰盖历史。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 约3.2 Ma冰盖急剧扩张标志气候阈值跨越，0.9 Ma后生长停滞与CO₂和海洋温度稳定同步。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过磁性矿物浓度揭示阿蒙森海区冰盖最小范围及阶段性扩张与气候阈值的联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示西南极冰盖对全球气候的高敏感性，为预测未来冰盖消融和气候响应提供依据。

works.title: Ages and geochemistry of Cretaceous igneous rocks record the transition from compression to extension in Fujian Province, South China
works.abstract: Late Mesozoic magmatism in South China provides critical insights into East Asia continental margin evolution. Cretaceous magmatic rocks in coastal Fujian Province, South China, record the coupled magmatic-tectonic evolution of this area, yet key questions remain regarding magma source transformation, timing of the compressional-extensional transition, and its driving mechanisms. This study focused on Cretaceous magmatic rocks in eastern Fujian, South China, employing zircon U-Pb dating, zircon Hf isotope analyses, and whole-rock analyses. These samples are categorized as undifferentiated I-type granites, highly differentiated I-type granites, and A-type granites. The I-type granites were derived from ancient crustal melting with crust-mantle interaction, while the A-type granites were generated by high-temperature and anhydrous remelting of enriched crustal components, with plagioclase fractionation in an extensional environment. In combination with available geochemical data in this area, magma sources shifted from 130 Ma to 80 Ma due to changing crustal contributions and enhanced fractional crystallization accompanied by melt extraction from the magma chamber. The following dynamic model is proposed: During 130−110 Ma, Paleo-Pacific plate subduction caused compression and thickened the crust, generating I-type granites via crust-mantle hybridization and crystallization differentiation. From 110 Ma to 100 Ma, slab rollback increased the subduction angle, triggering asthenospheric upwelling and lithospheric delamination, shifting stress from compression to extension. Lithospheric thinning dominated the 100−80 Ma interval, during which extensional tectonics facilitated the formation of A-type granites.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 白垩纪火成岩的年代学与地球化学记录了华南福建省由挤压向伸展的转变

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨福建白垩纪岩浆岩的岩浆源区转变、挤压-伸展转换时限及驱动机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石U-Pb定年、锆石Hf同位素和全岩地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 130–110 Ma为挤压背景的I型花岗岩，110–100 Ma应力转换，100–80 Ma伸展A型花岗岩形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示古太平洋板块后撤导致从挤压到伸展的岩浆-构造耦合演化动态模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为华南大陆边缘演化及板块俯冲-后撤过程的岩浆响应提供关键约束。

works.title: Independent evolution of Gondwana terranes along its northern margin during early Tethyan initiation
works.abstract: The late Ediacaran−early Paleozoic (580−420 Ma) represents a critical interval marked by the final Gondwana assembly and initiation of the Tethyan realm. The Lhasa terrane (southwestern China) is commonly regarded as part of the Indo-Australian margin tectonic system, yet its paleogeographic affinity and tectono-magmatic evolution remain debated. Here we present a systematic comparison of geological records from the Lhasa terrane with those from the South Qiangtang, Himalaya, and Sibumasu terranes as well as the Iran-Anatolia region. Our results reveal significant differences in tectono-magmatic evolution among terranes along the northern margin of Gondwana. The Lhasa terrane records a prolonged subduction-related history from 580 to 480 Ma, comparable to that of the Iran-Anatolia region, including low-angle subduction at 570−525 Ma, slab rollback at 525−510 Ma, and terrane accretion accompanied by slab break-off at 510−480 Ma. In contrast, terranes along the Indo-Australian margin record a coherent two-stage evolution, with 550−520 Ma ocean-island basalt−like magmatism related to the postcollisional extension stage of the Kuunga-Pinjarra orogen, followed by 500−420 Ma arc-backarc magmatism linked to Proto-Tethyan subduction. These contrasts demonstrate that the Lhasa terrane was not part of the Indo-Australian margin but evolved independently along the African margin of Gondwana, an interpretation further supported by metamorphic and detrital-zircon evidence. Our results refine the geodynamic framework of early Tethyan evolution, provide new constraints on the paleogeographic reconstruction of East Asian blocks, and offer insight into the spatial heterogeneity of Phanerozoic tin mineralization.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 特提斯早期启动期间冈瓦纳北缘地体的独立演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 拉萨地体在冈瓦纳北缘的古地理位置和构造-岩浆演化是否与印度-澳大利亚边缘地体一致？
summary_bullets.methodology: 系统对比拉萨地体与南羌塘、喜马拉雅、Sibumasu及伊朗-安纳托利亚地区的构造-岩浆记录和碎屑锆石证据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 拉萨地体580–480 Ma经历与伊朗-安纳托利亚类似的俯冲演化，明显不同于印度-澳大利亚边缘的两阶段演化，表明其位于非洲边缘。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过多区块系统对比，论证拉萨地体并非印度-澳大利亚边缘的一部分，而是冈瓦纳非洲边缘独立演化的地体。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为早特提斯地球动力学和东亚块体古地理重建提供关键约束，并启示显生宙锡成矿的空间差异性。

works.title: Magnetotelluric evidence for long-lived melt layer beneath oceanic lithosphere
works.abstract: Partial melt at the oceanic lithosphere-asthenosphere boundary is critical for plate motion, yet its origin remains debated. Here we image the electrical resistivity structure across the extinct spreading ridge of the South China Sea within 15–19 million years old oceanic crust using seafloor magnetotelluric data. Our results reveal a relatively low-resistivity layer at depths of 50–80 km beneath 17–19 million years old crust on both flanks of the extinct ridge axis, indicating the presence of 0.1%–1.3% partial melts. The top of this low-resistivity layer is consistent with the depth of calculated 1300 °C isotherm and indepedent observation of seismic shear wave velocity anomaly. The low-resistivity is discontinuous and weak directly beneath the ridge axis, suggesting a ~ 60 km-wide melt-depleted zone. We infer that beneath active ridges, two melt zones coexist: a shallower, focused triangular zone, overlying a deeper, diffuse layer of low-degree melts. Following ridge cessation, melt extraction beneath the axis leaves a heterogeneous, thinner layer that persists over geological timescales. The mechanical stability of this layer suggests that ridge-generated melts may be a widespread and enduring feature, and may account for the partial melts frequently observed at the oceanic lithosphere-asthenosphere boundary. “A laterally extensive partial melt layer at the oceanic lithosphere-asthenosphere boundary can persist for millions of years after ridge cessation, according to marine magnetotelluric observations from an extinct spreading ridge in the South China Sea.”
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 海洋岩石圈之下长寿命熔融层的大地电磁证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨大洋岩石圈-软流圈边界部分熔融层的成因及其在洋脊停止扩张后能否长期存在。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用南海已停止扩张洋脊的海底大地电磁测深数据反演电阻率结构。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现50–80公里深处存在含0.1%–1.3%熔体的低阻层，但在洋脊轴下熔体亏损并变薄。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用电磁成像证实洋脊产生的熔融层可在停止扩张后持续数百万至千万年。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球海洋岩石圈-软流圈边界广泛观测到的低速与高导异常成因提供新解释机制。

works.title: Continental weathering as a driver of the Ediacaran Shuram Excursion
works.abstract: Abstract The Ediacaran Shuram Excursion recorded globally in shallow marine carbonates represents a pivotal carbon cycle perturbation coinciding with key tectonic and evolutionary events. While its driving mechanism(s) are debated, our integrated study supports that a marked increase in congruent continental weathering associated with widespread mountain building and high p CO 2 was responsible for this biogeochemical event. Here, we utilize lithium isotope data from two disparately-located carbonate sections in Siberia and South China to assess the intensity and nature of the global continental weathering flux during the Shuram Excursion. Our results indicate nearly crustal δ 7 Li values in Shuram carbonates (~3–5‰), in stark contrast to modern marine carbonate δ 7 Li values (>20‰). This observation suggests that the Shuram Excursion was characterized by intense congruent continental weathering that delivered river water to the global ocean with extremely low δ 7 Li composition, as well as muted fractionation of lithium isotopes associated with marine clay formation. Enhanced congruent continental weathering would have increased the fluxes of nutrients, dissolved ions, and oxidants to the oceans, facilitating primary productivity, potential oceanic oxygenation, and an increase in the oceanic carbonate saturation state that promoted the rapid deposition of carbonates, and possibly set the stage for carbonate biomineralization by metazoans.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 大陆风化作为埃迪卡拉纪舒拉姆漂移的驱动因素

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨埃迪卡拉纪舒拉姆碳同位素负漂事件的驱动机制，是否与大陆风化作用增强有关。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用西伯利亚和华南两处碳酸盐岩剖面的锂同位素数据评估全球大陆风化通量变化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 舒拉姆碳酸盐岩δ⁷Li值接近地壳水平(~3–5‰)，指示当时发生强烈的一致风化作用。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用锂同位素直接证明一致大陆风化增强是舒拉姆事件的关键驱动力。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解重大碳循环扰动、海洋氧化和早期动物矿化演化提供新的平衡机制证据。

works.title: Convergent mantle flow and plate kinematics contribute to South China Sea rifting
works.abstract: Continental rifting in marginal seas remains debated, particularly regarding the role of mantle dynamics in lithospheric extension. The South China Sea, the largest marginal sea in the western Pacific, provides a well-constrained case for exploring this issue. Seismic observations reveal a major transition from early Paleogene distributed extension to late Paleogene hyper-extension along its northern margin, with systematic westward rift propagation. Numerical mantle flow models predict upper-mantle flows beneath Southeast Asia, comprising southwestward Pacific flow in the east and converging Pacific and Tethyan/Eurasian flows in the west, which are dynamically consistent with the westward migration of rifting. Subduction of the fossil Wharton Ridge to the southwest may have enhanced mantle-pressure gradients and influenced the transition from distributed extension to hyper-extension. Here, we show that mantle flow, together with plate kinematics, contributes to the regional stress framework of rifting, helping to explain the spatiotemporal organization of extension in marginal sea systems. This study reveals how deep mantle flow and plate motions combine to shape regional stress, offering an explanation for the timing and pattern of rifting along the South China Sea margin.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 汇聚地幔流与板块运动学共同促成南海裂谷

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨南海大陆裂谷过程中地幔动力学如何影响岩石圈伸展的时空演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合地震观测分析与数值地幔流动模型进行综合研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地幔流汇聚与板块运动共同导致裂谷向西迁移及伸展模式转变。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示地幔流动与板块运动协同塑造边缘海裂谷的应力框架与时空组织。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解边缘海裂谷的深部地幔-板块相互作用机制提供新解释，具有重要参考价值。

works.title: Upper crustal velocity imaging and deep structural mechanisms of the Tethyan Himalayan gneiss domes
works.abstract: The Tethyan Himalayan tectonic belt, which is located at the forefront of the Indo-Eurasian continental collision, has various extensional detachment structures, including gneiss domes, the South Tibetan detachment system (STDS), and north-south−trending rifts (NSTRs). Gneiss domes are tectonic features of the Tethyan Himalayan belt. Previous studies have revealed significant differences in the formation mechanisms and mineral enrichment patterns of North Himalayan gneiss domes, suggesting that their formation was affected by multiple tectonic processes, such as magmatic activity and extensional detachment. However, the mechanisms responsible for these differences and the relationship between shallow and deep structures remain poorly understood. In this study, we used short-period seismic array data from the eastern and western segments of the Tethyan Himalayan belt for analysis. We applied ambient noise tomography and incorporated constraints from deep seismic reflection data to conduct upper crustal imaging of the gneiss domes across the eastern and western regions. Our findings indicate the following: (1) distinct seismic velocity patterns reveal low-velocity channels beneath the Cuonadong (CND) and Malashan (MLS) domes, contrasting with the high-velocity anomalies under the Yalaxiangbo (YLXB) dome, suggesting fundamental differences in their formation mechanisms; (2) the NSTRs and STDS both contributed to dome formation, but the former had a greater effect on the CND and MLS domes, whereas the latter played a dominant role in the evolution of the YLXB dome; and (3) the formation of these domes was followed by magmatic differentiation and crystallization, which concurrently controlled rare metal mineralization. Spatial imaging of the deep structures of leucogranites provides critical insights into how the unique upper crustal architecture of different domes influences rare metal enrichment patterns.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 特提斯喜马拉雅片麻岩穹窿的上地壳速度成像与深部构造机制

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示特提斯喜马拉雅片麻岩穹窿形成机制差异及其浅深构造关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用短周期地震台阵数据，采用背景噪声层析成像结合深反射地震约束进行上地壳成像。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 穹窿下方速度结构差异显著，错那洞和马拉山下方存在低速通道，雅拉香波下方显示高速异常，揭示形成机制不同。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过浅深结构联合成像揭示不同穹窿形成主控因素差异及控矿深部机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解碰撞前缘伸展构造与稀有金属成矿的深部动力学关联提供关键地震学证据。

works.title: Ti-poor high-Al and high-Cr podiform chromitites in the Ngape ophiolite, myanmar: constraints from mineral chemistry and Re-Os isotopes
works.abstract: The Ngape ophiolite in western Myanmar preserves critical records of Neo-Tethyan Ocean tectonic evolution. Here, we present the integrated mineral chemistry, whole-rock platinum group element (PGE), and Re-Os isotopic study of podiform chromitites from this ophiolite to constrain their petrogenesis and tectonic setting. The chromitites are classified into high-Al (Cr# = 56.06–60.06) and high-Cr (Cr# = 63.01–72.63) types. Both types are notably poor in TiO2 (<0.29 wt%). Calculated parental melts indicate that the high-Al chromitites crystallized from the tholeiitic melts, whereas the high-Cr chromitites originated from boninitic melts. The chromitites exhibit enrichment of IPGE (Os, Ir, Ru) over PPGE (Pt, Pd, Rh), and possess unradiogenic, homogeneous 187Os/188Os ratios (0.12638–0.12863; average 0.12695). These PGE and Os isotopic signatures point to a depleted mantle source. Trace elements (e.g., V, Sc, Ga) further reveal that the high-Cr chromitites formed under higher oxygen fugacity and from a more depleted source than the high-Al variety. The coexistence of these Ti-poor chromitites records a progressive magmatic evolution within a forearc mantle wedge, transitioning from nascent subduction initiation (high-Al type) to a geochemically mature stage of the subduction initiation sequence (high-Cr type). This study provides the comprehensive Re-Os isotopic dataset for Myanmar ophiolites and documents a complete, in-situ magmatic progression during forearc evolution in the Neo-Tethyan realm.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 缅甸纳佩蛇绿岩中贫钛高铝和高铬豆荚状铬铁矿：矿物化学和Re-Os同位素的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 缅甸Ngape蛇绿岩中贫钛高铝与高铬豆荚状铬铁矿的成因及构造背景是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用矿物化学、全岩铂族元素及Re-Os同位素分析两类型铬铁矿。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高铝型源自拉斑玄武熔体，高铬型源自玻安质熔体，两者均源自亏损地幔，高铬型形成于更高氧逸度和更亏损源区。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提供缅甸蛇绿岩首个系统Re-Os同位素数据，并揭示弧前演化从初始俯冲到成熟阶段的完整岩浆序列。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲起始过程、弧前地幔演化及铬铁矿成矿机制提供了关键实证和判别标志。

works.title: Along‐Strike Seismic Structure of the Andreanof Aleutian Arc Segment and Implications for the Formation of Continental Crust
works.abstract: Abstract Crust formed in volcanic arcs is accreted to continents over geologic time, serving as the source material for new continental crust in Earth's present and recent past. Geochemically, arcs are found to be significantly more mafic than bulk continental crust. Reconciling this compositional difference either requires that arc crust evolves to match the composition of continents, or suggests that the processes forming arcs in the present differ from those of the geologic past. We present a new along‐strike seismic model of an intact segment of the Aleutian Arc, and use thermodynamic models to show that its overall composition is mafic compared to the composition of bulk continental crust. Punctuated low velocity anomalies imaged in the lower crust beneath Atka and Tanaga are interpreted as more felsic and hotter than surrounding material, suggesting that volcanic centers within the segment are evolving at different rates.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
works.label: consider

summary_bullets.research_question: 火山弧地壳整体偏基性，如何与大陆地壳组成协调？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用沿走向地震成像与热力学模型分析阿留申弧段波速结构
summary_bullets.key_findings: 该弧段地壳整体为基性，下地壳低速异常指示部分火山中心在加速演化
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次沿走向揭示完整弧段地壳结构不均一性及其对成分演化的约束
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解弧地壳向大陆地壳转化的时空差异性提供了关键地球物理证据

works.title: Proposed identification criteria of the Martian lower crust and mantle excavated by the Isidis impact
works.abstract: Isidis Planitia is a > 1500 km diameter Martian impact basin1–4. The impact excavated material and deposited it in the northeast Syrtis region on which the 49-km diameter Jezero crater subsequently formed. The NASA Mars 2020 rover Perseverance is currently near Jezero crater5 collecting samples for eventual return to Earth. Here, we simulate the Isidis impact using the shock physics hydrocode impact-Simplified Arbitrary Lagrangian Eulerian (iSALE) both in two dimensional (2D) and three dimensional (3D) to determine the provenance and shock state of ejecta in this region. We find that the Isidis-forming impact can excavate the Martian upper mantle and deposit it near Jezero. Additionally, the excavated material shocked to 45–60 GPa is predominately sourced from the mantle, which may enable the Perseverance rover to distinguish it from other excavated deposits. Utilizing these hydrocode results, we describe a strategy for a possible future traverse to optimize identification of ejected mantle. Numerical impact modelling suggests that the Isidis impact on Mars likely exposed lower crust and upper mantle rocks and provides criteria for how the Perseverance rover can distinguish them.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 伊西迪斯撞击挖掘出的火星下地壳和地幔的鉴定标准提议

summary_bullets.research_question: 伊西迪斯撞击盆地挖掘出的火星下地壳和地幔物质如何识别，能为杰泽罗陨石坑提供什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 使用iSALE冲击物理流体代码进行二维和三维数值模拟，追踪溅射物来源与冲击状态。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 伊西迪斯撞击可挖掘上地幔并沉积于杰泽罗附近，45–60 GPa冲击物质主要来自地幔。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次耦合二维与三维冲击模拟，为“毅力号”提供区分地幔溅射物的具体识别标准。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为火星采样返回任务提供理论依据与实地探测策略，验证火星深部成分和演化模型。

works.title: Variable contributions of vertical land motion to sea-level change inferred at tide gauges
works.abstract: Vertical land motion is a key component of relative sea-level changes in coastal areas. Rates of vertical land motion can vary temporally owing to anthropogenic and natural processes. Yet, such nonlinear behaviour has not been fully accounted for in twentieth-century sea-level budgets or projections because long-term observations at relevant spatial scales are scarce. Here we infer vertical land motion at a global set of tide gauge stations by comparing their records with a probabilistic reconstruction of climate-related sea level (1900–2021) that integrates model-based estimates of sterodynamic, barystatic and inverse-barometer contributions. Differences between climate-related sea-level and tide gauge records primarily reflect vertical land motion and reveal previously unreported temporal variations linked to subsurface fluid withdrawal, as well as seismic and volcanic processes. We show that decadal fluctuations in regional relative sea-level trends can exceed those driven by climate-related processes by an order of magnitude. Consequently, vertical land motion projections based on linear extrapolations introduce systematic median sea-level projection errors of typically up to 7.6 mm yr−1 at sites influenced by seismic or volcanic activity and 5.6 mm yr−1 at the other sites. Our time-varying vertical land motion estimates constrain geophysical models of anthropogenic and volcano-tectonic crustal processes and pave the way for more robust sea-level projections at tide gauges. An analysis of tide gauge data from around the world provides more precise constraints on local vertical land motion, which can help refine projections of relative sea-level change.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 验潮站揭示的垂直陆地运动对海平面变化的差异贡献

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何量化全球潮汐站垂直陆地运动的时变非线性贡献。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过对比潮汐记录与气候相关海平面重建来推断垂直陆动。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 垂直陆动受流体抽取和地震火山影响，十年波动可超气候驱动。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示全球潮汐站垂直陆动的时变行为并改进预测约束。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为更稳健的相对海平面变化预测提供关键数据基础。

works.title: Zircon and apatite geochemical and isotopic constraints on magma fertility and magmatic evolution of porphyry CuAu mineralization at the Ting Darigun prospect, Chagai Belt, Western Pakistan
works.abstract: The Chagai magmatic Belt in western Pakistan hosts a major porphyry Cu Au province within the eastern Tethyan domain; yet the petrogenesis and fertility evolution of its central magmatic units remain poorly constrained. This study presents an integrated geochemical and geochronological investigation of the newly discovered Ting Darigun porphyry prospect, combining zircon U Pb dating, whole-rock geochemistry, Sr–Nd–Hf isotopic analyses and accessory mineral chemistry. New zircon U Pb ages indicate emplacement of pre-ore diorite in the Late Cretaceous (94.5 ± 1.9 Ma), followed by fertile granodiorite and coeval mineralized andesite porphyries in the Late Oligocene (25.45 ± 0.71 Ma and 25.05 ± 0.74 Ma, respectively). The pre-ore diorite records relatively dry, reduced arc magmatism derived from a depleted mantle source during an early immature arc stage, whereas the Late Oligocene porphyries exhibit adakitic characteristics, relatively higher initial 87 Sr/ 86 Sr ratios, and positive εNd(t) and εHf(t) values, indicating that they were derived from hydrous and oxidized magmas influenced by progressive slab-derived metasomatism and enhanced crust–mantle interaction during arc maturation. Integrated whole-rock, zircon, and apatite geochemistry further indicate elevated magmatic water content and oxygen fugacity in the mineralized porphyries, which promoted amphibole-dominated differentiation and suppressed early plagioclase fractionation, thereby enhancing the development of a fertile magmatic–hydrothermal system responsible for Cu Au mineralization. Collectively, these results demonstrate that progressive tectono-magmatic evolution during the Late Oligocene fundamentally enhanced magma fertility in the central Chagai arc, providing new constraints on the temporal development of fertile porphyry systems in evolving continental arcs.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 锆石和磷灰石地球化学与同位素对巴基斯坦西部查盖带Ting Darigun远景区斑岩铜金矿化岩浆肥力与岩浆演化的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 查盖岛弧中部廷达里根斑岩铜金矿区的岩浆成因与成矿潜力演化如何？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石U-Pb定年、全岩地球化学、Sr–Nd–Hf同位素及副矿物化学进行综合分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 晚白垩世干还原弧岩浆与晚渐新世富水氧化埃达克质岩浆的演化差异控制了成矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次整合锆石与磷灰石化学揭示查盖中部岩浆水含量和氧逸度对成矿的制约。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解大陆弧演化过程中斑岩成矿系统的时序发育提供了关键约束。

works.title: Abiotic formation of 13C-depleted graphitic carbon during serpentinization
works.abstract: Markedly light carbon isotope compositions (e.g., δ13C < −20‰) are often regarded as a sign of biological activity, yet certain abiotic processes can also cause similar carbon isotope fractionation. However, previous studies showing abiotic 13C depletion mostly focused on simple hydrocarbons, while generation of abiogenic 13C-depleted condensed carbonaceous matters remains poorly documented. This study investigates petrology and geochemistry of carbon species in variably serpentinized peridotite rocks from the north Qilian ophiolite, northern Tibet. It is revealed that poorly crystalline graphitic carbon, occurring as nanometer-sized veinlets included in secondary minerals, was generated by hydrogen-driven reduction of inorganic carbon during serpentinization. Moreover, the graphitic carbon probably has low δ13C (< −27‰) comparable to that of biogenic carbon. The finding indicates abiogenic graphitic carbon with biogenic-like δ13C may be produced during water-rock interactions, highlighting concerns about reliability of carbon isotopes as a standalone biosignature. Furthermore, such graphitic carbon may contribute significantly to the carbon budget of serpentinite, which may play a critical role in deep carbon cycling during serpentinite subduction.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 蛇纹石化过程中贫13C石墨碳的非生物形成

summary_bullets.research_question: 在蛇纹石化过程中，能否形成具有类似生物碳同位素特征的贫^13C非生物石墨碳？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对北祁连蛇绿岩中不同蛇纹石化程度的橄榄岩进行碳物种的岩石学和地球化学研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 蛇纹石化过程中通过无机碳的氢驱动还原可生成具有极低δ^13C值（< -27‰）的纳米级石墨碳。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次记录了非生物过程可生成具有生物特征δ^13C的凝聚态石墨碳。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 警示碳同位素作为独立生物标志物的可靠性，并为蛇纹岩碳库及深部碳循环提供新见解。

works.title: Metasomatic fluids from subducted oceanic crust: Evidence from isotopic composition of potassium in Sierra Leone diamonds
works.abstract: Deep-seated fluids are critical evidence of mass transfer in Earth’s mantle and play a key role in diamond formation. However, how such fluids derive their volatiles from recycled surficial components remains unclear. High-density diamond-forming fluids (HDFs), enriched in K2O, offer an exceptional opportunity to investigate surface material recycling into the mantle because they are protected from extensive reactions with magmas by the host diamond. Here, we present new stable potassium isotope measurements of HDFs trapped within diamonds from the Koidu mine in Sierra Leone. The diamonds trap silicic to low-Mg carbonatitic HDFs that are genetically linked to the partial melting of volatile-bearing eclogites. The morphology of HDF-bearing diamonds, coupled with their nitrogen aggregation state and major element variability, suggests episodic growth history. The HDFs trapped within the diamonds are characterized by relatively low and uniform δ41K values of -0.89 ± 0.22‰ (2SD, n = 8), showing no correlation with HDF chemistry. Their δ41K values are significantly lower than oceanic basalts sourced from the convecting mantle or the kimberlite host of the diamonds. Rather, they are most consistent with an altered oceanic crust that underwent dehydration before being incorporated into the subcontinental lithospheric mantle (SCLM) during the Proterozoic or possibly the Archean. We propose that the eclogitic source rocks underwent low-degree melting shortly before kimberlite emplacement, with K-rich omphacite influencing both the major element and stable isotope compositions of the HDFs. Our results on HDFs show that non-traditional isotopes, such as K, provide new details about how eclogites can introduce and transfer fluids to the SCLM.
works.label: must_read

summary_bullets.research_question: 俯冲洋壳来源的交代流体如何将挥发分再循环并贡献于钻石形成？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对塞拉利昂钻石中的高密度流体包裹体进行稳定钾同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 流体δ41K值均一偏低（-0.89±0.22‰），与蚀变洋壳脱水特征一致，而非对流地幔或金伯利岩。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用非传统钾同位素示踪钻石中交代流体的地壳再循环来源与过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别俯冲带物质进入大陆岩石圈地幔和钻石成因提供了新的地球化学示踪工具。

works.title: Anomalous Cu enrichment at the 49.28°E hydrothermal field on the ultraslow-spreading Southwest Indian Ridge: evidence from sulfide mineralogy, geochemistry and sulfur isotopes
works.abstract: Copper content in sulfides on mid-ocean ridges (MOR) in controlled by the variation and abundance of Cu-rich minerals, that sulfides in ultramafic-hosted hydrothermal fields commonly contain higher Cu, compared with those in mafic-hosted hydrothermal fields. Recently, a new ultramafic-hosted hydrothermal field at 49.28°E was discovered on the ultraslow-spreading Southwest Indian Ridge (SWIR). Sulfides collected show remarkably high Cu contents (20.5–39.7 wt%, average 31.8 wt%), greater than those of typical ultramafic-hosted hydrothermal fields (0.07–33.98 wt%, average 17.94 wt%). In this study, we integrate sulfide mineralogy, bulk geochemistry and sulfur-isotope analysis of typical sulfide samples. Our findings indicate that the Cu-rich sulfides consist predominantly of primary chalcopyrite, bornite and secondary copper minerals, with bulk compositions enriched in Cu (∼26.88 ± 12.47 wt%, N = 19, 1SD), Au (∼5.1 ± 5.66 ppm), Co (∼730.96 ± 434.27 ppm), and Se (∼454.4 ± 247.21 ppm), while being depleted in Ni (∼7.46 ± 17.54 ppm). Additionally, these sulfides display relatively positive but uniform δ 34 S values, ranging from + 4.49 to + 6.9‰ (averaged + 5.49‰; N = 42), except for one value of + 2.3‰. These characteristics combined indicate deep ultramafic sourced metals, with restricted seawater entrainment (19–30%), and sulfide deposition occurring in a high-temperature (>300 °C), reducing, and relatively closed system. We propose that these conditions result from the immature Yuhuang detachment, which promotes early serpentinization of ultramafic rocks and low permeability, distinguishing from matured detachment controlled hydrothermal systems. Our results constrain hydrothermal formation at the end of immature detachment faults and provide new insights into ore-forming processes in ultramafic-hosted systems along ultraslow-spreading ridges.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 超慢速扩张西南印度洋脊49.28°E热液区异常铜富集：来自硫化物矿物学、地球化学和硫同位素的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 为什么超慢速扩张西南印度洋脊49.28°E热液区硫化物铜异常富集，远超典型超镁铁质系统？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合硫化物矿物学、全岩地球化学和原位硫同位素分析进行综合研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铜富集源于高温还原封闭系统中原生黄铜矿、斑铜矿等，海水混入仅19–30%，硫同位素均一正值。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出未成熟拆离断层促进早期蛇纹石化与低渗透性，形成独特封闭成矿环境的新机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为超慢速扩张脊超镁铁质热液系统成矿过程与拆离断层演化关系提供了新见解。

works.title: Large-Scale Structural Controls on Gold Mineralization Along the Kalgoorlie Rift From Seismic Reflection Imaging in the Neoarchean Yilgarn Craton, Western Australia
works.abstract: Abstract Archean granite-greenstone belts are highly prospective for structurally controlled Au, Ni, and Li mineralization, but determining the deeper structural architecture is challenging. Three regional seismic reflection surveys over the highly mineralized Neoarchean Kalgoorlie terrane in Western Australia have been reprocessed and reinterpreted using 3-D reflector orientation estimates, partial 3-D images, and geologic constraints. We divide the Kalgoorlie terrane between Ora Banda and Kambalda into northern, central, and southern domains, based on significant structural along-strike variations, including the extent to which a structural discontinuity (decollement) at 5- to 8-km depth is observed. In the northern domain, near Ora Banda, NW-striking upper crustal faulting is restricted to narrow zones between broad granite domes, and the decollement is faulted into discrete segments. In the central domain around Kalgoorlie, up to 8-km-deep structural basins of volcaniclastic rocks, separated by wedge-shaped blocks comprising mostly mafic volcanic rocks, are imaged above a largely continuous decollement. In the southern domain around Kambalda, the decollement is not observed; here, the W-dipping Boulder-Lefroy fault is part of a major fault system extending from the surface to >10-km depth, where the fault truncates against an E-dipping midcrustal shear zone that underlies the entire region. The deep structural basins, which lie below late-stage siliciclastic basins, accommodated deposition of the volcaniclastic Black Flag Group associated with mantle-derived sources for fluids and melts potentially related to Au and Li mineralization. We speculate that along-strike structural variations of the Kalgoorlie terrane, which affected both pathways and traps for Au mineralization, arose from structural inheritance and strain partitioning during rifting and subsequent crustal shortening.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 西澳大利亚新太古代伊尔冈克拉通卡尔古利裂谷地震反射成像揭示的大规模构造对金矿化的控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何揭示太古代花岗岩-绿岩带深部结构对金矿化的控制作用？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对三条区域地震反射剖面进行重处理和重新解释，结合三维反射体定向、部分三维成像和地质约束。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 沿卡尔古利裂谷划分出三个构造域，深部滑脱层连续性变化及深大断裂系统控制矿化流体的通道和圈闭。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用三维反射体定向和部分三维成像揭示卡尔古利地体的深部构造分段性及其对成矿的控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为太古宙构造控矿系统的深部预测提供了地球物理依据，对金、锂等矿产勘探具有指导意义。

works.title: Stable versus transient sulfate–methane transition zone dynamics recorded by coexisting concretion types: Petrographic and in situ sulfur isotope evidence from Lower Silurian shale
works.abstract: Authigenic concretions in marine mudstones preserve spatially resolved pore-water records during early diagenesis, yet whether mineralogically distinct concretion types differentially archive stable versus shifting sulfate–methane transition zone (SMTZ) conditions remains unresolved. This study combines petrography with in situ δ 34 S analyses at concretion-scale zone mapping and grain-scale core-to-rim profiling to investigate pyrite concretions and quartz–calcite concretions from the Lower Silurian Longmaxi Formation, South China. Pyrite concretions display mineralogically uniform interiors and a modest concretion-scale δ 34 S pyr gradient, with mean values of ~11.5‰ at the margin and ~ 7.8‰ at the center. Where multiple spots per grain are available, intra-grain profiles show no coherent core-to-rim trend, although spot coverage is limited. These features are consistent with relatively rapid pervasive mineralization within a narrow diagenetic interval. Their intermediate δ 34 S pyr values indicate mixing between 34 S-depleted OSR-related reduced sulfur and a relatively 34 S-enriched SMTZ-associated reduced‑sulfur component. Quartz–calcite concretions preserve a contrasting multi-stage record. An inverted concretion-scale δ 34 S pyr pattern, with relatively 34 S-depleted margin pyrite and more 34 S-enriched center pyrite, together with repeated grain-scale core-to-rim 34 S enrichment, records sequential pyrite formation during progressive burial from the sulfate reduction zone into the SMTZ. Pseudomorphic replacement of diagenetic barite by quartz and calcite provides independent mineralogical evidence for subsequent burial into sulfate-depleted conditions within or below the SMTZ. The outermost overgrowth zone, characterized by acicular barite pseudomorphs, 34 S-enriched pyrite, and grain-scale core-to-rim δ 34 S increases, records transient paleo-SMTZ descent and renewed SMTZ influence during continued burial. This transient SMTZ deepening is consistent with reduced methane substrate supply during Aeronian forced regression, which may have been linked to Kwangsian Orogeny-related regional sedimentological reorganization, although this tectonic linkage remains inferential. These results demonstrate that mineralogically distinct concretions preserve complementary, stage-specific records of paleo-SMTZ dynamics and provide new constraints on early diagenetic sulfur cycling in ancient marine successions.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 共存结核类型记录的稳定与瞬态硫酸盐-甲烷转换带动力学：来自下志留统页岩的岩相学和原位硫同位素证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 不同矿物类型的结核是否差异性地记录稳定或瞬变的硫酸盐-甲烷转换带（SMTZ）动态？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对龙马溪组黄铁矿和石英-方解石结核进行岩石学与原位δ34S分析，包括结核尺度填图和颗粒核-边剖面。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 黄铁矿结核记录快速均一成岩；石英-方解石结核保存多阶段序列，反映埋藏中SMTZ逐步下移及后来瞬变加深。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过共存结核的矿物学与颗粒级硫同位素对比，提取互补的阶段性古SMTZ动态记录。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为早期成岩硫循环与古海洋氧化还原界面变迁提供了新型矿物学-同位素约束手段。

works.title: The birth of the Beringia Arc: A mid-Cretaceous continental volcano-plutonic belt stretching from Russia to Alaska
works.abstract: Cretaceous igneous rocks exposed in the Bering Strait region from the Russian Far East across Seward Peninsula to the Yukon-Koyukuk basin and the Ruby-Farewell terrane of Alaska lack a unifying model for their formation. We present 47 new U-Pb zircon, titanite, and baddeleyite ages from magmatic rocks. The older group consists of 115−102 Ma plutons and volcanic rocks, including ultrapotassic rocks, found in northeastern Russia, islands in the Bering Sea, and on the Seward Peninsula of Alaska. The younger group includes 102−70 Ma plutonic rocks and dikes from the Yukon-Koyukuk basin and on the Seward Peninsula as well as the volcanic rocks of the vast Okhotsk-Chukotka belt in eastern Russia. Many have elevated alkalis and the subalkaline rocks plot in the calc-alkaline field. Most of the rocks with <65 wt% SiO2 are alkaline, whereas more siliceous rocks are generally subalkaline with Nb and Ta troughs, consistent with arc chemistry. Sr and Nd isotopes plot near bulk earth for the most primitive samples, and there is a trend toward more negative εNd and more positive initial 87Sr/86Sr with higher SiO2, which we interpret to indicate varying degrees of crustal contamination of subduction-related parental magmas. Nd model ages average to ca. 800 Ma. We created a tectonic model in GPlates in which collision of island arcs with the continent in the Late Jurassic−Early Cretaceous was followed by a new north-dipping subduction zone, establishing an Andean-type arc system at least 2200 km long. We call this magmatic belt the Beringia Arc. It lasted from 115 Ma to at least 70 Ma before subduction either rolled back or jumped to the south. The Beringia Arc system was coeval with the continental arc represented by the Okhotsk-Chukotka volcanic belt in northeastern Russia that mainly formed from 98 Ma to 80 Ma. This study links the abundant mid-Cretaceous plutonic rocks of the Bering Strait region into a single model of generation in a continental arc.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 白令陆弧的诞生：一条中白垩世从俄罗斯延伸至阿拉斯加的大陆火山-深成岩带

summary_bullets.research_question: 白令海峡地区广泛分布的白垩纪岩浆岩缺乏统一的形成模型，本文旨在建立其成因框架。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用47件新的U-Pb锆石、榍石和斜锆石年龄及全岩Sr-Nd同位素地球化学分析，并结合GPlates构造重建。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出115–102 Ma和102–70 Ma两期岩浆活动，其地球化学特征符合大陆弧属性，母岩浆受到不同程度地壳混染。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出“白令陆弧”概念，将俄罗斯远东至阿拉斯加逾2200公里的中白垩世岩浆岩统一解释为安第斯型大陆弧。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为环北极构造重建、东北亚-北美西北部白垩纪岩浆演化及古太平洋俯冲体制提供了关键约束。

works.title: Late Miocene Euphrates River drained into a partially desiccated eastern Mediterranean
works.abstract: Abstract Although the Euphrates River—stretching ~3,000 km across Western Asia—has shaped the region’s geology for millions of years, the timing of its origin and the evolution of its course remain enigmatic. So far, two contrasting hypotheses have been proposed to explain the fluvial system’s Late Neogene path: termination in Anatolia at a palaeo-lake or the Mediterranean, or a southeastward continuation to Arabia. Here we use seismic-reflection and topographic data to show that two previously identified sedimentary accumulations—deposited during the terminal phase of the Late Miocene Messinian salinity crisis—resulted from dual riverine systems that drained into a partially desiccated eastern Mediterranean before avulsing toward the Persian Gulf and converging to form the modern Euphrates River. From probabilistic sediment-budget modelling, we show that although the latest Messinian drainage basins were an order of magnitude smaller than their present-day extents, the total palaeo-discharge exceeded that of the modern Tigris, Euphrates and Nile rivers combined, indicating intense palaeo-precipitation and high palaeo-relief. These results suggest that plate-margin deformation both controlled the fluvial avulsions that diverted the Euphrates River from the Anatolian–Eurasian Plate to the Arabian Plate, and established the conditions necessary for the development of the alluvial Fertile Crescent.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 晚中新世幼发拉底河注入部分干涸的地中海东部

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究幼发拉底河在上新世晚期的起源路径，究竟是流入安纳托利亚古湖或地中海，还是流向阿拉伯东南部。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用地震反射和地形数据，结合概率性沉积物收支模型进行分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 晚中新世墨西拿期，河流曾注入部分干涸的地中海东部，后改道至波斯湾，古流量超过现代底格里斯河、幼发拉底河和尼罗河总和。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次证实幼发拉底河晚中新世双河系注入干涸地中海，并定量化古流量和构造控制作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示板块边界变形控制河流改道，并为新月沃土发育提供条件，对理解构造-气候-地表过程相互作用具有重要意义。

works.title: Lake sediment heatwaves under global warming
works.abstract: Abstract Lake sediment heatwaves, driven by rising global temperatures, pose emerging threats to freshwater ecosystems by altering sediment thermal regimes and intensifying sediment biogeochemical processes. Here we present a global-scale assessment of lake sediment heatwaves, examining their historical patterns and projecting future trends under various climate scenarios in 41,499 representative lakes worldwide. Using daily simulated lake sediment temperatures from 1981 to 2010 and future (2071–2100) projections under three Shared Socioeconomic Pathways (SSP 1–2.6, SSP 3–7.0, SSP 5–8.5), we investigate lake sediment heatwave characteristics, including their duration, intensity, frequency and seasonal timing worldwide. Our results show that lake sediment heatwaves are generally more persistent and frequent than lake surface heatwaves, with sediment heatwaves in pelagic regions experiencing a notable lag relative to surface conditions. Under future climate scenarios, sediment heatwaves are projected to intensify, with their duration and frequency increasing substantially, particularly under SSP 5–8.5. These shifts could exacerbate the production of greenhouse gases such as methane and increase sediment respiration rates in lakes. This study highlights the need to account for sediment heatwaves in freshwater ecosystem management and climate adaptation strategies to mitigate future impacts.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 全球变暖背景下的湖泊沉积物热浪

summary_bullets.research_question: 全球变暖下湖底沉积物热浪的时空特征及未来变化趋势如何？
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于41,499个代表性湖泊的日尺度模拟沉积物温度，分析历史（1981-2010）和未来（2071-2100）三种SSP情景的热浪特征。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 沉积物热浪比表层更持久频繁且存在滞后，未来持续时间和频率将显著增加，尤其在SSP5-8.5情景下。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在全球尺度评估湖底沉积物热浪的动态及其与表层热浪的差异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示沉积物热浪对温室气体排放和生物地球化学过程的影响，为淡水生态系统管理和气候适应提供关键依据。

works.title: Intensified lake sediment heatwaves
works.abstract: Ongoing climate warming is heating lake sediments worldwide. Model simulations indicate that sediment heatwaves will intensify and become increasingly pervasive under climate change, with the potential to increase methane production and sediment respiration.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 湖泊沉积物热浪加剧

summary_bullets.research_question: 气候变化将如何驱动湖泊沉积物热浪的加剧和扩散？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过模型模拟预测全球湖泊沉积物热浪的未来动态。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 沉积物热浪将变得更强、更频繁，可能增强甲烷生成和沉积物呼吸。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将热浪分析从湖水拓展至沉积物，揭示底栖生态风险。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估湖泊碳循环和温室气体排放对气候的反馈提供关键依据。

works.title: Global mineral constraints on dust shortwave radiative effects
works.abstract: Mineral dust aerosols affect Earth’s energy balance in multiple ways, including interactions with solar radiation, but this effect remains poorly quantified. A central limitation has been the lack of reliable global information on dust mineral composition, particularly light-absorbing iron oxides. An imaging spectrometer, placed aboard the International Space Station by the Earth Surface Mineral Dust Source Investigation mission, provides high-resolution, near-global retrievals of surface mineralogy. Here we incorporate these retrievals into four Earth system models to constrain the dust shortwave direct radiative effect. Analysis shows that the retrievals reduce the radiative effect uncertainty by more than a factor of six in both present-day (2007–2011) and late twenty-first-century (2090–2094) climates. This improvement is enabled by tighter constraints on iron oxide content, which reduce its uncertainty contribution from 0.62 W m−2 to 0.10 W m−2. Greatest improvement occurs over the Sahara, where high dust abundance and surface reflectance amplify the influence of iron oxides. Orbital spectroscopy thus shifts the primary uncertainty from mineral composition to processes controlling the spatial distribution of dust. These findings mark a transition towards confident aerosol composition modelling and provide an improved basis for assessing how dust alters Earth’s energy balance today and in a warming future. Global soil mineral data from orbital spectroscopy reduce uncertainty in dust’s solar radiative impact and improve estimates of Earth’s energy imbalance, according to analyses integrating high-resolution soil composition into Earth system models.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 全球矿物对沙尘短波辐射效应的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 解决矿物尘埃短波辐射效应量化差的问题，主要缺乏全球铁氧化物等吸光矿物成分信息。
summary_bullets.methodology: 将太空成像光谱仪反演的高分辨率全球地表矿物组成融入四个地球系统模型进行约束。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 卫星矿物数据使尘埃短波辐射效应不确定性降低六倍多，铁氧化物贡献不确定性从0.62降至0.10 W m⁻²。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用轨道光谱获取的全球土壤铁氧化物含量约束多模型，大幅收紧辐射效应估算。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为气候模式提供可信矿物组成约束，显著改善尘埃辐射强迫评估和未来能量平衡预估。

works.title: Mesoarchean crustal growth in the Jiaobei Terrane, North China Craton: insights from plagioclase accumulation signatures in Laiyang TTG gneisses
works.abstract: Distinguishing between deep subduction-related magmatism and intracrustal differentiation is critical for reconstructing the tectonic evolution of the North China Craton. In this study, we report zircon U–Pb geochronology, whole-rock geochemistry, Lu–Hf isotopes, and phase equilibrium modeling results for newly identified Mesoarchean TTG gneisses in the Laiyang area of the Jiaobei Terrane. Zircon U–Pb dating constrains two magmatic pulses at ca. 3.0 Ga (Xiabujia and Jiaojiadian trondhjemitic gneisses) and ca. 2.86 Ga (Beizhanggezhuang tonalitic gneisses). Isotopic and geochemical constraints indicate that these rocks originated from the partial melting of ca. 3.2 Ga juvenile mafic crust at low-to-medium pressures. Although the suite is predominantly of low-to-medium pressure affinity, sporadic samples exhibit high Sr/Y ratios and positive Eu anomalies resembling high-pressure TTGs. Phase equilibrium modeling indicates that these “high-pressure” signatures are not indicators of deep eclogite-facies melting, but are artifacts resulting from plagioclase accumulation at shallower depths. We prefer a predominantly vertical tectonic model involving the reworking of a thickened oceanic plateau, possibly facilitated by enhanced mantle heat input.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华北克拉通胶北地体中太古代地壳生长：莱阳TTG片麻岩中斜长石堆晶特征的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何区分深俯冲岩浆作用与地壳内部分异来重建华北克拉通中太古代构造演化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石U-Pb定年、全岩地球化学、Lu-Hf同位素和相平衡模拟方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 莱阳TTG片麻岩的高Sr/Y特征实为浅部斜长石堆晶假象，而非深部榴辉岩相熔融的指示。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示高压地球化学信号可由堆晶作用产生，挑战传统TTG构造判别准则。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别早期地壳生长方式提供新视角，须审慎使用高压指标重建陆壳演化。

works.title: Relationships between superimposed-type and vein-type Sn mineralization at the Xitian ore field: Implications from cassiterite geochronology and trace-element geochemistry
works.abstract: Numerous skarn-type, quartz vein-type, and superimposed W–Sn mineralization occurrences, where quartz veins crosscut earlier skarn assemblages, are situated within the Xitian ore field in the central Nanling Metallogenic Belt. However, the genetic link between superimposed- and quartz vein-type mineralization, as well as their contrasting physicochemical regimes, remains poorly constrained. In this contribution, we conduct a comparative analysis of trace-element compositions and U–Pb geochronology of cassiterite from the Xitian ore field to clarify the genetic relationships between these two Sn-mineralization styles. Our results suggest that superimposed-type (distal; Zr/Hf = ~11–167, Ti/Zr = ~0–194) and quartz vein-type (proximal; Zr/Hf = ~0.4–36, Ti/Zr = ~1.6–651) Sn mineralization formed during the same district-scale Jurassic magmatic-hydrothermal event, although in different metallogenic settings. Similar mineralization ages (ca. 155 Ma) and first-order similarities in elemental compositions indicate precipitation from genetically related fluid systems during a Late Jurassic magmatic-hydrothermal event. In contrast, second-order differences in elemental concentrations and physicochemical conditions point to distinct formation environments. Principal component analysis (PCA) identifies Fe, U, Ti, Ta, Nb, Zr, and Hf as the key discriminators between the two mineralization styles. Lower Zr, Hf, Nb, and Ta contents, coupled with higher Zr/Hf and Nb/Ta ratios in superimposed-type cassiterite relative to quartz vein-type cassiterite, imply lower formation temperatures for the skarn-type variety. Negative Eu anomalies, together with substitution mechanisms of Fe incorporation into the Sn-site of superimposed-type [Fe 3+ + OH − ↔ Sn 4+ + O 2− ; Fe 3+ + H + ↔ Sn 4+ ] and quartz vein-type [(Nb, Ta) 5+ + Fe 3+ ↔ 2Sn 4+ ] cassiterites, strongly support oxidizing mineralizing environments. Systematically lower U contents in quartz vein-type cassiterite further indicate highly oxidizing conditions compared to the superimposed-type. We propose a comprehensive Sn metallogenic model for the Xitian district that reconciles the formation of both mineralization styles within the broader Nanling W–Sn metallogenic system.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 锡田矿田叠生型与脉型锡成矿作用的关系：来自锡石地质年代学和微量元素地球化学的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究锡田矿场叠加型与石英脉型锡矿化的成因联系及物化条件差异。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对比分析锡石的微量元素组成和U-Pb同位素年代学。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 两类矿化形成于同一晚侏罗世岩浆热液事件，但叠加型温度较低、氧逸度较低，石英脉型更氧化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用锡石微量元素和主成分分析精确区分两种矿化类型并揭示其形成环境。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为南岭钨锡成矿系统提供成因模型，对区域锡矿勘探具有指导价值。

works.title: Low-sulfidation epithermal mineralization in a post-subduction setting: Insights from the Eocene Gicik Au-Ag ± Te deposit, North-Central Anatolia (Türkiye)
works.abstract:
The Turkish segment of the Western Tethyan Metallogenic Belt hosts numerous epithermal deposits; however, parts of north-central Anatolia remain underexplored, limiting understanding of mineralization styles and tectonomagmatic controls in this sector. The Gicik Au–Ag ± Te deposit, located along the southern Pontide margin, provides an opportunity to address this gap. This study aims to characterize the geology, mineralization styles, and timing of the Gicik epithermal system, and to constrain its relationship with regional tectonomagmatic evolution through field observations combined with mineralogical, geochemical, and geochronological analyses.
Mineralized veins are hosted by a volcanic–volcaniclastic sequence composed of medium-K calc-alkaline dacitic agglomerates and lavas displaying arc-like geochemical signatures. Low-sulfidation-style epithermal Au-Ag ± Te mineralization occurs along sub-vertical veins emplaced within NNE-trending oblique-slip faults. A core of silicification passes first into vein-proximal argillic alteration and then into a broader zone of propylitic alteration. Veins display superimposed textures including stockwork and lattice-bladed veins as well as multi-stage colloform banding and hydrothermal brecciation. Two distinct stages of mineralization were identified in association with these textures. Early stage is comprised by pyrite-arsenopyrite-marcasite with refractory gold primarily occurring in colloform-banded, massive silica, and lattice-bladed veins. Main Au-Ag-Te mineralization occurs in late breccia veins consisting of pyrite, Ag-tetrahedrite, native Au, tellurides, and rare selenides.
Overlapping ages of volcanic hosts and hydrothermal illite suggest that the Gicik epithermal system was spatio-temporally associated with middle Eocene (∼44.5 Ma) magmatism that post-dated Pontide–Anatolide-Tauride collision. Formation of low-sulfidation epithermal mineralization was controlled by NNE-trending, transpressional structures developed during the advanced stages of collision.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 后俯冲背景下的低硫化浅成低温热液成矿作用：来自土耳其中北安纳托利亚始新世Gicik金-银±碲矿床的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 该矿床如何揭示北安纳托利亚中部未被充分研究的低温热液矿化样式及其构造岩浆控制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过野外观察、矿物学、地球化学和地质年代学综合分析方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Gicik为后碰撞中始新世低硫化浅成低温热液金-银-碲矿床，受NNE向断层控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在蓬蒂德-安纳托利德-托罗斯碰撞后背景中厘定出~44.5Ma的低硫化矿化事件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解特提斯带后俯冲成矿系统演变和区域勘探提供关键约束。

works.title: Increased Cu fertility from Paleocene Lurige to Eocene Narigongma porphyries in the northern Yulong belt, eastern Tibet: Implication for coupled Plateau uplift and porphyry Cu mineralization
works.abstract: The Yulong belt in eastern Tibet is a typical post-subduction porphyry Cu belt. Large to giant Cu deposits are widely developed in middle to south section of the belt, whereas only two small to medium deposits (Lurige and Narigongma) are currently discovered in the northern section. The petrogenesis and Cu fertility of porphyries from the northern section remain poorly investigated. Here we address these issues by presenting comprehensive whole-rock and mineral analyses on porphyries from these two deposits. The Lurige (∼58 Ma) and Narigongma (∼40 Ma) porphyries have high whole-rock SiO 2 (> 68 wt%) contents and overlapped Sr-Nd-Hf isotopes, which plot in the evolution trend of cospatial Permian Paleo-Tethyan arc magmas, suggesting their derivation from Paleo-Tethyan arc root. The two deposits coincide broadly with the two episodes of regional plateau uplift at ∼ 64–50 Ma and 44–40 Ma, indicating that regional plateau uplift played a first-order role in porphyry Cu mineralization.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 藏东玉龙带北段古新世卢日给至始新世纳日贡玛斑岩体铜成矿肥力增强：对高原抬升与斑岩铜矿化耦合的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 藏东玉龙带北部古新世卢里格与始新世纳日贡玛斑岩的岩石成因及铜成矿潜力差异机制不明。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用全岩主微量、Sr-Nd-Hf同位素及矿物地球化学的系统对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 两期斑岩均源于古特提斯弧根部，铜成矿潜力自古新世到始新世增强并与高原两阶段隆升耦合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了铜成矿潜力随时间增强与高原隆升事件的成因联系，明确隆升的一级控矿作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碰撞后斑岩铜矿的构造-岩浆控矿模型和藏东区域找矿提供了关键理论依据。

works.title: Sanukitoid stable isotopes reveal complex crust-mantle dynamics in the early Earth
works.abstract: Abstract The Archean to Paleoproterozoic Earth underwent significant changes in surface, crust and mantle systems, yet interactions between these reservoirs remain poorly constrained. Sanukitoids are generated by mantle–crust interaction, and thus provide a record of early Earth recycling processes. Here we combine Barium (Ba) and Magnesium (Mg) stable isotopes with radiogenic isotopes and elemental data from 3.4-2.1 Ga sanukitoids to trace crust-mantle interaction across this critical interval. Archean sanukitoids display highly variable Ba and Mg isotopic compositions, suggesting contributions from altered ocean crust, hydrothermal barite and/or sediment. In contrast, Paleoproterozoic sanukitoids show uniformly lighter isotopic signatures, closely resembling Phanerozoic arc magmas influenced by pelagic sediments. Importantly, Ba isotope fractionation before the Great Oxidation Event indicates local sulfate production and oxidized conditions in sanukitoid sources. These results reveal variable recycling of locally-oxidized ocean crust since the Paleoarchean, and confirm sanukitoids as a key archive of early Earth crust-mantle dynamics.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 赞岐岩稳定同位素揭示早期地球复杂的壳幔动力学

summary_bullets.research_question: 太古宙至古元古代的地壳-地幔如何相互作用，其物质循环过程有何制约？
summary_bullets.methodology: 联合钡、镁稳定同位素与放射成因同位素及元素数据，分析3.4–2.1 Ga赞岐岩类。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 太古宙赞岐岩钡镁同位素高度变化，反映蚀变洋壳、热液重晶石等贡献；古元古代样品则均一偏轻，类似显生宙弧岩浆受远洋沉积物影响。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用钡镁同位素示踪早期地球氧化性俯冲再循环并揭示大氧化事件前赞岐岩源区的局部氧化条件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为早期地球壳幔相互作用与氧化还原状态演化提供关键档案和重要同位素约束。

works.title: Tectonic and climatic implications of the Aleutian Arc initiation ≥56 million years ago
works.abstract: Abstract The timing and origin of Aleutian subduction initiation remain poorly constrained, yet they are central to understanding late Paleocene to early Eocene plate tectonic reorganization in the Pacific and its possible climatic consequences. Here, we use geochronologic and geochemical data obtained on western Aleutian arc samples from four basal submarine sequences, spanning ~700 km, to constrain Aleutian subduction initiation to ≥56 Ma. Early forearc lavas have similar compositions to forearc basalts erupted during the initial stages of Izu-Bonin-Mariana subduction in the western Pacific. Collision of the Olyutorsky Arc with Kamchatka-Koryak margin and subduction of the Izanagi-Pacific Ridge are likely to have triggered Aleutian subduction initiation and a change in absolute Pacific plate motion from WNW to N between 57 and 55 Ma, as shown with a GPlates model. Our study shows that Aleutian subduction initiation is a key event at the beginning of a major ~10 Myr plate reorganization in the circum-Pacific ending with Hawaii-Emperor-Bend formation. These tectono-magmatic events may have contributed to contemporaneous global climatic events in the late Paleocene and early Eocene.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 阿留申岛弧起始于≥5600万年前的构造与气候意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 阿留申俯冲起始的时限和成因及其对晚古新世-早始新世太平洋板块重组和气候影响。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过西阿留申弧基岩地质年代学、地球化学分析及GPlates板块重建模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 阿留申俯冲起始不晚于56 Ma，初始弧岩浆与伊豆-小笠原-马里亚纳弧成分相似。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将阿留申俯冲起始约束在≥56 Ma并关联环太平洋板块重组与全球气候事件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为太平洋板块运动转折和古气候事件提供关键构造-岩浆驱动机制证据。

works.title: New determination of deep mantle sulfur isotopic composition from Galápagos submarine glasses
works.abstract: Whether high 3 He/ 4 He ratios in some ocean island basalts (OIB) reflect the remnant of an undegassed reservoir or the core interaction with the deep mantle is still debated. In this study, we bring additional constraints on the S origin in the high 3 He/ 4 He reservoir. We investigated submarine basaltic glasses from Fernandina volcano, Galápagos Archipelago, and from the Galápagos Spreading Center (GSC) to estimate the S-isotopic composition of the primitive mantle (high 3 He/ 4 He reservoir).
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 基于加拉帕戈斯海底玻璃对深部地幔硫同位素组成的新测定

summary_bullets.research_question: 高3He/4He比率的洋岛玄武岩反映未脱气原始地幔还是核幔相互作用？
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析加拉帕戈斯Fernandina火山与扩张中心的海底玄武岩玻璃的硫同位素组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 获得了高3He/4He原始地幔储层的硫同位素组成新估算值。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用加拉帕戈斯海底玻璃直接约束深部地幔硫同位素与高3He/4He储层的关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为区分地幔深部储层类型与核幔相互作用提供了关键硫同位素制约。

works.title: Proterozoic crustal evolution and tectonic affinity of the Beidahe microcontinent in the North Qilian Orogenic Belt: Constraints from zircon U–Pb ages and Lu–Hf isotopes
works.abstract: The North Qilian Orogenic Belt (NQOB) preserves key fragments of Precambrian continental crust along the northern margin of the Proto–Tethyan system. One such fragment is the Beidahe Block (BDHB) that forms the focus of this study. To resolve the crustal architecture, provenance, and tectonic affinity of the BDHB, we present zircon U–Pb and Lu–Hf data from Paleoproterozoic–Neoproterozoic metasedimentary and magmatic rocks in the western NQOB. Detrital zircon spectra from the Beidahe and Zhulongguan Groups yield maximum depositional ages of ca. 1.4 Ga and 728 Ma, respectively, and display major clusters at 2.45 Ga, 1.7–1.6 Ga, 1.55–1.30 Ga, and 0.95–0.74 Ga, indicating mixed sediment input from Archean–Paleoproterozoic basement and Mesoproterozoic–Neoproterozoic magmatic sources. Magmatic zircon ages of ca. 1.65 Ga (granitic gneiss), 1.09 Ga (garnet amphibolite), and a metamorphic age of 497 Ma record late Paleoproterozoic crustal growth, previously unrecognized Mesoproterozoic mafic magmatism, and Early Paleozoic high-grade metamorphism related to subduction initiation. Zircon Lu–Hf compositions are dominated by negative εHf(t) values with T DM2 model ages of 3.5–1.4 Ga, demonstrating extensive reworking of ancient continental crust with limited juvenile input during Mesoproterozoic–Neoproterozoic magmatism and sedimentation. Comparative detrital zircon analysis shows that the BDHB closely resembles the Central Qilian Block (CQB), sharing the characteristic ∼ 0.95 Ga and ∼ 1.60 Ga peaks while lacking the ∼ 1.45 Ga and ∼ 1.90 Ga signals typical of the Alxa Block. This affinity suggests that the BDHB formed a Rodinia-derived microcontinent along the southern margin of the North Qilian Ocean. The provenance pattern and metamorphic record collectively indicate a southward/bidirectional subduction polarity during Early Paleozoic Ocean closure.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 北祁连造山带北大河微陆块元古代地壳演化与构造亲缘性：来自锆石U–Pb年龄和Lu–Hf同位素的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 确定北祁连造山带北大河微陆块的基底结构、物源及其构造亲缘性。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对变沉积岩和岩浆岩进行锆石U–Pb定年和Lu–Hf同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 北大河块体碎屑锆石年龄谱与中祁连块体相似，均缺乏阿拉善块体的标志峰，表明其源自罗迪尼亚超大陆的微陆块。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次识别出1.09 Ga的基性岩浆作用和497 Ma的俯冲启动变质记录，并证实北大河块体与中祁连亲缘。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为原特提斯洋北缘微陆块构造归属及早古生代南向/双向俯冲闭合模式提供关键约束。

works.title: Sn–Cu coexisting mechanism of Huaaobaote deposit, Inner Mongolia: Constraints from geochronology, mineralogy and geochemistry
works.abstract: Sn is predominantly associated with highly fractionated, reduced ilmenite-series granites, whereas Cu is commonly linked to less fractionated, oxidized magnetite-series granites. The sharply contrasting geochemical behaviors make their paragenesis theoretically improbable. Hence the global occurrence of numerous Sn–Cu coexisting deposits presents a geological paradox. The Huaaobaote deposit, located in the Southern Great Xing’an Range in China, is a representative Sn–Cu coexisting deposit. The Huaaobaote intrusion records a continuous magmatic evolution series, ranging from porphyritic monzogranite (PMG) through fine-grained syenogranite (FGG) to granite porphyry (GP), with mafic microgranular enclaves (MMEs) developed in the PMG. There are explicitly causal relationships between magmatism and mineralization, as well as the characteristics of the mantle, which contribute to investigating the Sn–Cu coexisting mechanism. LA–ICP–MS zircon U–Pb dating of the MMEs, PMG, FGG, and GP of the Huaaobaote intrusion yielded indistinguishable crystallization ages within analytical uncertainty, constraining their emplacement to the Early Cretaceous. Geochemically, the MMEs are characterized by relatively low SiO 2 contents, affiliation with the high–K calc-alkaline series, metaluminous features, and pronounced negative Eu anomalies. In contrast, the felsic rocks (PMG, FGG, and GP) are uniformly enriched in silica, alkalis, and aluminum, and also exhibit significant negative Eu anomalies. They are all enriched in Th, U, Zr, Hf, and Nd, but depleted in Ba, Sr, P, and Ti. A coherent magmatic evolutionary trend is evident from the PMG to the GP, marked by an increasing degree of fractionation and a compositional shift from weakly peraluminous to distinctly peraluminous. This trend is accompanied by a more pronounced negative Eu anomaly and stronger depletions in Ba, Sr, P, and Ti in the most evolved GP. Electron probe microanalysis of amphiboles from the MMEs, PMG, and FGG yields melt water contents of 4.29–6.82 wt%, 5.40–10.1 wt%, and 5.12–6.43 wt%, respectively. The corresponding oxygen fugacities (ΔFMQ) of the magmas are + 0.59 to + 1.29, +0.24 to + 1.11, and –0.20 to + 0.59. Thus, we conclude that the magmatic environment, characterized by high water content and moderate oxygen fugacity, was key to enabling the Sn–Cu coexisting mechanism of the Huaaobaote deposit.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 内蒙古花敖包特矿床Sn-Cu共存机制：来自年代学、矿物学和地球化学的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示Sn–Cu共生矿床的地球化学悖论，即截然不同的岩浆条件如何促成共生成矿。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用LA–ICP–MS锆石U–Pb定年、角闪石电子探针及全岩地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高水含量与中等氧逸度的岩浆环境是实现Sn–Cu共生的关键机制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过矿物微区分析定量约束岩浆水含量与氧逸度，调和Sn–Cu共生矛盾。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解全球Sn–Cu共生矿床成因提供了关键岩浆条件约束，并指导找矿勘查。

works.title:
Integrated Geophysical Imaging Reveals the Origin and Pathways of Mantle‐Derived CO
                    <sub>2</sub>
                    Beneath the Tangra Yumco Rift, Central Tibet
works.abstract: Abstract The Tangra Yumco Rift (TYR) in central Tibet is a key window for crust–mantle interactions during extension. We performed high‐resolution crust‐mantle imaging using receiver function analysis, 1‐D nonlinear S‐wave velocity inversion, and tomoDD tomography, revealing a vertical Crust–Mantle Degassing System (CMDS) bounded by the Zhala (ZF) and Wozang (WF) Faults. Two mantle low‐velocity zones (MLVZ1/2) at ∼70 km are interpreted as Neo‐Tethys and Shiquanhe–Jiali Tethys Ocean remnants, respectively. Crustal low‐velocity zones (20–40 km, Vs 2 / 3 He, generated by partial melting of carbonate‐rich oceanic remnants, migrate upward via crustal conduits formed by brittle‐ductile decoupled deformation. This study links deep lithospheric dynamics to surface degassing and ecological anomalies, providing a new paradigm for lithosphere–biosphere feedback within plateau rifts.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 综合地球物理成像揭示藏中当惹雍错裂谷下方幔源 CO2 的起源及运移通道

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨西藏中部当惹雍措裂谷之下地幔来源CO₂的起源与运移路径。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用接收函数分析、一维非线性S波速度反演和双差层析成像进行高分辨率壳幔成像。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现由两条断裂围限的垂向壳幔脱气系统，地幔低速度带为特提斯洋壳残余，部分熔融释放CO₂经地壳通道上升。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示从深部岩石圈动力学到地表脱气及生态异常的完整壳幔脱气系统。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为高原裂谷中岩石圈-生物圈反馈研究提供新范式，连接深部过程与地表环境效应。

works.title: Rapid and concentrated magmatism and mineralization of rare-metal granites: Evidence from the Limu deposit, South China
works.abstract: Rare metals, including W, Sn, Nb, Ta, and Li, are strategic resources essential for advanced manufacturing, clean energy, and defense technologies. In-situ isotopic dating of ore minerals directly constrains rare-metal mineralization timing, which could provide essential information for ore-forming process. The Limu rare-metal granite is a representative granite-type Nb–Ta deposit in South China and occurs as several small stocks (∼1 km 2 ), including muscovite granite, Li–phengite granite, and zinnwaldite/lepidolite–albite granite. Previous studies proposed a prolonged magmatic evolution from ∼ 240 to ∼ 200 Ma, longer than that of most batholiths, with controversial ages derived from different methods, leaving its precise chronological framework unresolved. Here we conducted in situ U–Pb/U–Th–Pb dating on zircon, monazite, cassiterite, columbite-group minerals (CGM), and wolframite from 19 granite samples collected from seven localities in the Limu ore field: Paoshuiling, Jinzhuyuan, Xiangtanling, Niulanling, Daqiling, Laohutou, and Shuiximiao. The results constrain the formation of the Limu rare-metal granite to 212.6 ± 4.4 Ma–207.8 ± 2.3 Ma, with a peak at approximately 210 Ma. Integration of new whole–rock geochemical data (n = 17), previously published datasets (n = 51), and zircon trace element analyses shows that granites from Jinzhuyuan, Laohutou, and Shuiximiao are the most evolved, whereas those from Daqiling and Niulanling represent more primitive end-members. These results define a precise temporal framework, indicating that the separate stocks formed within a short interval (∼5 Myr) through fractional crystallization and prompting a reevaluation of the magmatic and metallogenic evolution of the Limu rare-metal granite, with broader implications for dating comparable highly fractionated granites and granite-type rare-metal deposits worldwide.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 稀有金属花岗岩的快速集中岩浆作用与成矿：来自华南栗木矿床的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 该研究旨在厘清华南栗木稀有金属花岗岩长期争议的精确年代格架和岩浆演化时限。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对19个样品的锆石、独居石、锡石、铌钽矿物和黑钨矿进行原位U-Pb/U-Th-Pb定年与全岩地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 栗木稀有金属花岗岩形成于212.6–207.8 Ma，峰期约为210 Ma，各岩株在约5百万年内快速完成分离结晶。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用多矿物原位定年将栗木岩体演化期从~40百万年修正为~5百万年的集中成岩成矿事件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为高演化花岗岩与稀有金属矿床提供精确原位定年范例，对全球同类矿床年代学研究具有参考价值。

works.title: Rock Physics of the Critical Zone: Models, Inversion, and Interpretation
works.abstract: Abstract Rock physics models link geophysical measurements with subsurface petrophysical properties, such as porosity, mineral composition, and fluid saturation. While originally developed for hydrocarbon exploration, these models are increasingly applied in the near surface for quantitative interpretation of geophysical data. This review focuses on their application to the subsurface component of the critical zone, which extends from soil to the base of weathered bedrock and controls key hydrological, geomorphological, and ecological processes. Its structure and heterogeneity remain difficult to characterize due to limited direct subsurface observations. As a result, critical zone studies of the subsurface have relied on indirect geophysical measurements, which are spatially extensive and are used to interpret structural variations, property heterogeneity, and physical processes. However, geophysical measurements alone do not yield petrophysical properties. Rock physics models combined with geophysical inversion provide a tool to translate geophysical data into subsurface petrophysical properties. In this review, we present a synthesis of rock physics models for the prediction of geophysical properties of unsaturated and saturated porous media, focusing on their formulations and assumptions in near‐surface applications involving seismic, electrical, electromagnetic, and nuclear magnetic resonance methods. We then discuss their integration in geophysical inversion studies for the petrophysical characterization of the critical zone. We assess the capabilities, strengths, and limitations of rock physics models and inversion methods in critical zone applications, illustrated with case studies from the Southern Sierra and Laramie Range, and show how the resulting quantitative estimates of petrophysical properties inform hydrogeological studies and reduce uncertainty in model predictions.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 临界带岩石物理学：模型、反演与解释

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何将岩石物理模型应用于关键带地下结构，以从地球物理数据中定量反演岩石物理性质？
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合评述地震、电法、电磁法和核磁共振法等近地表岩石物理模型及其反演方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩石物理模型结合反演可有效获取关键带孔隙度、矿物组成及流体饱和度等关键参数。
summary_bullets.innovation: 系统评估了岩石物理模型在关键带非饱和-饱和介质中的适用性、假设条件及不确定性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为关键带水文、地貌和生态过程研究提供了连接间接地球物理测量与直接水文地质参数的桥梁。

works.title: Au–Ag occurrence and Bi–Te redistribution in bornite-hosted exsolution microtextures from the Jiama deposit, Tibet, China
works.abstract: The Jiama porphyry–skarn system in the Gangdese belt, Tibet, hosts bornite-rich skarn ores with visible Au–Ag minerals and the newly recognized Bi-rich bornite-related mineral juxingite (Bi₆Cu₁₄₀Fe₃₀S₁₂₅). This study investigates the redistribution of Au–Ag–Te–Bi during the cooling of bornite-bearing Cu–Fe sulfides, using integrated microanalytical and nanoscale techniques. Two assemblages are identified: a Cu-rich bornite-I + digenite assemblage with wittichenite, and a bornite-II + juxingite + chalcopyrite assemblage. Matrix Au contents in the analyzed Cu–Fe sulfides are low, with quantifiable values generally ≤ 13 ppm, whereas Ag and Bi commonly reach concentrations of hundreds to thousands of ppm. In the bornite-I + digenite assemblage, ordered digenite-related domains exsolved coherently from bornite-I and locally transformed into anilite, producing Bi-rich segregation domains enriched in Ag, Au, and Te. In the bornite-II + juxingite + chalcopyrite assemblage, juxingite records Bi-rich ordering during coherent to semi-coherent exsolution. The concentric zoning of bornite-hosted telluride inclusions, from Au–Ag cores through hessite to Cu–Te-rich rims, records progressive Au–Ag–Te segregation and reorganization during cooling. These observations suggest different redistribution behaviors of Bi and Te during cooling: Bi was stabilized in juxingite and Bi-rich Ag–Au–Te-bearing segregation domains, whereas Te was concentrated in telluride-bearing domains closely associated with Au–Ag minerals. Thus, visible Au–Ag minerals at Jiama are interpreted to have formed, at least in part, through cooling-driven internal redistribution rather than solely by late-stage fluid overprinting. This finding suggests that cooling-driven internal redistribution may be an important control on visible Au–Ag mineralization in bornite-rich skarn and porphyry Cu–Au systems.
