summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于理解地幔组成、相变机制及深部地球动力学过程。

works.title: Subducting Slab Thermo‐Petrologic Structure and Intermediate‐Depth Supra‐Slab Earthquakes Beneath Southern Colombia
works.abstract: Abstract We develop 2‐D thermo‐petrologic models for two transects through southern Colombia and compare the model‐predicted temperature distributions and depths of slab dehydration with seismological observations. Along the northern transect, earthquakes occur above the relatively young subducting Nazca slab at 80–160‐km depths. However, these intermediate‐depth supraslab earthquakes are largely absent along the southern transect. Our thermo‐petrologic models indicate that the maximum depth of decoupling (MDD) between the subducting slab and the overriding mantle is anomalously deep, at ∼180‐ and ∼130‐km depths for the northern and southern transects, respectively, likely due to the presence of an accreted oceanic terrane. With these MDDs, the model‐predicted thermal fields result in slightly deeper peak dehydration in the subducting slab along the northern transect compared to the southern transect, affecting the distribution of slab‐derived fluids, which may explain their contrasting distributions of supraslab and intraslab seismicity and Vp/Vs ratios.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 哥伦比亚南部下方俯冲板片的热-岩石学结构与板片上覆中深源地震

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究哥伦比亚南部两条剖面中，板片热岩石结构如何控制中深源板上地震差异。
summary_bullets.methodology: 建立两条二维热—岩石学俯冲模型，并与地震分布、脱水深度及Vp/Vs观测对比。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 北段MDD更深且板片峰值脱水更深，导致流体分布差异并解释地震性与Vp/Vs不同。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出异常深的板片—地幔解耦深度，并将其与增生洋壳地体及地震差异联系起来。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带流体运移、地震成因及区域构造差异提供可检验的热岩石学框架。

works.title: Tracking Archean crustal evolution of the Zimbabwe Craton through U-Pb geochronology and Hf isotopes
works.abstract: The ancient history of the Earth is marked by pivotal times recorded in Precambrian terrains, providing crucial insight into the evolution of the crust-mantle system and the geodynamic processes operating in the evolving Earth. This research focuses on the Zimbabwe craton, an important ancient terrain where fundamental concepts of Archean tectonics were first defined and that remains largely uncharacterized by high-precision isotope studies. We integrate in-situ LA-ICPMS zircon U-Pb ages and Hf isotope compositions of magmatic samples and river sands to investigate the Paleo- and Meso-Neoarchean (∼3.6–3.3 Ga and ∼2.9–2.7 Ga) crustal evolution of the craton. Zircon U-Pb data from gneiss complexes and granites within the central part of the craton, which encompasses the Sebakwe proto-craton that experienced tectonic stability temporarily between 3.3 and 3.0 Ga ago, define a main magmatic event at 3.6–3.5 Ga and minor components at ∼3.3 Ga, ∼2.9 Ga, and 2.7 Ga. Outside of the central part of the craton within the Odzi-Mutare area the magmatic record is dominated by zircon U-Pb ages between 2.9 and 2.8 Ga. A similar age distribution is recorded by detrital zircon from modern sediments with age clusters in the Paleoarchean at 3.6–3.5 Ga and 3.4–3.3 Ga, with the latter being more prominent, and in the Meso-Neoarchean at 2.9–2.8 Ga and 2.6 Ga. The Paleoarchean magmatic components yield Hf isotope compositions within 4 epsilon units of CHUR (Ɛ Hf(3.6-3.3Ga) + 2 to –4), similar to the isotope compositions of detrital zircons (Ɛ Hf(3.6-3.3Ga) + 2 to –6). Meso-Neoarchean magmatic components yield Hf isotope compositions with Ɛ Hf(i) between CHUR and +2 at ∼2.9–2.8 Ga, while detrital zircons range from Ɛ Hf(i) + 4 to –9 at ∼2.9–2.6 Ga. Data from the Zimbabwe craton indicate crust formation in the Paleoarchean (3.6–3.3 Ga) that involved juvenile magma additions and a possible derivation from a ∼3.8 Ga chondritic source and craton-wide crust forming episodes between ∼2.9 and 2.6 Ga that involved crustal reworking in various degrees along with new additions of juvenile material. The Hf isotope record of Zimbabwe craton aligns with the global isotope record—with chondritic to sub-chondritic Hf isotope compositions at ∼3.7–3.6 Ga, the appearance of juvenile additions after ∼3.5 Ga, and mixing trends after ∼3.0 Ga—supporting formation of a long-lived depleted mantle reservoir after ∼3.6 Ga
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 通过 U-Pb 年代学和 Hf 同位素追踪津巴布韦克拉通太古宙地壳演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究津巴布韦克拉通太古宙地壳形成、演化及其壳幔过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩浆岩与河砂锆石LA-ICPMS U-Pb定年和Hf同位素原位分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 3.6–3.3Ga有早期地壳增生，2.9–2.6Ga发生广泛再造并伴随新增幼年物质。
summary_bullets.innovation: 同时整合基岩与现代碎屑锆石高精度年代学和Hf数据重建全克拉通演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为太古宙构造、壳幔演化及全球早期地球同位素对比提供关键约束。

works.title: The rate of mantle processing controls mantle-crust evolution
works.abstract: The formation and recycling of oceanic crust back into Earth’s mantle is the largest material flux on Earth. It determines the outgoing flux of incompatible elements into the oceanic, and ultimately, the continental crust, and thus controls the rate of incompatible element depletion of Earth’s mantle. We developed a five-reservoir box-model to investigate the Sm-Nd and Lu-Hf isotope evolution of Earth’s mantle and crust. The model includes an average mantle reservoir, an oceanic and continental crust reservoir, and two isolated reservoirs that store the recycled oceanic and/or continental crust before being recycled into and homogenized with the mantle reservoir. We evaluate the elemental mass fluxes needed to fit the Nd-Hf isotope ratios in the mantle and crust, with a particular focus on the effect of the mantle processing rate, which scales with the rate of oceanic crust formation, on mantle-crust evolution. We also assess the variable timescales for homogenization of the recycled crust within the mantle. The results show that basaltic crust generation causes moderate to extreme incompatible element depletion starting within the first 100′s of millions of years of Earth’s evolution, depending on how vigorously the Hadean mantle convected, and how effectively the recycled crust was homogenized with the mantle. According to our results, ca. 2.5–7.5% of the total mass of the mantle today is recycled crust. Intriguingly, this amount of recycled crust is comparable to the estimated mass of Large Low Shear Velocity Provinces (LLSVPs) above the core-mantle boundary. It is unlikely, however, that LLSVPs are entirely formed by recycled crust, because this amount of recycled crust contains up to 70% of the total mass of incompatible elements like Nd and Hf in the bulk silicate Earth. For more incompatible elements (e.g., La, Th, Ba), this mass fraction is even higher and results in near-total depletion of these elements in the peridotitic mantle. Hence, LLSVPs may not only consist of recycled crust and/or they are dynamic reservoirs whose fluctuating size (mass) is determined by the balance between the rate of the in- and outgoing mass fluxes
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地幔处理速率控制地幔—地壳演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究地幔处理速率如何控制地幔—地壳演化及Nd-Hf同位素分异。
summary_bullets.methodology: 作者建立五储库箱体模型，模拟Sm-Nd与Lu-Hf同位素及壳幔物质通量演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地幔处理速率与再循环均一化效率决定早期亏损强度，今地幔约含2.5–7.5%再循环地壳。
summary_bullets.innovation: 模型同时耦合多储库再循环、处理速率与均一化时间，定量约束壳幔演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解地球化学储库演化、LLSVP成因及不相容元素分布提供关键约束。

works.title: High‐Pressure Elasticity of CAS Phase and Its Implications for the Fate of Subducted Anorthosite Crust
works.abstract: Abstract The CAS phase (CaAl 4 Si 2 O 11 ) is a key phase formed in subducted silica‐alumina rich crustal and sedimentary materials under the mantle transition zone conditions. In this study, its elastic properties were investigated using first‐principles calculations up to 30 GPa. The obtained elastic moduli are: K S0 = 211.24(174) GPa and G 0 = 129.61(118) GPa, with pressure derivatives K S ′ = 4.33(13) and G ′ = 1.49(6). Based on these results and relevant mineral thermoelastic data, we simulated the density and seismic velocity profiles of subducted anorthosite crust. Our simulations reveal that anorthosite crust exhibits higher density and seismic velocities than pyrolite within the mantle transition zone. However, this relationship reverses when ringwoodite in pyrolite decomposes into bridgmanite and ferropericlase. The resulting buoyancy effects suggests that subducted anorthosite crust is likely trapped at the base of the mantle transition zone, which may contribute to the observed high‐velocity anomalies in this region.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: CAS 相的高压弹性及其对俯冲斜长岩质地壳归宿的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究CAS相高压弹性及俯冲斜长岩壳在地幔过渡带的命运。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用第一性原理计算CAS相至30GPa弹性，并模拟密度与地震波速剖面。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 斜长岩壳在过渡带较火成橄榄岩更致密更快，至底部后易受浮力滞留。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统给出CAS相高压弹性参数并用于约束斜长岩壳深部行为。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释过渡带底部高速异常及俯冲地壳归宿提供关键矿物物性依据。

works.title: Subduction modulated the long-term oxygenation of Earth’s surface
works.abstract: On Earth, atmospheric oxygen is inferred to have risen over three major intervals before reaching modern levels, with each interval having a profound impact on the evolution of the biosphere. However, the principal driver behind these stepwise increases remains elusive. Here, we compile metamorphic thermobaric ratios ( T / P ) through time and use them as a first-order, probabilistic proxy for the likelihood of “cold” subduction (i.e., with T / P –1 ) during secular cooling of Earth’s mantle. Then, we couple this tectonic forcing to biogeochemical modeling to test whether more efficient cold subduction may have enhanced the net transfer of reduced organic carbon and pyrite to Earth’s deep interior, thereby diminishing oxygen sinks and allowing surface oxygen levels to increase at geological timescales. Modeling results indicate that the progressive emergence of cold subduction could plausibly have contributed to the long-term oxygenation trajectory and associated secular trends in atmospheric carbon dioxide, seawater sulfate, sedimentary phosphorus, and marine redox conditions. Although the absolute magnitudes remain uncertain, the predicted trajectory of surface oxygenation is qualitatively consistent with the broad three-step pattern inferred from geochemical proxies. We propose that the progressive evolution of subduction may have been a key driver of long-term surface oxygenation, linking mantle cooling to the rise of conditions favorable for aerobic lifeforms.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 俯冲作用调控了地球表面长期氧化过程

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究俯冲演化是否驱动地表氧气的长期阶梯式上升。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整编变质T/P记录，并耦合构造约束与生物地球化学模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 冷俯冲增强或促进还原碳硫深埋，从而减少耗氧汇并提升氧水平。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以变质T/P概率代理冷俯冲，并连接地幔冷却与表层氧化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为解释地球氧化历史及宜居环境演化提供了跨圈层机制框架。

works.title: Geochemical and geochronological study on Neoarchean granitoids in the Yinshan block, North China craton, and its tectonic implications
works.abstract: The Neoarchean Era, a crucial period for the growth of global continental crust, witnessed two significant magmatic events at ca. 2.7 Ga and 2.6−2.5 Ga. These events are of vital importance for comprehending the tectonic regime of early Earth. However, there exists considerable controversy regarding this geodynamic regime. Hence, to address this scientific puzzle, we conducted comprehensive investigations into the geochronological, geochemical, and Nd-Hf isotopic compositions of newly identified Neoarchean granitoids in the Yinshan block of the North China craton. Zircon U-Pb dating reveals that these granitoids were formed at 2.55−2.52 Ga. Monzogranitic gneisses exhibit high SiO2 and Al2O3 contents, along with high Sr/Y and LaN/YbN ratios. Meanwhile, they have low MgO, Cr, and Ni contents. Furthermore, they present variable εHf(t) (+3.5 to +7.8) and εNd(t) (+1.27 to +5.08) values, suggesting that they were derived from partial melting of tonalite-trondhjemite-granodiorite rocks, which themselves were formed by partial melting of earlier thickened (mafic) lower crust under high-pressure conditions. The dioritic gneiss shows moderate SiO2 content with comparatively high MgO, Al2O3, and Cr contents and relatively low (La/Yb)N ratios, showing geochemical affinity to Archean sanukitoids. Concurrently, they exhibit variable εHf(t) (+3.2 to +9.0) and εNd(t) (+3.18 to +4.14) values. Therefore, these dioritic gneisses were derived from partial melting of thickened (mafic) lower crust induced by upwelling mantle−derived mafic magma, while incorporating minor mantle-derived materials. Combined with previous studies, we propose that during the Neoarchean Era, significant crustal accretion likely occurred in the Yinshan block of the North China craton due to a synergetic interaction between diminished activity of the mantle plume and the concurrent initiation of plate tectonics.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华北克拉通阴山地块新太古代花岗质岩石的地球化学与年代学研究及其构造意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨阴山地块2.55—2.52Ga花岗岩成因及新太古代构造机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合锆石U-Pb定年、地球化学分析及Nd-Hf同位素研究花岗岩。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 二长花岗质片麻岩源于TTG重熔，闪长质片麻岩源于下地壳熔融伴少量幔源加入。
summary_bullets.innovation: 新识别阴山地块新太古代花岗岩，并提出幔柱减弱与板块启动协同增生模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为华北克拉通早期大陆增生与早期地球动力学争议提供关键约束。

works.title: Channelized lithospheric erosion shapes the western North American craton margin
works.abstract: Modification of craton margins influences topographic evolution, magmatism, and mineralization, though the scales, geometries, and driving mechanisms remain debated. Previous studies of the western North American craton margin focused primarily on the Colorado Plateau, invoking hydration by the subducting slab as the controlling factor. Here we construct a high-resolution 3-D shear-wave velocity model of this margin using full-wave ambient noise tomography. Our model reveals a distinct inward retreat of the high-velocity cratonic keel with depth along the entire margin, not limited to the edge of the Colorado Plateau, as previously thought. Two laterally confined (150-200 km wide) low-velocity zones, reflecting channelized lithospheric weakening, extend 500-600 km into the craton, reaching the Black Hills in two opposite directions. Their spatial correlation with strong mantle flows suggests that this flow can erode the craton itself. Kimberlite and basalt geochemistry data suggest that this entire margin undergoes progressive and laterally heterogeneous lithospheric erosion and may eventually delaminate, facilitating progressive inward and lateral lithospheric thinning. This progressive erosion process drives the migration of volcanism and regional topographic uplifts. Our findings provide insights into the detailed characteristics and mechanisms of lithospheric modification at craton margins, shaping the long-term evolution of cratonic lithosphere. Craton margins, vital for mineral deposits and plate tectonics, are poorly understood. In this study, seismic imaging suggests mantle flow is eroding cratonic interiors through deep channels. This drives volcanism and uplift, redefining how continents evolve.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 通道化岩石圈侵蚀塑造了北美西部克拉通边缘

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究西北美克拉通边缘岩石圈侵蚀的范围、几何与驱动机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用全波环境噪声层析成像构建高分辨率三维剪切波速模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现地幔流经两条狭长弱化通道侵蚀克拉通，驱动火山迁移与隆升。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示沿整个边缘而非仅科罗拉多高原的通道化深部侵蚀格局。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解克拉通演化、岩浆作用、地形变化与成矿提供新机制约束。

works.title: Transition from subduction initiation to mature subduction: Geochemical evidence from Cenozoic mafic-felsic intrusive rocks, Central Philippines
works.abstract: The Philippine Mobile Belt records a complex Cenozoic subduction history, yet the subduction initiation processes during the Cenozoic and the characteristics of subsequent magmatic evolution remain poorly constrained. Here, we present the first integrated petrological, geochronological, and geochemical study of Eocene–Oligocene intrusive rocks from Bohol Island, central Philippines, including pyroxene diorite (44–41 Ma), medium-grained quartz diorite (39 Ma), and coarse-grained quartz diorite (35 Ma). The early pyroxene diorites are geochemically highly depleted with N-MORB-like REE distribution patterns but much lower REE contents, which resemble the geochemical characteristics of forearc basalts that are formed during the initial subduction stage. Furthermore, the enrichment of fluid-mobile elements such as high Pb, Sr, Rb, Ba, U, and K of these rocks suggests that more slab-derived fluids were added in the mantle source than those of forearc basalts. Combining the depleted Nd isotopes (ε Nd (t) = 8.28–9.16) but relatively enriched Sr isotopes ( 87 Sr/ 86 Sr i = 0.703366–0.704565), we suggest the mafic intrusive rocks were formed by partial melting of a depleted mantle with the contribution of fluids from the altered oceanic crust during the early-stage subduction after subduction initiation. Furthermore, whole-rock Pb ( 208 Pb/ 204 Pb i = 37.9770–38.2556; 207 Pb/ 204 Pb i = 15.4824–15.5659; 206 Pb/ 204 Pb i = 18.4860–18.5505) and Nd isotopes, and magmatic zircon Hf (ε Hf (t) = 10.7–18.8) isotopic compositions of these intrusive rocks reveal the contribution from fluids released by the subducted Pacific-type oceanic crust and partial melting of an Indian-type MORB mantle source. In contrast, the ca. 39–35 Ma quartz diorite suites are more felsic, showing more evolved geochemical characteristics, e.g., fractionated REE patterns and elevated Th contents, suggesting that more slab melt is added into the mantle. This indicates that the tectonic regime evolved from an incipient subduction to a more mature stage during this period. This study identified the magmatic records from incipient subduction to mature subduction in the Philippine Island Arc during the Cenozoic, providing further petrological and geochemical constraints on the Cenozoic subduction initiation and subsequent tectonic evolution on the western margin of the Philippine Sea Plate.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 从俯冲起始到成熟俯冲的转变：来自菲律宾中部新生代镁铁质—长英质侵入岩的地球化学证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究菲律宾中部新生代俯冲起始过程及其向成熟俯冲的岩浆演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合岩石学、年代学及全岩与锆石地球化学和同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 44–35 Ma侵入岩记录了由初始俯冲到成熟俯冲的阶段性转换。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统研究薄荷岛始新—渐新世侵入岩并重建俯冲演化序列。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为菲律宾海板块西缘新生代俯冲起始与构造演化提供关键约束。

works.title: Constraints from volcanic and subvolcanic magmatism on low-sulfidation epithermal mineralization in the Yanbian area, NE China
works.abstract: Low-sulfidation (LS) epithermal gold deposits are a significant type of global gold resource, typically exhibiting a close spatial and temporal relationship with volcanic and subvolcanic (hypabyssal porphyry) rocks. LS systems have been widely investigated; however, the genetic relationship between gold mineralization and multi-phase volcanism remains insufficiently constrained. Here, we investigate their links through an integrated geochronological, geochemical, and petrological study of Early Cretaceous volcanic (multi-cycle) and subvolcanic (single-cycle) suites and their genetic association to LS epithermal Au deposits (Ciweigou, Ganhegou, and Wufeng-Wuxingshan) in the Yanbian area, NE China. New and published geochronological data constrain the mineralizing event to 105−102 Ma (sulfide Rb-Sr, 102.6 ± 2.2 Ma; hydrothermal apatite U-Pb, 103.7 ± 8.7 Ma; and quartz fluid inclusions Ar-Ar, 104.1−103.3 Ma), during the intervals of multi-cycle volcanic eruptions (Tuntianying-II [TTY-II], 124−112 Ma; Jingouling-I [JGL-I], 112−108 Ma; Jingouling-II [JGL-II], 108−106 Ma; and Ciweigou, 102−96 Ma). The ore bodies of the three deposits mainly consist of quartz ± calcite veins hosted in Jingouling-II andesite and granodiorite porphyry. Subvolcanic dikes (granodiorite porphyry and diorite porphyry) of JGL-II and its ore bodies are controlled by the same syn-volcanic faults. Volcanic suites of each cycle exhibit similar geochemical characteristics, including enrichment in large ion lithophile elements (e.g., Rb, Ba, K) and depletion in high field strength elements (e.g., Nb, Ta, P, Ti). Zircon εHf(t) values (+6.7 to +12.8) and whole-rock εNd(t) values (−2.1 to +3.5) for JGL-I, JGL-II, and TTY-II volcanics, together with two-stage zircon Hf model ages of 900−550 Ma, indicate derivation from a depleted mantle−dominated source, primarily via partial melting of Neoproterozoic lower-crustal material with minor ancient crustal contamination. Calculations of zircon oxygen fugacity and water content reveal that the JGL-II volcanic suite exhibits higher oxygen fugacity (fayalite-magnetite-quartz buffer [FMQ] +0.9, on average) and higher water contents (H2O = 6.35 wt%, on average) than those of the JGL-I volcanic suite (FMQ +0.40, H2O = 5.63, on average), which favored the retention of gold in the residual melt. The volcanic faults developed during the intervals between the multi-stage volcanic eruptions further facilitated the formation of economic LS gold deposits from ore-forming fluids.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国东北延边地区火山及次火山岩浆作用对低硫化型浅成热液成矿的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨延边低硫化浅成金矿与多期火山—次火山岩浆活动的成因联系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合年代学、地球化学与岩石学，研究早白垩世火山—次火山岩及金矿。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成矿发生于105—102Ma，JGL-II高氧逸度高含水岩浆与同期断裂共同促成金富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立多旋回火山作用、次火山侵位与低硫化金成矿的时空—成因约束框架。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为浅成低硫化金矿找矿预测及岩浆—热液成矿机制研究提供关键约束。

works.title: A unified H2O–CO2 solubility–speciation model for magmatic liquids: Constraints on magma storage architecture in continental rifts
works.abstract: Quantifying H 2 O–CO 2 solubility and speciation in compositionally varied magmatic liquids is essential for interpreting melt-inclusion geobarometry and building realistic models of volatile degassing and isotopic fractionation in evolving magmatic systems. Yet most existing formulations remain fragmented across compositions and pressure–temperature conditions and rarely constrain solubility and speciation jointly. We present a unified H 2 O–CO 2 solubility–speciation model for fluid-saturated melts that explicitly incorporates molecular and ionic species dissolved in the melt. The model is calibrated using first-order thermodynamic principles and a joint inversion of solubility and speciation data compiled from 2090 experiments. The compilation spans melt types from carbonatites to pure silica liquids with 0–100 wt% SiO 2 , temperature of 660–1924 °C, pressures of 1 bar–6 GPa, and variable fluid compositions. Over this broad pressure–temperature–composition coverage, our calibration yields simple formulations that achieve higher predictive accuracy than previous models. We implement the model in the M2Fluid program with a graphical user interface to compute solubilities, isobars, isopleths, open- and closed-system degassing pathways, and fluid-saturation pressures. Applied to melt inclusions (natrocarbonatites to rhyolites) from 18 volcanoes across the East African Rift System, M2Fluid yields saturation pressures consistent with independent geophysical constraints on magma storage depths. The results further reveal that early-stage rifts host deeper, distributed reservoirs, mature rifts feature shallower, focused bodies, and triple junctions consistently host shallow, focused melt lenses. These patterns indicate strong coupling between magmatism and rift evolution, underscoring the role of magma storage and degassing in continental rift dynamics.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 适用于岩浆液体的统一 H2O–CO2 溶解度—赋存状态模型：对大陆裂谷中岩浆储存结构的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 解决不同成分岩浆中H2O-CO2溶解与形态统一定量难题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于热力学并联合反演2090组实验数据，建立统一模型并实现M2Fluid。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 模型较现有方法更准确，并揭示东非裂谷岩浆储存随裂谷演化而变。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次跨超宽成分温压范围联合约束H2O-CO2溶解度与物种形态。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为熔体包裹体测压、脱气模拟及大陆裂谷岩浆过程研究提供可靠工具。

works.title: Magnetotelluric Imaging of Slab Subduction and Rollback: Constraints on Mantle‐Driven Orogenic Evolution in the Jiangnan Orogen
works.abstract: Abstract The Neoproterozoic Jiangnan Orogen (JNO) in South China, a fundamental suture amalgamating the Yangtze and Cathaysia blocks, provides key insights into orogenic processes. However, poorly constrained lithospheric architecture in the central JNO sustains debates regarding the genesis of Neoproterozoic magmatism. Here, we present a high‐resolution, 3‐D resistivity model extending to 135 km depth, derived from broadband magnetotelluric data across the central JNO. The model reveals a predominantly resistive crust, disrupted by prominent conductors within the middle‐to‐lower crust beneath the Jiuling batholith. In the lithospheric mantle, a sharp electrical discontinuity coincides with the Early Neoproterozoic collisional zone (ca. 850–820 Ma), separating a resistive northwest from a conductive southeast. Integrated with geophysical and thermodynamic modeling, our findings suggest that present‐day partial melting beneath the Jiuling batholith is unlikely. Instead, the crustal conductors are interpreted as fossilized remnants of ancient tectono‐magmatic processes, likely representing trapped saline fluids or conductive mineral networks (e.g., graphite or sulfides). The upper mantle conductor is similarly interpreted as a fossilized subduction‐modified domain, potentially enriched in fluorine‐bearing phlogopite. Geodynamically, we propose that rollback and subsequent break‐off of the Paleo–South China Ocean slab induced substantial asthenospheric upwelling. This thermal perturbation drove extensive remelting of the thickened accretionary crust, generating the voluminous Jiuling granites. Our results delineate an integrated evolutionary pathway from oceanic subduction to mantle‐driven orogenesis, providing new insights into crustal maturation and Phanerozoic reactivation in ancient accretionary systems.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 板片俯冲与回撤的大地电磁成像：对江南造山带幔源驱动造山演化的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究江南造山带中央岩石圈结构及新元古代岩浆作用成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用宽频大地电磁数据反演135公里深度三维电阻率模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现碰撞带对应幔部电性突变，壳幔导体多为古构造岩浆遗存。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次精细刻画中央江南造山带深部电性并提出板片回撤-折断模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解古老增生造山带演化、壳幔相互作用及后期活化提供约束。

works.title: Hierarchy of processes for lithium mobility and enrichment in anatectic crust
works.abstract: Rare-metal granites and pegmatites are commonly interpreted to form either by extreme fractionation of granitic magmas or by low-degree crustal melting. Despite renewed interest in the anatectic model, the mechanisms governing Li release into melts and whether crustal melting alone can concentrate Li to ore-grade levels remain debated. Here, we present the first comprehensive database of Li concentrations in anatectic melt inclusions, providing direct constraints on the Li budget of primary melts formed under typical mid- to lower-crustal pressure-temperature (P-T) conditions and compositions. The dataset shows that Li release into anatectic melts is optimized during early, fluid-absent equilibrium melting of biotite at 750−800 °C in cordierite-free rocks, reaching up to ∼600 μg/g Li. Although these concentrations exceed those of S-type granites, they overlap the range of barren pegmatites, indicating that extreme fractionation is required to produce hard-rock Li ores. Integration of natural constraints with petrological modeling suggests that direct generation of ore-forming Li enrichments (3000−20,000 μg/g Li) requires strongly pre-enriched sources (600−2000 μg/g Li, i.e., >20 times ordinary crustal abundances). Given the lack of compelling evidence that such sedimentary sources retain Li anomalies up to anatectic conditions, the formation of hard-rock Li ores of anatectic origin likely reflects the convergence in space and time of favorable melting mechanisms, P-T conditions, and tectonic controls enabling rapid melt extraction and extensive fractionation—a convergence that, although rare, is preferentially achieved during the waning stages of orogenic cycles.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 深熔地壳中锂迁移与富集的过程层级

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨地壳深熔中锂如何进入熔体，以及仅靠深熔能否形成锂矿化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 建立深熔熔体包裹体锂含量数据库，并结合岩石学与热力学模拟分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 黑云母早期无流体平衡熔融最利于释锂，但矿石级富集仍需强分异与富锂源区。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统提供深熔原生熔体包裹体锂数据，直接约束初始熔体锂预算。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为稀有金属花岗岩和伟晶岩成因及锂矿找矿条件提供关键判据。

works.title: Timing and petrogenesis of multiple porphyritic intrusions in the Gümüşhane-Kızıltoprak Tepe prospect, NE Türkiye: implications for early Cenozoic post-subduction magmatism and metallogeny of the Eastern Sakarya Zone
works.abstract: This study presents new zircon U–Pb and molybdenite Re–Os geochronology, whole-rock geochemistry, Sr–Nd isotopes, and zircon Hf-isotope data from Eocene porphyritic intrusions at Kızıltoprak Tepe prospect in the Eastern Sakarya Zone (ESZ), NE Türkiye, to constrain the tectonomagmatic and metallogenic evolution of the ESZ. Field, drill-core, and petrographic observations define three intrusive stages: (i) pre-mineralization (barren) amphibole-bearing quartz diorite porphyries, (ii) syn-mineralization (mineralized) amphibole±clinopyroxene±biotite-bearing dioritic–andesitic to dacitic–rhyolitic porphyries, and (iii) post-mineralization plagioclase-phyric andesitic dikes. Zircon U–Pb ages indicate emplacement of barren porphyries at ~47 Ma and mineralized porphyries at ~45–40 Ma, whereas molybdenite Re–Os ages of ~43 and ~26 Ma record multi-stage hydrothermal mineralization. Geochemical and isotopic data indicate medium- to high-K calc-alkaline, metaluminous magmas derived from hybrid mantle–crust sources. Barren porphyries reflect stronger crustal contributions, whereas mineralized porphyries record increased juvenile mantle input, interpreted as enhanced magma recharge and mixing within a long-lived magmatic system favourable for ore formation. Elevated La/Yb, Gd/Yb, and Sm/Yb ratios support slab break-off of the northern Neotethyan lithosphere. These results highlight the critical role of magma evolution and source mixing in controlling porphyry–epithermal fertility and provide new constraints on early Cenozoic metallogenesis in the ESZ.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 土耳其东北部 Gümüşhane-Kızıltoprak Tepe 勘查区多期斑状侵入体的形成时代与岩石成因：对新生代早期俯冲后岩浆作用及东 Sakarya 带成矿作用的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究东萨卡里亚带Kızıltoprak Tepe斑岩侵入体的时代、成因及成矿构造背景。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合锆石U-Pb、辉钼矿Re-Os定年、全岩地球化学、Sr-Nd及锆石Hf同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别三期侵入与两期成矿，矿化岩浆更富幔源新生组分，利于斑岩-浅成低温成矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统整合年代学与多同位素证据，揭示岩浆混合与板片断离控制矿化肥力。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为早新生代后俯冲岩浆作用和东萨卡里亚带找矿评价提供关键时空与成因约束。

works.title: Water‐Facilitated Diamond Formation in the Deep Mantle
works.abstract: Abstract As critical volatiles in the deep Earth, carbon and water significantly modify magma activities and mantle dynamics. However, it remains highly controversial how hydrous minerals affect carbonate stability and carbon speciation in the deep mantle. Here, we synthesized 13 C‐enriched dolomite (MgCa(CO 3 ) 2 ) and experimentally investigated hydrous interactions with the synthetic carbonate at 14–120 GPa and 1,500–2,800 K. Compared to dry conditions with low decarbonation efficiency, hydrous environments significantly boost decarbonation rate, facilitating the formation of superdeep elemental carbon (i.e., graphite, diamond) under deep‐mantle conditions. In principle, water polarizes the CO 3 2− electron cloud, depleting electron density in C–O bonds and weakening their structural integrity. This water‐driven breakdown represents a viable mechanism for carbon mobilization and enrichment via mantle fluids. Our findings highlight tight coupling between deep water and carbon cycles, establishing a mechanistic framework for superdeep diamond genesis.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 水促进的深部地幔钻石形成

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究深部地幔中水如何影响碳酸盐稳定性、脱碳效率与金刚石形成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 合成13C富集白云石，并在14–120 GPa、1500–2800 K下开展含水高压高温实验。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 含水环境显著促进白云石脱碳，更易生成石墨和超深部金刚石。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出水极化CO3^2−并削弱C–O键的机制，解释深部元素碳形成。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为深部水—碳循环、碳迁移富集及超深部金刚石成因提供新框架。

works.title: Petrogenesis of Carboniferous ultradeep volcanic rocks in the central Junggar Basin: Constraints from zircon U-Pb geochronology and geochemical compositions
works.abstract: As a key geologic archive on the southwestern margin of the Central Asian orogenic belt, the Junggar Basin offers critical insights into the evolution of the Paleo-Asian Ocean and associated crustal growth processes. It also represents a primary target for China’s deep to ultradeep hydrocarbon exploration. This study presents an integrated investigation of Carboniferous volcanic rocks from the newly drilled ultradeep exploration well JG1 in the central Junggar Basin, combining zircon U-Pb geochronology, petrology, and geochemistry. The primary objective was to place robust constraints on the Carboniferous tectonic evolution of the Junggar Basin and to advance the exploration and development of ultradeep hydrocarbon reservoirs hosted in volcanic successions. Well−seismic correlation revealed two distinct shield volcanic edifices with multiple eruptive vents. Basalt and basaltic andesite dominate the early and late Carboniferous volcanic suites cored in well JG1. The early Carboniferous basalt samples yielded zircon U-Pb ages of 335 ± 3 Ma, while the late Carboniferous basaltic andesite samples yielded ages of 305 ± 2 Ma. Both volcanic rocks exhibit relative enrichment in light rare earth elements and Th, and significant depletion in Nb, Ta, and Ti, similar to those of mafic rocks derived from subduction-modified lithospheric mantle. The εNd(t) values of the early Carboniferous and late Carboniferous volcanic rocks are +6.9 to +8.0 and +6.7 to +7.0, respectively, indicating that they originated from a relatively depleted mantle. Both suites of samples have relatively constant Th/Nb and Th/Yb ratios and large variations in Ba/Th and Ba/La ratios, suggesting the involvement of aqueous fluids. Zircon Hf isotopic compositions and binary mixing modeling further indicate that the mantle sources for the late Carboniferous volcanic rocks experienced a greater degree of subduction-related metasomatism than those for early Carboniferous volcanics. In addition, both suites of volcanic rocks have relatively low Zn/Fet and Sm/Yb ratios, further indicating a mantle source dominated by spinel + minor garnet lherzolite. Synthesizing regional multidisciplinary datasets, we propose two distinct tectonic regimes for Carboniferous volcanic activity in the Junggar region: (1) Early Carboniferous magmatism developed in a continental arc environment driven by the northward subduction of the North Tianshan Ocean and (2) late Carboniferous volcanism formed in a continental intra-arc extensional environment triggered by slab rollback.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 准噶尔盆地中部石炭纪超深成因火山岩的岩石成因：来自锆石 U-Pb 年代学和地球化学组成的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘清准噶尔盆地石炭纪超深火山岩成因及其构造背景。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合JG1井钻探、井震对比、锆石U-Pb年代学、岩石学与地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 早晚石炭纪火山岩分别形成于大陆弧与弧内伸展环境，源区受俯冲流体交代。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次基于JG1超深井系统建立中央准噶尔石炭纪两期火山作用演化模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为古亚洲洋演化、陆壳生长及超深火山岩油气勘探提供关键约束。

works.title:
Unconventional water and hydrous mineral formation from dry minerals and H
                    <sub>2</sub>
                    fluids
works.abstract: Water availability in the lithosphere has been crucial to the geological evolution of Earth as well as the emergence and persistence of life. The global geological water cycle associated with plate tectonics has been understood as a system controlled by the presence of oxygen and hydrogen, either in fluids and melts or bound within mineral structures. However, recent work on H 2 production in the lithosphere indicates that a water mass equivalent to about 25 to 50% of global annual water inputs into subduction is converted to H 2 every year. This H 2 can be decoupled from the water cycle and potentially lost to space over geological timescales. Here, we show that the interaction of H 2 -rich fluids with oxygen-bearing minerals results in the formation of unconventional redox water. This influences the residence time of hydrogen in Earth’s interior and offers previously unidentified perspectives on how hydrous fluids, minerals, and melts may form in initially dry geological reservoirs.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 由干燥矿物与 H2 流体形成非常规水和含水矿物

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究H2流体与无水含氧矿物作用能否生成非常规水及含水矿物。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩石地球化学分析与高温高压反应实验，模拟H2-矿物流体相互作用。
summary_bullets.key_findings: H2可与含氧矿物发生氧化还原生成水，并促使干燥储库形成含水矿物与流体。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出独立于传统水循环的“氧化还原成水”机制，重估地球内部氢循环。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带水循环、深部储氢及早期地球宜居性提供新框架。

works.title: A glimpse into the pervasive subduction of the Proto-Tethys Ocean: Insights from Tashisayi mafic–ultramafic rocks, South Altyn
works.abstract: The South Altyn (SA) is a typical continental orogenic zone in northwest (NW) China. It records deep to ultra-deep subduction tectonics from the closure of the Proto-Tethys SA Ocean. Here we present field observations, chronological and geochemical analyses of basalt, gabbro and pyroxene peridotite in the SA Tashisayi area, providing constraints on the development of the SA Ocean. The basalt, formed at ∼ 534 Ma with variable zircon ε Hf (t) values (−6.3–5.2) and exhibits mid-ocean ridge basalt (MORB)-like geochemical characteristics. Its source likely interacted with a mantle plume or was derived from low-degree partial melting of an enriched mantle reservoir, suggesting a formation setting of initial oceanic basin expansion. The gabbro and pyroxene peridotite formed at 503–501 Ma and display ocean island basalt (OIB)-like geochemical signatures, indicating derivation from partial melting of asthenospheric garnet lherzolite and representing components of oceanic islands or seamounts. Integrating published geochemical and geochronological data from SA ophiolites and high- to ultrahigh- pressure (HP–UHP) rocks, the study constrains the duration of SA Ocean to ∼ 534–501 Ma. Moreover, spatiotemporal distribution of ophiolitic complexes within the NW China Proto-Tethys domain, together with related magmatic and metamorphic events, preliminarily suggest a unified subduction-driven back-arc cycle. Closure of the Proto-Tethys Ocean (rifted from Rodinia) formed Cambrian ophiolites and high-grade metamorphic rocks, while closure of back-arc basins produced Ordovician-Silurian counterparts.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 窥见原特提斯洋的广泛俯冲：来自南阿尔金塔什萨依镁铁质—超镁铁质岩石的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘清南阿尔金塔什萨依镁铁—超镁铁岩成因及原特提斯洋演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合野外调查、年代学测试与岩石地球化学综合分析玄武岩等样品。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 534Ma MORB型玄武岩与503–501Ma OIB型岩石记录南阿尔金洋盆扩张至俯冲闭合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以塔什萨依新数据联合区域资料，提出西北中国原特提斯统一俯冲驱动的弧后循环。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重建原特提斯洋时空演化及大陆造山过程提供关键年代与地球化学约束。

works.title: Depth‐Integrated Boron Inventories of Subducting Oceanic Plates: New Insights From Sediments and Altered Oceanic Crust at ODP Sites 1179, 1173, and DSDP Site 443
works.abstract: Abstract Boron (B) is a highly fluid‐mobile tracer of slab‐derived fluids in subduction zones; however, the quantitative comparisons of B input among different oceanic plates remain poorly constrained. Here, we present a geochemical study of the sediments, chert, and altered oceanic crust (AOC) from three DSDP/ODP Sites (443, 1173, and 1179) representing the young Philippine Sea and old Pacific Plates. Downhole variations in B showed that lithology and alteration history exert first‐order control on B distribution, with sediments containing B concentrations 1–2 orders of magnitude higher than basalts, and AOC showing variable enrichment related to plate age and alteration style. The chert at Site 1179 exhibited distinct geochemical characteristics and could not be treated as a low‐B sediment. By integrating the B concentrations with the lithological thicknesses and densities, we estimated the depth‐integrated boron inventories (B mass per unit area) for each plate. Total B inventories are highest at Site 1173 (∼162 kg m −2 ), followed by Site 443 (∼117 kg m −2 ) and Site 1179 (∼88 kg m −2 ), reflecting primarily differences in sediment thickness and lithological proportions rather than absolute concentrations. Although the AOC at Site 1179 showed elevated B, its contribution to slab B budgets was subordinate to that of the sediments. Slab B inventories did not show a simple correlation with the B content in the arc basalts. This decoupling supports models in which the thermal structure of the slab–mantle system and the depth of slab dehydration, rather than the initial slab inventory, govern B transfer to arc magma sources.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 俯冲大洋板片硼储量的深度积分清单：来自 ODP 1179、1173 号站位及 DSDP 443 号站位沉积物与蚀变洋壳的新认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 量化不同俯冲洋板块的硼输入差异及其控制因素。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析三处钻孔沉积物、燧石和蚀变洋壳硼地球化学并积分厚度密度。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 1173点硼总量最高，沉积物主导硼收支，板块硼库存与弧玄武岩硼不简单对应。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次综合沉积物、燧石与蚀变洋壳估算板块单位面积硼库存。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带流体来源、脱水过程及弧岩浆成因提供定量约束。

works.title: Poromechanical and Crack Evolution of Olivine‐Rich Rock During Serpentinization
works.abstract: Abstract Serpentinization alters the strength, fracture behavior, and rheology of ultramafic rocks, yet the coupled evolution of mineral reactions, cracking, and mechanical softening remains poorly constrained. We experimentally simulated serpentinization in dunite at 220°C and 15 MPa for 14 and 30 days and compared the reacted specimens with dry heat‐treated controls. Poromechanical tests and petrophysical measurements showed that serpentinization reduced the drained and unjacketed bulk moduli by up to 50% after 30 days. X‐ray diffraction (XRD) confirmed progressive olivine‐to‐serpentine replacement associated with solid‐volume expansion, while micro‐CT imaging captured reaction‐driven microcrack initiation and propagation. Crack‐density analysis showed that serpentinization generates microcracks but also partially seals larger features through secondary mineral growth, consistent with mercury intrusion porosimetry results. These results reveal a coupled process in which serpentinization simultaneously produces and infills fractures, reshaping the rock's mechanical framework. The findings clarify mechanisms governing seismic velocity reductions and hydromechanical weakening in serpentinizing mantle environments.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 富橄榄石岩石在蛇纹石化过程中的孔隙力学与裂纹演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究橄榄石富集岩蛇纹石化中反应、裂纹与力学弱化的耦合演化机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对纯橄岩进行高温高压蛇纹石化实验，并结合孔弹测试、XRD、微CT与压汞分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 蛇纹石化使体积模量最高降约50%，既诱发微裂纹也通过次生矿物部分封填裂隙。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将矿物反应、裂纹扩展与孔隙力学变化联动表征，揭示同步开裂与封填过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助解释地幔蛇纹石化区地震波速降低及流体-力学弱化机制。

works.title: Abrupt stream acidification and metal mobilization from permafrost degradation
works.abstract: Stream chemistry and ecosystem function are being transformed by abrupt acceleration of sulfide-mineral oxidation in permafrost-underlain headwater catchments of the Yukon and Mackenzie river basins—the two largest (sub)Arctic rivers in North America. Over the past decade, dozens of acidic (pH ~3) seepages have emerged in these headwaters, causing vegetation dieback and mobilizing metals at acutely toxic concentrations in receiving streams. Acid generated during sulfide-mineral oxidation also accelerates carbon dioxide emissions by driving carbonate-mineral dissolution. Downstream (sub)Arctic rivers show statistically significant multidecadal increases in sulfate concentrations, yet their metal concentrations remain stable because of attenuation and dilution processes. Headwater stream acidification signals a major perturbation in metal, carbon, and sulfur cycling linked to permafrost thaw with far-reaching consequences for water resources, northern communities, ecosystem health, and Earth’s biogeochemical future.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 永久冻土退化导致的河流突发性酸化与金属活化迁移

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究永久冻土退化是否导致源头溪流突发酸化及金属释放。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合十年头水区观测与育空、麦肯齐流域多年水化学统计分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 冻土融化促硫化物氧化，致强酸渗漏、金属毒化并加速二氧化碳释放。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将北极头水突发酸化与冻土退化驱动的硫、金属、碳循环扰动系统关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估北方水资源、生态风险及气候生物地球化学反馈提供关键证据。

works.title: Biotite/melt trace-element, lithium, and F-OH partitioning in silicate magmas
works.abstract: Abstract Biotite is a key hydrous silicate mineral in evolved magmatic systems, but its control on the behaviour of minor- and trace-elements, in particular Li, Nb, F and the REE is not well understood. Here, we quantify that control in sodic (per) alkaline H2O-saturated magmas with variable F-content through crystallisation experiments at 650–800°C and 200 MPa total pressure, at log fO2 ≈ FMQ +1. Biotite-glass pairs from tephriphonolite to phonolite fall deposits from Tenerife, Canary Islands, and a broad compilation from literature, complement our experimental data set. The new biotite-melt KdF/OH exchange coefficients are 2.9–47.0, typically 6.5–12.5, with minima for Al-rich, Mg-poor biotite. Nernst partition coefficients (D) silicate melt. D values for the large alkali metal ions Na–Cs define Onuma parabolae consistent with their incorporation on the biotite XIIA-site. Niobium partition coefficients are 0.1–1.2, and highest in Ti-rich biotite. The REE and actinides have D values less than 0.01 as their ionic radii fall between the size of the XIIA-site and VIM-sites of biotite. Our data, alongside a literature compilation, constrain empirical models that: (1) describe the exchange of F and OH between the silicate melt and the biotite W-site; (2) predict the partitioning of 1+ cations Li–Cs between silicate melt and the biotite A- and M-sites; (3) predict DNb values. The models use the major-element composition of biotite and silicate melt, pressure and temperature as input. Models are calibrated for use over a wide range of pressure, temperature and bulk composition (P-T-X) and can be used to interrogate biotite from natural systems to determine the composition of their source melt, or to forward model the trace-element evolution of mafic to evolved peralkaline syenite or peraluminous granite systems at upper-mantle to crustal pressures.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 硅酸盐岩浆中黑云母/熔体微量元素、锂及F-OH分配

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究黑云母在富水碱性硅酸盐岩浆中对Li、Nb、F及稀土分配的控制机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合650–800°C高压结晶实验、天然样品黑云母-熔体对比及文献数据建模。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 黑云母强烈分配F和部分碱金属，Nb中等相容，稀土与锕系元素高度不相容。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立F-OH交换、Li–Cs及Nb分配的经验模型，可由矿物与熔体主量成分预测。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 可反演源熔体组成并模拟碱性正长岩和花岗岩系统微量元素演化。

works.title: Scandium enrichment and release in pyroxene driven by melt and fluid metasomatism: Insights from East Gondwana, Antarctica
works.abstract: Abstract Mafic-ultramafic intrusions represent the primary source of global scandium (Sc) resources worldwide. These intrusions typically originate from fertile mantle sources in arc systems. While fluid- and melt-driven metasomatism are widely recognized as crucial mechanisms for Sc enrichment in the mantle, key aspects, including the precise composition of these metasomatic agents and their operating conditions remain poorly constrained. To address these knowledge gaps, we conducted a comprehensive investigation of Sc enrichment and release using clinopyroxene and orthopyroxene chemistry from charnockites and mafic granulites in East Antarctica’s Prydz Bay Belt. We reveal a multi-stage Sc evolution pathway within the accretionary belt that is initiated by dehydration of carbonate rocks, generating reduced carbonatite melts which trigger mantle metasomatism and significantly enrich Sc in the pyroxene. This enrichment is followed by post-peak decompression melting at 800-1000 °C and 6.5-12.8 kbar, which triggers metasomatism by an oxidized silicate melt, facilitating Sc release from both orthopyroxene and clinopyroxene. The subsequent arc accretion stage involves interaction with an external, oxidized, and likely phosphorus-rich aqueous fluid, leading to Sc release. The findings of Sc-rich pyroxene in mafic granulite and charnockite, together with the presence of CO₂-rich fluid inclusions in East Gondwana (Antarctica), collectively indicate that scandium enrichment may be a regional event. This study provides further implications for the exploration of Sc deposits in metamorphic rocks.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 熔体和流体交代作用驱动的辉石中钪富集与释放：来自东冈瓦纳南极洲的认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 解析东冈瓦纳地幔中Sc富集与释放的交代介质及条件。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析东南极麻粒岩和紫苏花岗岩中单斜辉石、斜方辉石地球化学。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 碳酸岩熔体先促Sc富集，后期氧化硅酸盐熔体与富磷流体促其释放。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出Sc在增生带经历多阶段演化，并限定关键温压与氧化还原环境。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为变质岩型Sc找矿及理解弧环境地幔交代过程提供新依据。

works.title: Carbonate recycling during intracontinental lithospheric extension recorded by Zn-Sr-Nd isotopes in an alkaline complex
works.abstract: The subcontinental lithospheric mantle (SCLM) represents a significant carbon reservoir, releasing CO2 through continental rift systems and impacting climate. However, the processes of carbonate recycling in the SCLM remain uncertain. Here we present Zn-Sr-Nd isotopes and bulk elemental compositions for the Late Cretaceous Gejiu alkaline complex, Southwest China. The monzogabbros exhibit low SiO2 and high CaO, MgO, Ba, and Sr contents, together with enriched Sr-Nd isotopes [initial 87Sr/86Sr = 0.7100−0.7110; εNd(t) = −6.8 to −6.5], indicating derivation from a metasomatized SCLM. Although their mid-oceanic-ridge basalt−like δ66Zn (0.25 ± 0.02‰) values are consistent with an unmodified mantle source, the high Zr and Hf contents, elevated Th/Nb (0.48−0.83) and Ba/Th (87.3−250) ratios, and low Ti/Eu ratios collectively suggest mantle metasomatism by “ghost-like,” carbonate-bearing sediment-derived fluids. The monzonites display geochemical and isotopic affinities similar to those of the monzogabbros (δ66Zn = 0.25‰ ± 0.03‰), supporting a cogenetic origin. The nepheline syenite exhibits extremely high K2O, Na2O, and light rare earth element contents, elevated La/Yb and Sm/Yb ratios, and enriched Sr-Nd isotopes [initial 87Sr/86Sr = 0.7097−0.7101; εNd(t) = −7.5 to −6.7], consistent with derivation from a metasomatized SCLM source. However, their heavy and variable δ66Zn values (0.25‰−0.39‰), together with high Th/Ta (29.0−69.4) ratios and positive Gd anomalies, are attributed to the injection of ∼5%−10% carbonated silicate melt. These results record a considerable carbonate signature in the petrogenesis of the Gejiu alkaline complex. Combined with the regional geology, these carbonate-bearing sediments could have been introduced into the SCLM during Paleo-Tethys subduction, after which the heterogeneous carbonated SCLM was remobilized during Late Cretaceous intracontinental extension. This study demonstrates that intraplate alkaline magmatism can effectively remobilize ancient, subduction-introduced carbonate in the SCLM, highlighting its critical role in carbon recycling over long-term geodynamic processes.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 陆内岩石圈伸展过程中碳酸盐再循环：来自碱性杂岩体 Zn-Sr-Nd 同位素的记录

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨陆内伸展时SCLM中碳酸盐如何被再循环并触发碱性岩浆作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析个旧晚白垩世碱性杂岩的Zn-Sr-Nd同位素及全岩主微量元素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆源于受沉积物碳酸盐交代的SCLM，伸展期重活化并释放古老碳信号。
summary_bullets.innovation: 联合Zn-Sr-Nd同位素识别隐性碳酸盐交代与约5%–10%碳酸化硅酸盐熔体注入。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲碳长期储存、陆内裂谷脱气及深部碳循环提供关键证据。

works.title: Contrasting behavior of platinum-group elements and Au-Cu during mantle melting and refertilization: Implications for lithospheric metal fertility
works.abstract: Mounting evidence highlights the critical role of silicate-melt−mediated refertilization in lithospheric evolution, yet chalcophile element behavior during this process remains contentious. Integrating Pyrenean peridotite geochemistry (of the Lherz massif) with quantitative modeling reveals that platinum-group elements (PGEs), due to their extreme sulfide compatibility, are primarily controlled by initial partial melting, and largely unaffected (or net addition strictly localized at the reaction interface) by refertilization. Conversely, moderately incompatible Cu and Au are systematically enriched overall in the mantle column during refertilization. This decoupling is globally corroborated, where pervasive Au-Cu enrichment characterizes both subcontinental lithospheric mantle (SCLM) and oceanic lithospheric mantle (OLM), while systematic platinum-palladium depletion in SCLM versus primitive mantle−like ratios in OLM reflect distinct sulfide exhaustion during their partial melting. Crucially, the eastern North China craton exemplifies how extensive refertilization transforms ancient, barren SCLM into a fertile Au-Cu and volatile-rich source, directly supplying the ingredients for giant Au deposits. This provides a quantitative framework linking mantle processes to lithospheric metal fertility.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 铂族元素与 Au-Cu 在地幔熔融和再富集过程中的差异性行为：对岩石圈金属富集潜力的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究地幔熔融与再富集过程中PGEs及Au-Cu的分异机制及其对岩石圈成矿性的影响。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合比利牛斯Lherz橄榄岩地球化学数据与定量模拟，并进行全球对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: PGEs主要受初始部分熔融控制，Au-Cu则在再富集中普遍富集，二者明显解耦。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出熔融—再富集控制金属丰度的定量框架，解释不同岩石圈地幔金属肥力差异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解岩石圈金属来源与巨型金矿形成提供机制依据和找矿预测思路。

works.title: The global distribution of CO2-rich magmas is determined by lithospheric thickness
works.abstract: Abstract Metasomatized lithospheric mantle plays a critical role in the petrogenesis of CO 2 -rich magmas, which are important hosts of rare-earth element deposits. However, the relationship between the structure of the lithosphere and the global distribution of CO 2 -rich magmas remains poorly quantified. Here we analyse the locations of young ( 2 -rich silicate magmas and magmatic carbonatites in conjunction with upper-mantle shear-wave velocity anomalies and lithospheric thickness estimates. Our results document systematic increases in lithospheric thickness with estimated magma CO 2 content from basanites ( 2 ), which erupt through seismically slow and thin non-cratonic lithosphere, to nephelinites, melilitites and ultramafic lamprophyres, which occur within progressively faster, thicker lithosphere and, finally, to lamproites and kimberlites ( 2 ), which are emplaced on thick cratonic lithosphere. Carbonatites are associated with lithospheric thicknesses similar to those of nephelinites, melilitites and ultramafic lamprophyres, implying the derivation of carbonatites from these mafic CO 2 -rich silicate magmas via liquid immiscibility and/or fractional crystallization. We illustrate our lithospheric thickness–magma type relationship using Cretaceous–Pleistocene alkaline magmatism across western North America, ultimately demonstrating how lithospheric thickness controls the global occurrence of CO 2 -rich magmas and, consequently, their associated rare-earth element deposits.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 全球富 CO2 岩浆的分布受岩石圈厚度控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究岩石圈厚度如何控制富CO2岩浆的全球分布及成因差异。
summary_bullets.methodology: 联合年轻富CO2岩浆位置、上地幔剪切波异常与岩石圈厚度进行全球对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩石圈越厚，岩浆CO2越高；碳酸岩与中高厚度岩石圈上的镁铁质富CO2岩浆密切相关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统量化岩石圈厚度、地震结构与富CO2岩浆类型之间的全球对应关系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解稀土矿床成因与预测富CO2岩浆及相关资源分布提供关键地球动力学依据。

works.title: Secular Evolution of Mantle Sulfur Isotopes Since the Archean
works.abstract: Abstract Sulfur isotopes in mantle plume‐derived magmas show heterogeneities attributed to recycling of material from the Earth's surface. The sedimentary sulfur isotope record exhibits dramatic temporal variations over Earth history, raising the question of whether its secular evolution is echoed in mantle plume‐derived magmas. We present new secondary ion mass spectrometry and X‐ray absorption near‐edge structure measurements of δ 34 S and Fe 3+ /ΣFe in naturally glassy melt inclusions from the 2.7 Ga Belingwe komatiites. We find that δ 34 S of Belingwe melt inclusions is relatively homogeneous (+3.2 ± 0.9) and elevated relative to the depleted upper mantle. We evaluate explanations for elevated magmatic δ 34 S including degassing, sulfide fractionation, assimilation, subduction‐like processes, and mantle recycling. We find no evidence for significant sulfur isotope fractionation via degassing or sulfide saturation. The elevated δ 34 S in the Belingwe komatiites could reflect late‐stage assimilation of sediments or seawater. Alternatively, Belingwe komatiites may have formed in a subduction‐like setting, as modern arcs display a bias toward positive δ 34 S. However, we find these scenarios less favorable. Instead, our preferred interpretation is that elevated δ 34 S was supplied to the komatiite mantle source via recycled lithologies such as sediments, altered oceanic crust, and/or pyroxenite. Combined with δ 34 S data from mantle plume‐derived magmas spanning a wide age range, our results resemble the secular evolution of δ 34 S in surface reservoirs. We suggest that the δ 34 S record in mantle plume‐derived magmas may echo secular evolution in the surficial sulfur reservoir with a delay of several hundred million years, linking Earth's surface and interior sulfur cycles.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 太古宙以来地幔硫同位素的长期演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究地幔柱岩浆硫同位素是否记录地表硫库的长期演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定2.7Ga Belingwe科马提岩熔体包裹体的δ34S与Fe3+/ΣFe，并比较多种成因机制。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 样品δ34S较均一且偏高，最可能源于再循环表层物质进入地幔源区。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将太古代包裹体原位硫同位素数据与地质时期地幔柱记录整合，提出存在时间滞后响应。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究连接地表与地幔硫循环，为理解深部再循环和地球长期演化提供约束。

works.title: Neglected shoreward reintroduction of pre-aged sedimentary organic carbon in a large river- and tide-dominated marginal sea
works.abstract: The coastal to inner-shelf muddy belt and offshore tidal sand ridges of the East China Sea (ECS) constitute a coupled sedimentary pattern during the postglacial deposition, challenging the prevailing paradigm of seaward, unidirectional dispersal of sedimentary organic carbon (OC) in coastal to shelf regions worldwide. Here we investigate characteristics and temporal heterogeneity of diverse sedimentary OC in specific depositional environments during the past 14 kyr based on dual carbon isotopes (13C and 14C) and multi-biomarkers in sediment core ECS-1302 of the muddy belt. Sedimentary OC-14C ages deviated anomalously from their depositional ages during the postglacial transgression, alongside a decreasing proportion of terrestrial OC, supporting energetic forcing reintroduced pre-aged OC from offshore into coastal to inner-shelf areas, associating with shoreward, fine-grained sediment reworking of the paleo-Yangtze River estuary. This study underscores dual-directional cycles of sedimentary OC should be fully considered in exploring carbon cycle for large river- and tide-dominated marginal seas. Sedimentary organic carbon ages deviated from depositional ages, with falling terrestrial organic carbon fraction, suggesting energetic forcing reintroduced pre-aged organic carbon from offshore into coastal to inner-shelf areas, based on East China Sea coastal muddy sediment core analysis.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 在一个大型河流与潮汐共同主导的边缘海中，前期老化沉积有机碳向岸再输入这一被忽视的过程

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究东海陆架有机碳是否仅向海单向输运及其年代异常成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于ECS-1302岩芯，结合双碳同位素与多种生物标志物重建14千年来有机碳来源。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 后冰期海侵期离岸老化有机碳在动力作用下向岸再输入，且陆源有机碳占比下降。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出大型河流—潮控边缘海存在有机碳离岸与向岸并存的双向循环。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究修正边缘海碳输运范式，为沉积碳循环与碳汇评估提供新依据。

works.title: Linking the rheology of Himalayan leucogranites to formation of lithium pegmatites
works.abstract: As one of the world’s largest extensional structures, the South Tibetan Detachment System (STDS) is spatially and temporally associated with Himalayan leucogranites and spodumene pegmatites. This study investigates variably deformed leucogranites near the Qiongjiagang lithium deposit in southern Tibet (Everest/Himalaya region) using field observations, mineral crystallographic preferred orientations, rheological parameters, and zircon geochronology. Key findings include the following: (1) Leucogranites within the STDS record systematically variable strain, with weakly deformed bodies preserving primary magmatic fabrics and hosting abundant spodumene pegmatites at higher structural levels. (2) Zircons within strongly deformed leucogranites exhibit significant fluid alteration. Weakly modified zircons yield ages of ca. 24 Ma, while hydrothermally altered zircons date to ca. 18 Ma. (3) Quantitative deformation analysis reveals that strongly deformed leucogranites record deformation temperatures of 450−590 °C, differential stresses of ∼36.5−75.2 MPa, and strain rates of ∼10−13 s−1 to 10−12 s−1, whereas weakly deformed leucogranites record higher temperatures (∼720 °C) and strain rates (∼10−10 s−1) under comparable stress conditions. (4) Comparative rheological analysis reveals that spodumene pegmatite emplacement requires specific mechanical conditions—a differential stress threshold of 26 MPa and strain rates of ∼10−10 s−1. Through a case study of the Qiongjiagang lithium deposit, this work elucidates the role of the STDS in leucogranite emplacement and evolution and provides quantitative constraints on the rheological conditions that facilitate the formation of spodumene pegmatites within the STDS.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 将喜马拉雅淡色花岗岩的流变学与锂伟晶岩的形成联系起来

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨喜马拉雅淡色花岗岩流变性如何控制锂辉石伟晶岩形成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合野外观察、矿物组构、流变学定量分析与锆石年代学研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: STDS内应变分带明显，伟晶岩形成受约26 MPa与10^-10 s^-1条件控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次定量建立淡色花岗岩变形流变条件与锂伟晶岩成矿的联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解STDS成岩成矿耦合及锂资源找矿提供关键约束。

works.title: Paleo–salt water dominates coastal aquifer salinization: A continental-scale study in China
works.abstract: Seawater intrusion poses a major threat to freshwater resources in coastal aquifers worldwide. In China alone, these types of aquifers provide a vital groundwater source for nearly 400 million people. Whereas modern seawater intrusion is often attributed to human activities and climate change, the role of paleo–salt water remains poorly quantified. This continental-scale investigation of seawater intrusion in China reveals that paleo–salt water, not modern seawater, dominates salinity patterns in large sedimentary basins. Analysis of over 2100 water samples shows a strong correlation between intrusion and tectonic subsidence zones, with paleo–salt water affecting 66% of the observed salinized areas. In northern coastal plains, paleo–salt water trapped in confined aquifers is characterized by salinity levels exceeding 144.6 grams per liter, whereas modern seawater intrusion (34%) occurs in hilly regions with thinner sediments. Isotopic signatures (δ 18 O) trace paleo–salt water intrusion to Quaternary sea level changes. These findings improve seawater intrusion source identification and inform global salinity management.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 古盐水主导沿海含水层盐渍化：中国大陆尺度研究

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究中国沿海含水层盐化究竟由古咸水还是现代海水入侵主导。
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于全国2100余个水样、盐度同位素及构造沉降分布开展综合分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 大型沉积盆地盐化以古咸水主导，占66%，现代海水入侵占34%。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在中国大陆尺度定量区分古咸水与现代海水对盐化的贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助于准确识别盐化来源，为沿海地下水保护与治理提供依据。

works.title: Micritization mechanism in penecontemporaneous carbonate rocks: coupled C − Ca cycles and constraints from diagenetic environments
works.abstract: While micritization in marine carbonate sediments is traditionally attributed to microbial endolithic boring, the mechanisms governing abiotic micritization driven by meteoric fluids remain poorly constrained. Furthermore, separating these early diagenetic signals from subsequent burial overprints in ancient geological records has proven persistently challenging. To resolve this ambiguity, we target a succession of shallow-marine carbonates from an isolated atoll in the southern South China Sea devoid of burial diagenetic alteration. By integrating high-resolution petrography, micro-domain trace element geochemistry, and non-traditional calcium state isotope ( δ 44/40 Ca) systematics, we reconstruct the trajectory of mineral recrystallization within the meteoric diagenetic environment. Our results demonstrate that the intensity and textural characteristics of micritization are strictly governed by hydrogeochemical gradients across the meteoric vadose-hyporheic transition. In the gravity-driven vadose zone, rapid fluid flux promotes the flushing of solutes, leading to transport-controlled congruent dissolution and the formation of fabric-selective moldic porosity. Conversely, in the hyporheic zone where fluid velocity decreases significantly, solute transport shifts from advection dominance to diffusion dominance. Here, mineral transformation proceeds via the interface-coupled dissolution-precipitation mechanism, generating intense micritization characterized by optical darkening and abundant microporosity. Coupled C-Ca isotope systematics further constrain these kinetic processes. Micritized components exhibit synchronous depletions in δ 13 C values and Sr/Ca ratios, fingerprints of an open system buffered by soil-derived meteoric fluids. Crucially, micritized components record a significant negative δ 44/40 Ca excursion of ∼ 0.4‰. Specifically, micrite-dominated fabrics exhibit δ 44/40 Ca values 0.57‰ lower than grain-supported counterparts. This reveals a kinetic isotope effect where light 40 Ca is preferentially incorporated during the rapid crystallization associated with abiotic micritization. The proposed coupled hydrodynamic-geochemical model establishes that meteoric-controlled micritization is a fundamental abiotic process during early diagenesis. Furthermore, we suggest δ 44/40 Ca as a robust geochemical proxy for distinguishing kinetically controlled rapid precipitation from thermodynamically controlled equilibrium recrystallization
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 准同生碳酸盐岩的泥晶化机制：C−Ca循环耦合及成岩环境约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 阐明大气淡水驱动微晶化机制及其与埋藏改造的区分。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合薄片岩相、微区元素地球化学及δ44/40Ca同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 渗流梯度控制微晶化：渗流带溶解，潜流带扩散致强微晶化与轻Ca富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出水动力—地球化学耦合模型，并验证δ44/40Ca可示踪快速动力学沉淀。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别早期成岩环境与无机微晶化过程提供新的稳健地球化学指标。

works.title: Kinematic inversion of the Xianshuihe-Xiaojiang fault system from Oligocene shortening to late Miocene left-lateral slip in the southeastern Tibetan Plateau
works.abstract: Several continental-scale strike-slip faults in the southeastern Tibetan Plateau developed during the Cenozoic eastward growth of the plateau. However, geodynamic mechanisms driving plateau growth and their relationship to intracontinental deformation remain poorly resolved, primarily because the brittle deformation histories of major fault systems—such as the >1000-km-long Xianshuihe-Xiaojiang (XSH-XJ) fault system—are inadequately constrained and difficult to reconstruct. To address this gap, we performed thermochronological analyses of samples from the highest mountains (i.e., Jiaozi Shan and Dahaicao Shan) flanking the XJ segment of the fault system, including apatite (U-Th)/He, apatite fission track, and zircon (U-Th)/He dating, complemented by thermal history modeling. Results reveal differential exhumation and cooling across the XJ fault between ca. 26 Ma and 22 Ma, with greater cooling in the Jiaozi Shan (30−50 °C) than the Dahaicao Shan (<5 °C), implying an exhumation offset of 1−2 km. Since ca. 13 Ma, rapid cooling (50−70 °C) has occurred synchronously on both sides of the XJ fault, corresponding to ∼2 km of accelerated exhumation. Together with structural analyses, it is interpreted that the two phases of exhumation and cooling were kinematically linked to a transition of deformation from late Oligocene east-vergent thrusting to late Miocene left-slip faulting. Integrating structural and geophysical data along the XSH-XJ fault system, we propose that the Oligocene shortening caused crustal thickening and in situ anatexis. These processes produced thermally and mechanically weakened lower crust, facilitating the late Miocene initiation of left-lateral slip. Our work highlights a dynamic linkage between the two phases of deformation, providing new insights into how kinematic inversions of major faults operate in the southeastern Tibetan Plateau.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 藏东南鲜水河—小江断裂系统的运动学反转：从渐新世挤压缩短到晚中新世左旋走滑

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨鲜水河—小江断裂系从渐新世挤压到晚中新世左旋走滑的转换机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用磷灰石与锆石低温热年代学、热史模拟及构造地质综合分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 26至22Ma断裂两侧差异剥露明显，13Ma后两侧同步快速冷却并转为左旋走滑。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统揭示该千公里级断裂系由逆冲到走滑的运动学反转及其深部成因。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解青藏高原东南缘扩展、地壳弱化与陆内变形耦合提供关键约束。

works.title: Isotopic evidence for a long-lived Hadean basaltic–andesitic precursor to the Acasta Gneiss Complex, Canada
works.abstract: Understanding the genesis and composition of Earth’s earliest crust is critical for reconstructing the planet’s early differentiation and geodynamic evolution. However, direct evidence from the Hadean (>4.0 Ga) remains elusive owing to the near-complete absence of preserved rocks from that eon. Paleoarchean layered gneisses from the Acasta Gneiss Complex (AGC, Northwest Territories, Canada) preserve isotope signatures inherited from a Hadean crustal precursor. To investigate the petrogenesis of this precursor, whole-rock 146,147 Sm‒ 142,143 Nd data were obtained from a suite of samples cut parallel to the compositional layering of the gneiss to obtain chemically and mineralogically diverse rock slices. Additional analyses, including whole-rock major and trace element compositions, 176 Lu‒ 176 Hf isotope systematics, and apatite ( 147 Sm‒ 143 Nd and 176 Lu‒ 176 Hf) and zircon (U‒Pb) geochronology, were conducted to evaluate the preservation of primary isotope systematics and reconstruct the evolutionary history of the AGC.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 同位素证据表明加拿大Acasta Gneiss Complex存在长期存续的冥古宙玄武质—安山质前驱体

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究Acasta片麻岩复合体是否继承并保存冥古宙早期地壳前体的成因与组成信息。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合全岩Sm-Nd、Lu-Hf同位素及主微量元素，并用磷灰石和锆石定年重建演化史。
summary_bullets.key_findings: AGC保留冥古宙玄武质—安山质前体的同位素证据，且该前体长期存续并影响后期地壳。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以平行条带多切片取样整合多同位素与年代学，系统检验原始同位素信息保存性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重建冥古宙地壳形成、早期地幔分异及地球动力学演化提供关键约束。

works.title: Seismic radial anisotropy beneath Mount Etna (Sicily, Italy) generated by deep mantle upwelling
works.abstract: The central Mediterranean provides a key setting to investigate links between mantle upwelling, subduction, and arc volcanism. In southern Italy, rapid slab retreat and segmentation of the Calabrian subduction zone favor mantle flow, yet direct seismic evidence for mantle upwelling remains scarce. Here we present 3-D radial anisotropic tomography of the Calabrian subduction zone, derived from joint inversion of local and teleseismic traveltime data. Our results show a pronounced low-velocity (low-V) anomaly beneath Mount Etna (Sicily, Italy), located at the Ionian slab edge and connected to a broader low-V zone beneath the northeastern African margin. The anomaly exhibits negative radial anisotropy, consistent with vertical mantle flow, but its relatively weak magnitude suggests a waning upwelling flux. This feature extends at least below the mantle transition zone, favoring a contribution from the lower mantle. Our findings provide new seismic constraints on the mantle source of Etna and its geodynamic links to subduction processes.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 深部地幔上涌作用形成的埃特纳火山（意大利西西里）下方地震径向各向异性

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨埃特纳火山下方地幔上涌与俯冲作用的动力学联系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用局地与远震走时联合反演，开展三维径向各向异性层析成像。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 埃特纳下方存在延至转换带以下的低速异常，指示较弱垂向地幔上涌。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以三维径向各向异性证据约束埃特纳深部地幔上涌及其下地幔来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带火山成因、地幔流动及地中海构造演化提供关键地震约束。

works.title: Subduction legacies in the mantle transition zone modulate intraplate oceanic volcanism
works.abstract: Abstract How oceanic crust forms and intraplate volcanism arises remains central to resolving the mechanisms driving Earth’s dynamic evolution. Anomalously thick oceanic crust is conventionally attributed to thermal mantle plumes, yet large igneous provinces such as the Azores Plateau, with its 8–30 km thick crust, dispersed volcanism, and distinctive water-rich geochemical signatures, challenge this paradigm. Here we use geodynamic numerical models to show that a migrating ridge over a locally hydrated layer (0.1–0.4 wt.% H₂O), generated by dehydration of the Mantle Transition Zone (MTZ), can trigger upwelling and melting sufficient to produce a 10–20 km-thick crust. This mechanism accounts for the plateau’s anomalous crustal thickness, long-lived volcanism, and volatile-rich mantle source. We propose that recycled water, a subduction legacy stored in the MTZ, acts as a primary driver of intraplate volcanism, providing an alternative to the classical stationary mantle plume model. This mechanism may also help explain the widespread contamination of large-scale upper mantle domains by subduction-related fluid signatures, as in the DUPAL and South Atlantic domains.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 地幔过渡带中的俯冲遗迹调制板内大洋火山活动

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究异常厚洋壳与板内洋岛火山活动的成因机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用地球动力学数值模拟研究含水地幔过渡带与洋脊迁移耦合。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 过渡带脱水形成局部含水层，可驱动上涌熔融并形成10–20公里厚洋壳。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出俯冲遗留水循环可替代经典地幔柱解释板内火山活动。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解大火成岩省、挥发分来源及上地幔化学异常提供新框架。

works.title: Temperature and Dynamic Effects of the Plate Boundary Shear Zone During Subduction
works.abstract: Abstract The plate boundary in a subduction zone is a narrow, weak shear zone, which transitions from brittle to ductile deformation with increasing depth. The exhumed rock record documents the important role of metamorphism, fluid release, and mixing of compositionally distinct materials in controlling the physical properties of the shear zone. The geometry and rheology of the shear zone are also key parameters affecting model predictions of subduction kinematics, including slab sinking and trench retreat. Furthermore, the shear zone modulates mantle wedge flow and thermal structure through the depth of flow field decoupling along the slab interface. However, previous studies have modeled the shear zone either as a weak layer or a slab surface boundary condition with a fixed cutoff depth. These simplifications fail to explicitly link the properties and depth extent of the shear zone to metamorphic and deformational processes occurring in the shear zone. Here, we show that linking the viscosity variation in the shear zone to the basalt‐eclogite transition provides a physical explanation for the inferred globally constant mantle decoupling depth and naturally leads to self‐sustained, one‐sided subduction. In addition, we find that feedback between shallow slab deflection and the shear zone can lead to elevated trench retreat rates. Using an analytic solution, we also show that such feedback controls shallow slab thermal structures through dynamically determined decoupling depths. The model results predict that near the shallow decoupling depth, thermal conditions near the slab surface are favorable for melting of crustal material under moderately wet conditions.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 俯冲过程中板块边界剪切带的温度效应与动力学效应

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲带板块边界剪切带的温度、流变与深度范围如何控制俯冲动力学。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合数值模拟与解析解，将剪切带黏度变化与玄武岩—榴辉岩相变相联系。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 相变可解释近全球一致的地幔解耦深度，并促进单侧俯冲、海沟后退与浅部升温。
summary_bullets.innovation: 突破固定解耦深度或弱层简化，显式耦合变质作用、形变反馈与剪切带流变。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲运动、地幔楔流动、热结构及地壳熔融条件提供更具物理约束的框架。

works.title: Combining microstructural analysis and in situ apatite−zircon U−Pb LA-ICP-MS to date fluid flow in world-class orogenic gold deposits: A case study from Oko West, Guyana
works.abstract: Determining the timing of mineralization in orogenic gold systems is a major challenge, given the difficulty of constraining fluid flow events and linking them to gold enrichment. However, it is critical for assessing whether world-class gold deposits result from a single mineralizing event or a multi-stage Au mobilization. In Paleoproterozoic settings, minerals suitable for precise dating of fluid flow are rare, and relying solely on intrusion-related geochronology may prove insufficient. In this context, combining detailed microstructural analysis with petrochronological data provides valuable insights into the tectonic and metallogenic evolution of deposits. In situ U−Pb dating was conducted on both zircon and apatite to investigate the timing of magmatism, deformation, and gold mineralization at Oko West, Guyana. Zircon and apatite ages from intrusive bodies indicate a magmatic event at ca. 2125 Ma, with apatite yielding the same age as that of zircon. Interpretation of the apatite U−Pb data set from mineralized volcano-sedimentary rocks was integrated with microstructural constraints on deformation and fluid flow. Apatite associated with metamorphic fluids and gold-bearing sulfidation records two successive stages at ca. 2100 Ma and ca. 2065 Ma, respectively. The clear temporal gap between the intrusion and the second mineralization stage supports the interpretation of at least two distinct geological events, the latter associated with post-magmatic gold mobilization. These results highlight the suitability of apatite U−Pb geochronology for resolving multi-stage gold deposition during the Rhyacian.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 结合微观结构分析与原位磷灰石—锆石 U—Pb LA-ICP-MS 对世界级造山型金矿床流体活动进行定年：以圭亚那 Oko West 为例

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究旨在厘清Oko West造山型金矿流体活动与金成矿的时序及是否多阶段成矿。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合显微构造分析与磷灰石、锆石原位U-Pb LA-ICP-MS定年约束岩浆、变形和成矿。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 侵入体形成于约2125 Ma，金矿化相关流体活动发生于约2100 Ma和2065 Ma两阶段。
summary_bullets.innovation: 证明磷灰石U-Pb定年可直接解析古元古代多阶段流体流动与金再活化过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别世界级金矿多期成矿机制及构造-成矿演化提供了可推广的定年框架。

works.title: Microstructural evolution and stepwise recrystallization across the coesite–quartz transition in UHP whiteschists from the Dora-Maira Massif (Western Alps)
works.abstract: The occurrence of coesite has been observed to be contingent upon the presence of ultrahigh-pressure (UHP) metamorphic conditions. Nevertheless, its presence is limited due to reaction bound to UHP conditions, inherent instability, and tendency for immediate recrystallization to quartz.
