works.title: The geochemical and isotopic composition of the Miocene Vestfirðir basalts, Northwest Iceland: Tracking the evolution of the Iceland mantle plume
works.abstract: The Miocene basalts of Vestfirðir, northwest Iceland, provide a record of the Iceland mantle plume shortly after its arrival beneath the mid-Atlantic ridge. We present new trace element and Sr-Nd-Pb-He isotope data from a comprehensive collection of 16–8 Ma basalts to investigate the temporal and compositional evolution of the plume. Basalts erupted before a volcanic hiatus at ∼14.9 Ma include both depleted, negative ΔNb lavas that resemble N-MORB and enriched, plume-derived basalts with positive ΔNb that resemble E -MORB. Basalts erupted after the hiatus all have positive ΔNb, they are manifestly more enriched than the pre-hiatus lavas and have high 3 He/ 4 He (up to 42 R a ), consistent with the presence of plume mantle beneath the relocated rift. The plume-derived basalts record contributions from two distinct enriched components (NWE1 and NWE2) and a depleted component (NWD1), which show geochemical signatures similar to those recorded in modern Icelandic basalts. Both the enriched mantle components have high 3 He/ 4 He ratios, and the depleted high- 3 He/ 4 He mantle component that dominates the proto-Iceland plume sampled by Baffin Island and West Greenland lavas is not evident in the Miocene sequence. The absence of 3 He/ 4 He correlations with trace elements or radiogenic isotopes suggests the high- 3 He/ 4 He source does not have a unique geochemical composition.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 冰岛西北部Vestfirðir地区中新世玄武岩的地球化学与同位素组成：追踪冰岛地幔柱的演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究Vestfirðir中新世玄武岩如何记录冰岛地幔柱的时序与成分演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析16–8 Ma玄武岩的微量元素及Sr-Nd-Pb-He同位素组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 停喷后熔岩更富集且高3He/4He，反映裂谷迁移后地幔柱主导供源。
summary_bullets.innovation: 识别两类富集源和一类亏损源，并揭示高3He/4He无独特地球化学指纹。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解冰岛地幔柱—洋中脊相互作用及地幔不均一性提供关键约束。

works.title: Radiogenic 182W and 142Nd anomalies in a 2.7 Ga old basaltic lava flow indicate long-term preservation of early mantle heterogeneities
works.abstract: Understanding the origin and preservation of early mantle heterogeneities is essential for reconstructing Earth’s accretion and early differentiation history. This can be investigated using the short-lived 146 Sm– 142 Nd and 182 Hf– 182 W isotope systems, which provide insights into large-scale differentiation processes through 142 Nd and 182 W anomalies in Earth’s oldest rocks. In this study, we present 182 W data for Theo’s Flow, a thick, differentiated, mafic–ultramafic flow of tholeiitic affinity, as well as 147 Sm– 143 Nd, 176 Lu– 176 Hf, and 187 Re– 187 Os isotope data and trace element concentrations, including highly siderophile elements, for Theo’s Flow and closely spatially and temporally associated Pyke Hill komatiites, both from the ∼ 2.7 Ga old Kidd-Munro Assemblage of the Abitibi greenstone belt, Ontario, Canada. Theo’s Flow samples are characterized by an average µ 182 W value of + 6.7 ± 2.7, which, together with the previously reported positive µ 142 Nd anomaly of + 6.8 ± 2.5, indicate long-term survival of mantle domains resulting from magmatic differentiation early in Earth’s history. If it is assumed that the bulk silicate Earth evolved with a suprachondritic Sm/Nd ratio, anomalies for both elements can be explained by a single silicate differentiation event at ∼ 4.54 Ga. Alternatively, if the bulk silicate Earth evolved with a chondritic Sm/Nd ratio, a model fractionation age of ∼ 4.45 Ga is obtained. In this case, due to extinction of 182 Hf by that time, the 182 W anomaly would have to have been generated by another process, such as derivation from a mantle source characterized by a deficit in late accreted materials. Regardless of the timing of the early silicate differentiation, the preservation of both 182 W and 142 Nd anomalies in the 2.7 Ga old rocks highlights the survival of early-formed mantle domains for nearly 1.8 Gyr after Earth’s formation. Comparison of isotopic and chemical data for Theo’s Flow with those for the Pyke Hill and Boston Creek komatiites, which were argued to have all been derived from melting in a single mantle plume, provides evidence for the survival of early mantle heterogeneities on a plume scale
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 一条27亿年前玄武质熔岩流中的放射成因182W和142Nd异常表明早期地幔非均一性的长期保存

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究2.7Ga玄武岩中的W-Nd异常是否记录早期地幔非均一体长期保存。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定Theo's Flow及相关科马提岩的182W、Nd-Hf-Os同位素与微量元素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Theo's Flow具正182W与142Nd异常，表明早期分异地幔域保存近18亿年。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次联合182W与142Nd证据，提出地幔柱尺度早期非均一体长期存续。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重建地球增生、早期分异及古老地幔源区演化提供关键同位素约束。

works.title: Progressive sub-arc mantle oxidation modulated by sediment melt
works.abstract: The redox state of the sub-arc mantle beneath volcanic arcs is typically oxidized but exhibits substantial variability. Previous studies proposed that the incorporation of slab components alters both arc magma compositions and sub-arc mantle redox state, whereas the dominant component remains debated. Here, by compiling global Cenozoic primitive arc basalt and olivine-hosted melt inclusion data, we show that sediment melt dominated by terrigenous origin plays the controlling role. Progressive influx of sediment melts into the sub-arc mantle results in gradual enrichment of potassium oxide and most incompatible elements in arc magmas. Increases in potassium oxide content in primitive magmas also correlates with rising oxygen fugacity ( f o 2 ) values, highlighting the strong oxidizing potential of sediment melt. The high–potassium oxide, high- f o 2 arc magmas spatially correlate with the distribution of Cenozoic porphyry copper-gold deposits, showing that the sediment melt influx not only elevates the sub-arc mantle f o 2 but also enhances the metallogenetic potential for porphyry deposits.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 沉积物熔体调控的弧下地幔渐进氧化

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究俯冲带弧下地幔氧化态差异由何种板片组分主控。
summary_bullets.methodology: 汇编全球新生代原始弧玄武岩与橄榄石熔体包裹体数据进行对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 陆源沉积物熔体持续加入会提高岩浆钾含量、逸氧度及斑岩成矿潜力。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在全球尺度将沉积物熔体确定为调控弧下地幔氧化的主导因素。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为理解弧岩浆氧化机制及斑岩铜金矿预测提供了关键依据。

works.title: The fate of molybdenum in subducted oceanic crust: Dehydration-controlled fractionation and cycling
works.abstract: Molybdenum (Mo) isotopes are powerful tracers of subduction-zone material cycling, yet their fractionation mechanisms and transport pathways during slab dehydration remain poorly constrained. This study integrates Mo concentrations and isotopic compositions from multiple global reservoirs with thermodynamics and numerical simulations, aiming to clarify Mo isotopic fractionation behavior and develop a Mo cycling model for subduction zones. Mass‑balance calculations yield mean δ 98 Mo values of 0.22 ± 0.04‰ (2σ) for sediments, −0.15 ± 0.04‰ (2σ) for the underlying altered mafic oceanic crust (AMOC), and 0.15 ± 0.04‰ (2σ) for the bulk altered oceanic crust (AOC). Isotope fractionation modeling indicates that upon complete dehydration, residual sediment δ 98 Mo can be reduced to −1.79‰ (α = 1.0015) and −1.88‰ (α = 1.002), while AMOC may decrease to −0.32‰ (α = 1.0015) and −0.38‰ (α = 1.002). The contribution from residual slabs after dehydration can explain pronounced negative δ 98 Mo observed in some arc lavas. Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that slab residues retain substantial Mo after extreme subduction dehydration, with 33.9 % retention in sediments and 85.3 % in AMOC, highlighting their important contribution to Mo enrichment in deep subduction settings. Magmatic mixing models further indicate that subduction-modified, high-δ 98 Mo mid‑upper mantle can yield enriched mid-ocean ridge basalts (MORBs), while the deeper mantle metasomatized by low-δ 98 Mo dehydrated slabs can source ocean island basalts (OIBs). High-δ 98 Mo arc magmas in hot arcs form through fluid- or AOC-melt-dominated metasomatism, while cold subduction zones favor fluid-dominated metasomatism. Conversely, low-δ 98 Mo back-arc magmas mainly originate from dehydrated AOC melts. These results demonstrate that pre-melting slab dehydration controls Mo isotope fractionation and recycling in subduction systems.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 俯冲洋壳中钼的归趋：脱水控制的分馏与循环

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲洋壳脱水过程中Mo同位素分馏机制及其循环路径。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合全球储库Mo数据，结合质量平衡、热力学与数值及蒙特卡洛模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 板片脱水主控Mo同位素分馏，残余板片仍富Mo并可解释弧岩浆的高低δ98Mo。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立了俯冲带Mo循环模型，量化沉积物与蚀变洋壳脱水后的同位素演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为示踪俯冲物质循环及解释MORB、OIB和弧岩浆Mo异常提供新框架。

works.title: Trace element partitioning during water-saturated eclogite melting at 3 GPa under variable oxygen fugacity – Implications for subduction zone magmatism
works.abstract: To shed light on the composition of partial melts of subducted oceanic crust potentially produced at subarc depths and constrain the contribution of this particular melting process to arc magmatism, we performed melting experiments of an eclogite source at relevant conditions (3 GPa, 800–950 °C and oxygen fugacity from ∼FMQ + 3 to FMQ-3) and produced new partition coefficients (D) for many trace elements between eclogite minerals and hydrous rhyolitic melts. Our results show that lattice strain control on partitioning is significant, as evidenced by a near-parabolic dependence of log D to the ionic radius for trivalent cations entering the large sites of both garnet and clinopyroxene. The partition coefficients of some trace elements also display significant dependences on temperature and oxygen fugacity. D Sc , D Y , D Hf , D Zr , D Th and D Ce decrease with increasing temperature for both garnet-melt and clinopyroxene-melt partitioning. With increasing temperature, D Grt-Liq REE tends to decrease, while D Cpx-Liq Ba and D Cpx-Liq Sr increase. We also observed a strong increase in D V with decreasing fO 2 for garnet-, clinopyroxene- and rutile-melt partitioning, while D Eu shows the opposite trend. With increasing fO 2 from FMQ-3 to FMQ + 3, D Grt-Liq Eu increases by more than an order of magnitude and D Cpx-Liq Eu increases by a factor of 3. Our new data allow us to model the trace element composition of primary adakitic melts produced by melting of subducted oceanic crust at typical subarc depths of about 100 km. These melts are characterized by (i) a progressive enrichment in the most incompatible elements from about 0.1 (Sc) to 10 (Rb) times MORB values, (ii) strong Nb-Ta negative anomalies, (iii) Sr positive anomalies and (iv) a significant depletion in HREE and Y. Stronger Nb-Ta anomaly and lowers Ti, Hf and Zr contents are observed if more rutile is present in the source. Meanwhile, the contents of the most incompatible elements (Rb, Ba, U, Th), the positive Sr anomaly and Sr/Y and La/Yb ratios decrease with increasing degree of melting. We show that the calculated primary adakitic melts can evolve to form high-silica adakites following assimilation-fractional crystallization processes in the mantle wedge and crust. However, to preserve the positive Sr anomaly of high-silica adakites, plagioclase fractionation and sediment melting should remain moderate. Oxybarometry based on V/M ratios (M = Eu, Sc, Yb, Ti) indicates relatively reducing conditions (below FMQ-1) for the generation of parental melts of modern high-silica adakites and Archean high-pressure TTGs. Finally, the Sr/Y ratio of modern primitive arc lavas suggest that hybridization of primitive mantle wedge magmas with adakitic magmas is a significant process for relatively warm subduction zones, where subarc surface slab temperatures reach about 900 °C. We estimate that, in such cases, melting of subducted oceanic crust could contribute up to 30% of the arc magma budget.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 不同氧逸度条件下 3 GPa 水饱和榴辉岩熔融过程中的微量元素分配——对俯冲带岩浆作用的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲洋壳榴辉岩在不同氧逸度下熔融如何影响弧岩浆成分。
summary_bullets.methodology: 在3 GPa、800–950℃及FMQ+3至FMQ-3条件下开展含水榴辉岩熔融实验并测定分配系数。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 温度与氧逸度显著控制微量元素分配，板片熔体具高Sr/Y、低HREE和Nb-Ta负异常特征。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统给出可变氧逸度下榴辉岩矿物-含水流纹质熔体多种微量元素分配系数。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释埃达克岩、TTG成因及温暖俯冲带中板片熔融对弧岩浆贡献提供定量约束。

works.title: Paleogeographic and Structural Controls on the Sediment-Hosted Zhaishang Au Deposit, West Qinling Orogen, China
works.abstract: Abstract Structural and paleogeographic controls on sediment-hosted Au deposits are investigated using the giant Zhaishang Au deposit in the west Qinling orogen as an example. Two distinct types of mineralization are identified. The first is fault-controlled mineralization within Devonian Fe-rich calcareous siltstone, deposited in a platform-edge environment. The second is stratabound-replacement mineralization within Permian carbonaceous mudstone. This mudstone, which contains up to 1.46% organic carbon, was deposited in a low-energy, deep-sea environment. Geophysical sections demonstrate that the two types of Au mineralization are bounded by a WNW-ESE–trending fault called F5, which extends to a depth of at least 1 km with secondary mineralized structures converging into it. New structural mapping reveals that deposit-scale, NW-SE–trending locked-up folds and thrust faults developed under NNE-SSW compression at ca. 279 to 275 Ma according to the sericite Ar-Ar dating. In situ U-Pb dating of Au-related apatite from mineralized veinlets indicates that the WNW- to E-trending reverse faulting, stratabound replacement, and Au mineralization took place at ca. 220 Ma. The fault-controlled Au in the Devonian beds comprises polymetallic sulfides associated with decarbonation with both native gold and invisible Au within pyrite. In contrast, the stratabound-replacement Au orebodies in the Permian beds comprise pyrite and arsenopyrite hosting invisible Au associated with quartz alteration. The contrasting mineralization styles can be attributed to variations in host rocks and their mechanical competency determined by distinct paleogeographic settings and different pathways for fluid-rock interaction.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西秦岭造山带寨上沉积岩容矿金矿床的古地理与构造控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨寨上金矿受古地理环境与构造作用控制的成矿机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合构造填图、地球物理剖面及绢云母Ar-Ar和磷灰石U-Pb定年分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别两类成矿样式，受F5断层分隔，并确定约220 Ma为主要成矿期。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将古地理差异、岩石力学性质与流体作用路径联系解释成矿分异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为沉积岩容矿金矿的找矿预测及构造—地层联合研究提供依据。

works.title: Pyrite Textures, Trace Element Chemistries, and Isotopic Signatures (S, Pb) Suggest Hybrid Ore-Forming Processes in the World-Class Metasediment-Hosted Liba Au Deposit, West Qinling Orogen, Central China
works.abstract: Abstract The Liba Au deposit (109.8 t Au at 1.99 g/t) in the West Qinling orogen (central China) is hosted in Middle Devonian greenschist facies metamorphosed clastic rocks and carbonates and has a close spatio-temporal relationship with Late Triassic granitoid complex and mafic to felsic dikes. The Au mineralization is localized within west-northwest to east-west fracture zones and characterized by pyrite disseminations and subordinate auriferous quartz veins. Based on field and textural relationships, the following four paragenetic stages are defined: (1) pre-ore stage marked by deformed pyrite, (2) early ore stage comprising quartz-pyrite and quartz-sericite-pyrite ores, (3) late ore stage composed of quartz-polymetallic sulfide veins, and (4) post-ore stage of barren calcite. Pre-ore stage pyrite (Au ≤ 3.0 ppm) has δ34S values of 5.0 to 6.8‰, which are lower than those for orestage pyrites (6.8–10.4‰). This S isotope difference discounts the possibility that some of the ore-forming S was sourced from the local metasedimentary host rocks. Pyrite from the early ore stage displays core-mantlerim zoned textures and hosts fine-grained native gold grains and has relatively high contents of invisible Au (≤600 ppm) in its mantle zones. The uniform δ34S values (mostly 8.5–10.4‰) and 206Pb/204Pb ratios (18.3918–18.6362) for these pyrites suggest a deep-seated homogenized source for ore fluids, most likely derived from metamorphic devolatilization of Paleozoic metasedimentary rocks. Pyrite of the late ore stage, closely associated with abundant native gold, can be subdivided into a texturally early Au-bearing generation (Au ≤ 8.9 ppm; δ34S of 8.6–9.3‰; 206Pb/204Pb of 18.9885–18.9959), which is overprinted by a texturally later Au-poor generation (Au ≤ 2.0 ppm; δ34S of 8.8–9.6‰) and Au-bearing generation (Au ≤ 3.9 ppm; δ34S of 6.8–8.5‰; 206Pb/204Pb of 18.9501–18.9890). The lower δ34S values and more radiogenic Pb isotope signature, combined with enrichment in Cu, Zn, Ag, Sn, Sb, and Pb in this latest Au-bearing pyrite, indicate a different fluid source, which is suggested to originate from magmatic-hydrothermal fluids that interacted with the enveloping Devonian metasedimentary rocks. Integration of our new data with previous studies suggests the Liba Au deposit is hybrid in nature and involved multiple fluid sources and multiple Au deposition stages—a finding that has also been documented in other orogenic Au deposit settings worldwide. In addition, systematic in situ chemical and isotopic analyses of texturally well-constrained pyrite provide the means to geochemically characterize the entire fluid evolution history, as done at Liba, and fingerprint the fluid reservoirs and processes implicated in orogenic Au systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 黄铁矿结构、微量元素地球化学和同位素特征（S、Pb）表明中国中部西秦岭造山带世界级变沉积岩容矿里巴金矿床具有混合成矿过程

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨Liba金矿成矿流体来源、演化及其是否为混合成矿过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合野外分期、黄铁矿结构观察、微量元素原位分析及S-Pb同位素测试。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Liba金矿为多阶段成矿，早期以变质流体为主，晚期叠加岩浆热液贡献。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以具纹理约束的黄铁矿原位地球化学重建了完整流体演化与金沉淀历史。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为造山型金矿多源流体识别和成矿机制判别提供了可推广的方法与证据。

works.title: Metamorphic evolution and geochronology of garnet amphibolite, the Dongbatu tectonic-metamorphic mélange, eastern middle Paleozoic Dunhuang Orogenic Belt, northwest China
works.abstract: The Dongbatu Mountain, located in the northeastern segment of the Paleozoic Dunhuang Orogenic Belt, northwestern China, provides critical constraints in understanding the tectono-thermal evolution of this orogenic belt. The amphibolite exists as tectonic puddings preserved in the metapelite, indicative of tectonic-metamorphic mélange. Three different metamorphic mineral assemblages were found in the amphibolite samples, i.e., the prograde assemblage (M1) consisting of tiny inclusion minerals preserved in the garnet interior, the metamorphic peak assemblage (M2) comprising garnet, amphibole, quartz, plagioclase, biotite plus accessary minerals, as well as the retrograde assemblage (M3) consisting of the “white-eye socket” rimming the garnet. Phase equilibrium modeling and conventional geothermobarometry define clockwise pressure–temperature ( P–T ) trajectories, characteristic of orogenic background. The metamorphic peak P–T conditions (8.1–10.3 kbar and 660–770 °C) suggest that the metamorphic event is ascribed to the amphibolite facies and the medium- P/T facies series. Zircon U–Pb ages indicate that the protolith crystallized at ∼1.60 Ga and the metamorphism occurred at ∼381‒370 Ma. The petrochemical data suggest that the amphibolite originated in an oceanic-island setting of ∼1.60 Ga, and was subsequently incorporated into the evolving orogenic system in the Late Devonian, suggesting the tectonic-metamorphic mélange formed during the tectonic exhumation.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西北中—古生代敦煌造山带东段东坝图构造—变质混杂岩中石榴角闪岩的变质演化与年代学

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究东坝图构造—变质混杂岩中石榴角闪岩的变质演化、时代及构造意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学、矿物组合分析、相平衡模拟、地温压计、锆石U-Pb定年与地球化学。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 原岩约1.60Ga形成于洋岛环境，381–370Ma经历中压角闪岩相顺时针P-T变质并抬升混杂。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将矿物组合、P-T轨迹、年代学与地化耦合，重建混杂岩形成于构造折返过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为敦煌造山带中古生代构造热演化、混杂岩成因及地体拼贴提供关键约束。

works.title: Apatite geochemistry and Sr isotopes reveal the genesis of Au–W deposits in the Xiangzhong Metallogenic Province, South China: Insights from the Xingfengshan deposit
works.abstract: Metasedimentary rock-hosted Au–W deposits constitute a globally significant resource for gold and tungsten, yet their genesis remains debated, primarily due to uncertainties in linking mineralization to regional magmatism. The Xiangzhong Metallogenic Province (XZMP) represents a world-class Au–W metallogenic domain, providing a valuable window to address this issue. We conducted an integrated study of apatite from the Xingfengshan deposit, combining textural analysis with trace element and Sr isotopic measurements. Two types of apatite were identified: Ap-1 from skarn W ore and Ap-2 from auriferous sheeted quartz veins. Both types exhibit homogeneous textures and middle REE-enriched patterns. Nevertheless, they differ significantly in Eu anomalies: Ap-1 exhibits negative anomalies (Eu/Eu* = 0.5–0.9), whereas Ap-2 shows positive anomalies (Eu/Eu* = 1.9–3.7). Integrated with existing geochronological and petrogenetic analyses, REE patterns and Sr isotope ratios indicate that Ap-1 formed via interaction between magmatic-hydrothermal fluid from the Longcangwan granite and the Neoproterozoic Mobin Formation calcareous-interlayered slate. In contrast, Ap-2 likely formed from the interaction between magmatic-hydrothermal fluid corresponding to the Longtan granite and the Neoproterozoic Gaojian Formation slate. Isotopic modeling further reveals significantly stronger fluid-rock interaction during W mineralization (fluid/rock mass ratio = 10.0–34.7) compared to Au mineralization (fluid/rock mass ratio = 0.6–0.8). This study not only establishes genetic links between Au–W mineralization and specific magmatism, supporting an intrusion-related origin for the Au–W deposits in XZMP, but also highlights apatite as a powerful geochemical tracer for reconstructing the evolution of hydrothermal fluid in metasedimentary-hosted Au–W systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 磷灰石地球化学与 Sr 同位素揭示华南湘中成矿省 Au–W 矿床的成因：以兴丰山矿床为例

summary_bullets.research_question: 解决湘中Au–W矿床成因及其与区域岩浆作用对应关系不清的问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合磷灰石岩相特征、微量元素、稀土配分和Sr同位素开展综合分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: W矿化与龙藏湾花岗岩有关，Au矿化与龙潭花岗岩有关，且W期水岩作用更强。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以磷灰石地球化学和Sr同位素精确追踪Au–W成矿流体来源与演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为沉积变质岩容矿Au–W系统判别成因、岩浆联系及流体过程提供新依据。

works.title: Electromagnetic imaging reveals insufficient fluids to explain shallow megathrust creep at the Shumagin Gap
works.abstract: Abstract The Shumagin Gap, a creeping segment of the Alaska subduction zone characterized by tsunamigenic structures, experienced a deep rupture during the July 2020 M7.8 earthquake. However, shallow slip behavior and the upper boundary of the rupture remain poorly understood. Here we utilize controlled-source electromagnetic data to image subsurface electrical resistivity, investigating the role of fluids in modulating megathrust locking state within the Shumagin Gap. Results reveal pronounced trench-normal heterogeneity in electrical resistivity both along the shallow plate interface and within the overriding plate, showing fluid presence but low overall porosity at the interface. An observed conductive channel extending into the overriding plate may facilitate upward fluid drainage. Our findings suggest that the volumes of fluids and inferred pore pressures are not sufficient to explain megathrust creep at the Shumagin Gap. Rather, the intricate interplay between heterogeneous structure and fluid distribution contributes to the region’s seismogenic behavior and tsunami hazards, particularly in the shallow portion of the megathrust.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 电磁成像揭示舒马金缺口浅部巨型逆冲断层蠕滑的流体不足以作出解释

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究Shumagin Gap浅部俯冲带蠕滑是否由界面流体不足或高孔压控制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用可控源电磁数据反演地下电阻率，成像浅部板块界面与上覆板块流体分布。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 界面虽有流体但整体孔隙率低，流体量与孔压不足以单独解释浅部蠕滑。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以电磁成像揭示该区浅部巨型逆冲界面及上覆板块的沟法向电性非均一性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究改进对俯冲带锁固、海啸孕震机制与浅部破裂危险性的认识。

works.title: The molybdenum isotope composition of the Bulk Silicate Earth constrained from molybdenites and its implications for the nature of late-stage building blocks
works.abstract: The mass-independent Mo isotope composition of the Bulk Silicate Earth (BSE) bears great potential to investigate the origin of the Earth’s latest 10–20% planetary building blocks. However, currently different estimates for the Mo isotope composition of the BSE render constraints on the composition of late-stage accretionary materials difficult. To address this issue and to revisit the Mo isotope composition of the BSE, we report high-precision molybdenum isotope data for a comprehensive set of terrestrial molybdenites from different locations around the globe covering mineralization ages that extend from the Archean to the Phanerozoic. The molybdenite results are used to constrain the Mo isotope composition of the BSE as follows: ε 92 Mo = 0.04 ± 0.06, ε 94 Mo = 0.03 ± 0.03, ε 95 Mo = 0.01 ± 0.01, ε 97 Mo = 0.02 ± 0.02, ε 100 Mo = 0.05 ± 0.06 ( n = 16, 95% confidence interval, relative to the NIST SRM 3134 Mo standard). In contrast to previous studies, no resolvable ε 94 Mo and ε 95 Mo anomalies were observed, suggesting a BSE composition with predominantly non-carbonaceous chondrite provenance. Considering the analytical uncertainties of our new BSE estimate and literature data for carbonaceous and non-carbonaceous meteorites, it remains a viable option that 12±10% of the present-day Mo budget in the BSE derives from carbonaceous meteorite material delivered during late-stage accretion. This amount of Mo is consistent with the fraction of Mo that was delivered to Earth during its final 0.5% of accretion by the late veneer.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 由辉钼矿约束的硅酸盐总体地球钼同位素组成及其对晚期增生组块性质的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文重估地幔硅酸盐地球的钼同位素组成，并约束晚期增生物质来源。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定全球16个不同时代辉钼矿的高精度钼同位素，并据此估算BSE组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: BSE未见显著ε94Mo和ε95Mo异常，整体以非碳质球粒陨石来源为主。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以跨时代、全球辉钼矿数据重建BSE钼同位素，较系统地修正既有估值分歧。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该结果有助厘清地球晚期吸积与晚期薄层物质组成，约束地球形成模型。

works.title: Author Correction: The history of Earth’s sulfur cycle
works.abstract: Correction to: Nature Reviews Earth & Environment https://doi.org/10.1038/s43017-024-00615-0 , published online 5 December 2024.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 作者更正：地球硫循环的历史

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在更正《地球硫循环历史》原文中的相关内容。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过作者更正声明对已发表综述的信息进行修订与说明。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 核心结果是原论文已有部分内容被更正，但摘要未说明细节。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新性不在新研究发现，而在及时维护综述内容的准确性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该更正有助研究者准确引用和理解地球硫循环综述内容。

works.title: Melting from 1000°C and geophysical discontinuities in the shallow Earth’s mantle
works.abstract: Numerous geophysical studies reported low seismic velocity and high electrical conductivity anomalies in the shallow, oceanic upper mantle of the Earth, at a level sometimes referred to as the Gutenberg discontinuity. This discontinuity is commonly interpreted to mark the onset of partial melting in the mantle, and also to correspond to the lithosphere-asthenosphere boundary (LAB), where the decoupling of the cold and rigid plates from the hot and convecting mantle drives plate tectonics. From petrological experiments and modelling, we determined the melting temperature of the mantle with relevant CO 2 and H 2 O contents, which can be as low as ∼1000°C. We evidence that Earth’s mantle does start melting at pressures and temperatures corresponding to the Gutenberg discontinuity. However, this discontinuity is clearly located within the lithosphere, at about two thirds of its thickness, and thus does not represent the LAB. The low temperatures (down to ∼1000°C) and the low fractions of melts at the Gutenberg discontinuity do not lower the viscosity of the mantle significantly. The LAB lies deeper at much higher temperatures (∼1300-1400°C) where melting has progressed. This indicates it is not the onset of melting but the increase in melt fraction at the transition from volatile- to silicate-controlled melting that reduces mantle viscosity so as to drive plate tectonics at the LAB.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 1000°C起始熔融与地球浅部地幔中的地球物理不连续面

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究古登堡不连续面是否代表上地幔初始熔融及LAB位置。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合含CO2和H2O地幔岩石学实验与热力学熔融建模分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地幔约1000°C即可初熔，古登堡面在岩石圈内且不等于LAB。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出挥发分可将地幔初熔温度降至约1000°C，并区分初熔与LAB。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助于重释地震和电导异常，并改进板块构造与地幔流变模型。

works.title: Tin isotope fractionation in arc magmas controlled by degassing and slab input
works.abstract: As a redox-sensitive and volatile-chalcophile tracer, Sn isotopes provide unique insights into the origin and transport mechanisms of Sn at convergent margins, yet the drivers of their fractionation remains poorly understood due to a lack of integrated spatial and process-oriented studies. We present high-precision Sn isotopic compositions of lavas (pumices) and hydrothermal products and clinopyroxene-inferred H 2 O concentrations from Whakaari (arc-front) and Taranaki (rear-arc) in the Kermadec- Hikurangi subduction system.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 弧岩浆中锡同位素分馏受脱气作用和板片输入控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨俯冲带弧岩浆中锡同位素分馏受脱气与板片输入如何共同控制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定Kermadec-Hikurangi两火山浮岩与热液产物高精度锡同位素，并用单斜辉石反演H2O。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 前弧与后弧锡同位素差异表明，岩浆脱气和板片流体输入共同主导锡迁移与分馏。
summary_bullets.innovation: 整合空间对比、过程示踪及水含量约束，系统揭示俯冲带锡同位素分馏机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带挥发分循环、氧化还原演化及锡成矿物质来源提供关键地球化学约束。

works.title: Pyrite Re-Os Geochronology of Carbonate-Hosted Zn-Pb Deposits of the Canadian Cordillera
works.abstract: Abstract The Cambrian-Devonian platform carbonate rocks found throughout the eastern Canadian Cordillera are important hosts of Zn-Pb sulfide mineralization. Models for mineralization commonly invoke either Laramide compression, or hydrothermal circulation associated with an active tectonic margin that was present during the Paleozoic. To distinguish between these possibilities, we have dated two Zn-Pb deposits from the northeastern Canadian Cordillera (Robb Lake and Prairie Creek) using pyrite Re-Os geochronology. The age of Robb Lake (348 ± 26 Ma) overlaps with that of the clastic-dominated deposits in the Kechika trough, located directly to the west, and is consistent with both sets of deposit types being related to a common metallogenic system. Pyrite collected from stratabound sulfides and quartz-carbonate-sulfide veins from the main orebody at Prairie Creek was dated to 315.7 ± 8.3 Ma and is statistically indistinguishable from the age of 322 ± 10 Ma calculated from Mississippi Valley-type mineralization distal to the main orebody. Our Re-Os dates require that mineralization at Prairie Creek and Robb Lake occurred during the Paleozoic, in stark contrast to previous age estimates made by paleomagnetism (<150 Ma). Consequently, Zn-Pb mineralization in the northern cordillera formed in response to an active margin that existed along the western margin of North America during the Paleozoic, and it is not related to the Laramide compression.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 加拿大科迪勒拉碳酸盐岩容矿 Zn-Pb 矿床中黄铁矿 Re-Os 地质年代学研究

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在判定加拿大科迪勒拉碳酸盐容矿Zn-Pb矿化究竟形成于拉拉米德挤压期还是古生代活动大陆边缘作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用黄铁矿Re-Os同位素定年，对Robb Lake与Prairie Creek两处Zn-Pb矿床进行成矿时代测定。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Robb Lake与Prairie Creek定年分别为348±26 Ma和315.7±8.3 Ma，表明矿化发生于古生代而非小于150 Ma。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新在于将黄铁矿Re-Os定年直接用于两类碳酸盐容矿Zn-Pb矿床，以约束其成矿时限与构造背景。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为科迪勒拉Zn-Pb成矿系统、区域构造演化及矿床对比提供了关键年代学证据与成因约束。

works.title: Molybdenum isotopes in metamorphic and magmatic rocks may record substantial fluid activity in continental subduction zones
works.abstract: Fluids play a critical role in crust-mantle interaction and geochemical recycling in subduction zones. However, fluid activity in continental subduction zones remains poorly constrained. Molybdenum (Mo) isotopes exhibit significant fractionation during subduction zone processes, providing a powerful tool for tracing fluid activity. Here we report the Mo isotopic compositions of paired metamorphic rocks (eclogites and gneisses) and magmatic rocks (gabbroic diorites and monzodiorites) from the Dabie-Sulu continental collision zone. The metamorphic rocks have δ 98 Mo values of −0.51‰ to 0.12‰, which are variably lower than the previously estimated continental crust value of 0.12‰ ± 0.05‰ and the more recent estimate of −0.12‰ ± 0.01‰. Their light Mo isotopic features, together with low Mo/Ce ratios and depleted fluid-mobile element contents, suggest that these rocks represent fragments of subducted continental crust that experienced substantial dehydration during subduction. The magmatic rocks have low δ 98 Mo values of −0.24‰ to −0.05‰, low Mo/Ce ratios, and low fluid-mobile element contents comparable to those of the metamorphic rocks, indicating the subsequent incorporation of isotopically light Mo from the dehydrated crust into the mantle wedge. Collectively, the light Mo isotopic features of the metamorphic and magmatic rocks point to significant Mo isotopic fractionation during continental subduction. Metamorphic dehydration of the subducted continental crust generated high-δ 98 Mo fluids, leaving the residual dehydrated crust with light Mo isotopes, as recorded by low-δ 98 Mo metamorphic rocks. Subsequently, melting of this dehydrated crust produced melts that metasomatized the overlying mantle wedge, generating the source of low-δ 98 Mo magmatism in the continental collision zone. Therefore, the Mo isotope systematics of metamorphic and magmatic rocks provide a powerful means of revealing potential significant fluid activity in continental subduction zones.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 变质岩和岩浆岩中的钼同位素可能记录大陆俯冲带中显著的流体活动

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究大陆俯冲带中流体活动的强度及其Mo同位素记录机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定大别—苏鲁变质岩与岩浆岩的Mo同位素及Mo/Ce和流体活动元素特征。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 变质脱水使俯冲陆壳残留轻Mo，同位素轻的熔体交代地幔并形成低δ98Mo岩浆。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统联合变质岩与岩浆岩Mo同位素示踪大陆俯冲流体活动。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别大陆俯冲中壳幔相互作用、流体迁移和地球化学循环提供新指标。

works.title: Trivalent titanium in high-titanium lunar ilmenite
works.abstract: Lunar mare basalts are often rich in titanium, hosted predominantly within the mineral ilmenite (Fe2+Ti4+O3). Here, we examine ilmenite in a  ~ 3.8 billion-year-old mare basalt (Apollo rock 75035) using high-resolution electron microscopy and electron energy loss spectroscopy. A key finding is that 75035 ilmenite is itself enriched in Ti, beyond the end member of the conventional solid solution series. Using energy loss near-edge spectroscopy, we determine that the excess Ti is trivalent, with Ti3+ accounting for 13% of the total Ti content. This discovery confirms the presence of trivalent Ti in lunar ilmenite, long hypothesized based on the Moon’s reducing environment. Accounting for the change in implied stoichiometry, a review of literature data suggests that Ti3+ may be present in ilmenite across a wide range of lunar samples. We extrapolate known relationships from the literature to connect Ti3+ to redox conditions, estimating the oxygen fugacity during crystallization of 75035 to be below the iron-wüstite buffer, ΔIW≤ − 1.6. Further quantifying the relationship between Ti valence state and oxygen fugacity would allow Ti3+-bearing ilmenite to serve as an oxybarometer able to access the reducing conditions found on many planetary bodies. Lunar rocks, not subject to complex crustal dynamics, reveal evolutionary aspects of the Earth-Moon system. The authors find that lunar ilmenite (age: 3.78 Ga) can host excess titanium in a trivalent state due to redox conditions not found on Earth.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 高钛月球钛铁矿中的三价钛

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究月海高钛玄武岩钛铁矿中是否存在三价钛及其成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用高分辨电子显微镜与电子能量损失谱分析阿波罗75035样品。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现钛铁矿含超化学计量钛，其中约13%总钛为三价钛。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次直接证实月球钛铁矿含Ti3+，并将其与氧逸度定量关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重建月球及行星还原环境提供新氧压计与关键矿物学约束。

works.title: Alkalinity and carbon fluxes from coastal aquifers to the ocean via submarine groundwater discharge
works.abstract: The coastal ocean links land and sea through rivers and submarine groundwater discharge, which contribute to the coastal carbon budget. Groundwater discharge, including fresh groundwater and recirculated seawater, remains poorly constrained globally. Here, we compile a global dataset of coastal groundwater chemistry and estimate fluxes of dissolved inorganic carbon and total alkalinity. Using conceptual reaction models, we analyze the alkalinity-carbon relationship to identify dominant processes. These patterns reflect carbonate dissolution and precipitation, and organic matter remineralization under oxic and anoxic conditions, indicating that coastal aquifers function as geochemical reactors. Recirculated seawater sampled inland is more enriched than nearshore groundwater, consistent with longer residence time and enhanced water-rock interaction. Groundwater contributes 3–7 percent of riverine dissolved inorganic carbon flux, equivalent to 2.7–2.9 and 2.2-2.4 trillion moles per year of dissolved inorganic carbon and alkalinity, depending on lithology and redox conditions. This emphasizes the importance of incorporating groundwater fluxes into Earth system models. Submarine groundwater discharge delivers non-negligible fluxes of dissolved inorganic carbon and total alkalinity to the coastal ocean, indicating that subsurface processes may influence marine carbon cycling, based on global groundwater chemistry data.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 通过海底地下水排泄从沿海含水层输送至海洋的碱度和碳通量

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文评估海底地下水排放对近海无机碳与总碱度通量的全球贡献。
summary_bullets.methodology: 作者整合全球沿海地下水化学数据，并用反应概念模型估算碳与碱度通量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 沿海含水层是活跃地球化学反应器，地下水贡献约占河流无机碳通量的3至7%。
summary_bullets.innovation: 研究首次从全球数据约束地下水无机碳和总碱度通量及其主控过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于改进地球系统模型并深化对海洋碳循环的认识。

works.title: The effects of magmatic recharge on primary lunar melt compositions: Implications for the water and other volatile budget of the Moon
works.abstract: The theory of the Moon’s formation via a giant impact, along with initial early sample analyses, suggested that the Moon is extremely volatile-depleted relative to the Earth. Yet, the petrologic studies of lunar melt inclusions and volcanic glasses over the last two decades suggested that water content in the lunar mantle is much higher (as high as 133 – 292 μg/g) than expected and is similar to the Earth’s shallow upper mantle. This high water concentration of the lunar mantle challenged prevailing models of the formation and early evolution history of the Moon, suggesting that not all volatiles were lost, or that impactors supplied additional volatiles. However, previous petrologic models of lunar primary melt water content reconstruction did not consider many key magma differentiation processes. Here, we model lunar magmatism taking into consideration the process of magmatic recharge and show that such a process can explain the anomalously high water abundances, along with other volatile elements such as S, F, and Cl, in Apollo sample 74220 basaltic melt inclusions, as well as the available volatile data of Apollo 79135 and 15597 basaltic to andesitic melt inclusions. Moreover, the model can also explain the MgO content and high-Ti nature of 74220 inclusions, since recharge results in ever-increasing incompatible element concentrations while buffering major element compositions. Therefore, other than deriving from a wet background mantle, we propose an alternative scenario that the water-rich lunar melts could originate from a water-poor (as low as 1–22 μg/g), primitive, magma ocean cumulate. The estimated extent of volatile depletion of the lunar interior varies with the vigor of the magmatic recharge process. Further studies are necessary to independently assess evidence of magmatic recharge, the melt replenishment frequency, and the impact of such a magma reservoir process in our understanding of lunar mantle-crust evolution.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 岩浆补给对原生月球熔体成分的影响：对月球水及其他挥发分储量的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨月球原始熔体高水含量是否真指示月幔富挥发分。
summary_bullets.methodology: 作者建立考虑岩浆补给与分异的月球岩浆演化模型并拟合阿波罗样品数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆补给可解释熔体包裹体高水及S、F、Cl，无需假设富水月幔。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统将岩浆补给纳入月球原始熔体挥发分重建并统一解释主微量元素。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究重估月球内部挥发分预算，并影响月球形成与幔壳演化模型。

works.title: Vapor phase facilitated rhenium enrichment in porphyry Mo deposit: Insights from thermodynamic simulations and molybdenum isotopes at Jinduicheng deposit, central China
works.abstract: Rhenium (Re) is a critical metal, predominantly concentrated in molybdenite through lattice substitution, with more than 90% of global production sourced from porphyry deposits. Although fluid boiling is a fundamental ore-forming process in porphyry systems, the role of vapor and liquid phases derived from boiling in controlling Re enrichment remains poorly constrained. Recent studies indicate that Re can partition significantly into the vapor phase and be effectively transported within it; vapor is also known to preferentially incorporate heavy Mo isotopes. Here, the Re contents, Mo isotopic compositions of molybdenite, and thermodynamic modeling results for the Jinduicheng porphyry Mo deposit in the East Qinling–Dabie Mo belt are reported. Our data show that Re concentrations in molybdenite range from 7.04 to 34.24 ppm, and δ 98 Mo values vary from +0.66‰ to −0.38‰. A systematic decrease in δ 98 Mo values over the hydrothermal sequence indicates Mo isotope fractionation driven by fluid boiling. The negative correlation between Re content and δ 98 Mo suggests that Re preferentially partitions into the vapor phase over Mo and precipitates later during cooling, resulting in late-stage, Re-rich molybdenite. Thermodynamic simulations support this boiling-controlled partitioning and precipitation behavior. Furthermore, boiling-induced salinity increase in the residual liquid enhances Re complexation with chloride and promotes Re mobility, consistent with the negative correlation between Re/Mo and δ 98 Mo. Our study demonstrates that Mo isotopes serve as a sensitive tracer for Re transport and enrichment processes in porphyry systems, providing new insights into the mechanisms of Re enrichment.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 蒸气相促进斑岩型 Mo 矿床中铼富集：来自中国中部金堆城矿床热力学模拟与钼同位素的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨斑岩钼矿中流体沸腾的气液分离如何控制铼富集。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合辉钼矿铼含量、钼同位素分析与热力学模拟开展研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铼优先进入气相并晚期沉淀，形成富铼辉钼矿且δ98Mo持续降低。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用钼同位素联合模拟有效示踪斑岩体系中铼迁移富集机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解斑岩矿床关键金属富集规律及找矿评价提供新指标。

works.title: Regional‐to‐Global Tectonic and Trench‐Morphology Effects of Oceanic Plateau Subduction
works.abstract: Abstract Regional geodynamic modeling has shown that oceanic plateau subduction can modify the slab behavior. However, few studies have explored these interactions beyond 100 Myr in 3‐D spherical models. Using 3‐D spherical mantle convection models with self‐consistent plate‐like behavior, we investigate how the geometry and rheological properties of oceanic plateaus influence trench evolution and mantle flow across regional to global scales. Our models show that plateau width and thickness exert the strongest control on trench retreat, while buoyancy alone plays a secondary role. A mechanically strong plateau produces a transient arcuate trench morphology that gradually heals once the plateau is fully subducted, leaving only a delay in retreat. The pronounced curvature of the northern Mariana Trench suggests that the Ogasawara Plateau is mechanically strong. Although plateau subduction leaves no long‐term geological scar unless slab break‐off occurs, it substantially slows trench migration and can influence global tectonic evolution for over 200 Myr.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 海洋高原俯冲对区域至全球构造及海沟形态的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究洋底高原俯冲如何在区域到全球尺度影响海沟演化、板片行为与地幔流动。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用具自洽板块行为的三维球形地幔对流数值模型，系统测试高原几何与流变参数。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高原宽度和厚度主控海沟后撤，强高原致短暂弧形海沟，并可使全球构造演化减缓超2亿年。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将洋底高原俯冲置于超1亿年的三维球形全球模型中，区分几何、浮力与机械强度效应。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于解释马里亚纳海沟曲率，并改进对俯冲带动力学及长期全球构造演化的认识。

works.title: From dry to damp lunar mantle: How trace water in orthopyroxene reshapes the internal thermal state of the Moon
works.abstract: The thermal conductivity and diffusivity of mantle minerals fundamentally control planetary cooling rates. Orthopyroxene is a major constituent of the lunar mantle, yet the influence of trace water on its thermophysical properties under high-pressure and high-temperature conditions relevant to the lunar interior has remained unquantified. Here, we present high P – T measurements of these properties for synthetic enstatite containing 0–427 ppm H 2 O using an enhanced transient plane source method. Our results demonstrate that even trace water drastically reduces thermal transport efficiency by enhancing phonon scattering. Incorporating these data into lunar thermal evolution models reveals that a hydrated mantle maintains significantly higher internal temperatures than an anhydrous system over geologic time. By reconciling our model geotherms with the solidus of various lunar mantle constituents and with seismic constraints on the largely solid modern mantle, we constrain the bulk water content of the lunar mantle to around 300 ppm. This work redefines the thermal state of the Moon and provides a critical mechanism for explaining its prolonged magmatic evolution.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 从干燥到潮湿的月球地幔：斜方辉石中的微量水如何重塑月球内部热状态

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究月幔中微量水如何改变斜方辉石导热性及月球热演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测量含0–427 ppm水顽火辉石高温高压热输运，并构建月球热演化模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 微量水显著降低导热扩散率，使月幔长期更热，整体含水约300 ppm。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次定量约束含微量水斜方辉石在月幔条件下的热物性及其热效应。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释月球持久岩浆活动、月幔温度结构与含水量提供关键参数约束。

works.title: Hydrothermal chlorite geochemistry and formation mechanisms: Linking alterations to uranium mineralization and exploration in the Daliang deposit of South China
works.abstract: Chlorite is the dominant hydrothermal mineral in the Daliang deposit, a granite-related hydrothermal uranium deposit in South China. Despite the prevalence of chlorite, its characteristics and link to uranium mineralization have largely been neglected. Through comprehensive petrographic and geochemical analyses, we identified five distinct chlorite types (Chl-1 to Chl-5) and traced their formation mechanisms (dissolution−precipitation, layer-by-layer replacement, and dissolution−transport−precipitation) and crystallization temperatures (166−303 °C). Our analyses reveal that the chlorite compositions in the Daliang deposit effectively track the distinct evolutionary trends of the physicochemical properties of hydrothermal fluids across different paragenetic stages, including pH and oxygen fugacity. These observations suggest that the intragroup compositional variations in chlorite are primarily controlled by temperature. In contrast, the intergroup differences mainly reflect precursor mineralogy, fluid pH, and variations in oxygen fugacity. The formation of pre-ore chlorites (Chl-1 to Chl-3) provided favorable spatial conditions for uranium mineralization, whereas the evolution of mineralizing fluids from relatively oxidizing conditions (Chl-4) during the early ore stage to reducing conditions (Chl-5) during the main ore stage directly drove the pitchblende formation process. This research establishes new geochemical indicators for exploring uranium. Notably, elevated Cu/Li and Cu/Ga ratios—coupled with decreasing Li/U ratios and high U and Cu concentrations in ore-stage chlorite—emerge as effective proximal vectors for mineralization within the Daliang deposit. These results not only increase our understanding of granite-related hydrothermal uranium deposits but also provide practical tools for accelerating future exploration efforts.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 热液绿泥石地球化学及其形成机制：华南大良矿床中蚀变作用与铀成矿及找矿的联系

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究氯绿泥石的形成机制、地球化学特征及其与铀成矿和找矿的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学观察与系统地球化学分析，划分五类氯绿泥石并估算成矿温度。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 氯绿泥石记录流体温度、pH和氧逸度演化，前期蚀变利于成矿，流体还原化促成沥青铀矿沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出以氯绿泥石成分及Cu/Li、Cu/Ga、Li/U比值作为铀矿近矿找矿指标。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为花岗岩相关热液型铀矿成因研究和勘查靶区快速识别提供实用地球化学工具。

works.title: Genesis of alkaline trachytes at the northern North China Block and their constraints on the Paleo-Asian Ocean closure and the Pangea assembly
works.abstract: The closure of the Paleo-Asian Ocean is pivotal for deciphering Late Paleozoic-Early Mesozoic paleogeographic evolution and Pangea’s assembly, yet the timing and geodynamic mechanism of the Central Asian Orogenic Belt’s final closure remain highly debated. This study comprehensively analyzes petrology, geochemistry, zircon geochronology, and Hf isotopes of Early Permian-Late Triassic trachytes and Early Permian amphibolite in Shangyi (northern North China Block) to constrain its petrogenesis and geodynamics. Zircon U-Pb dating research displays that the three trachytes were formed at 274 Ma, 249 Ma, and 235 Ma, respectively. Geochemically, they are distinguished by high alkali content, FeOT/MgO, and Ga/Al ratio, low MgO, TiO 2 , and P 2 O 5 . They are enriched in large ion lithophile elements (e.g., Rb, Ba, and K) and light rare earth elements (e.g., La, Ce, and Sm). The zircon saturation temperatures (T Zr ) of the whole rock are 945℃, 892℃, and 883℃, respectively, showing A-type granite affinity. The trachyte ε Hf ( t ) isotopes reveal that it is formed by the partial melting of the Archean-Paleoproterozoic crust materials. The amphibolite is dated at 297 Ma. The Permian amphibolite and trachyte were formed in the back-arc extensional tectonic environment caused by slab break-off during the PAO slab subduction to the northern North China Block (NCB). The Triassic trachytes were formed in the extensional stage after the collision between the NCB and the Siberian Block. Thus, the main body of East Asian blocks joined Pangea after the PAO closure in the Late Permian.

works.translated_title: 华北地块北缘碱性粗面岩的成因及其对古亚洲洋闭合与盘古大陆聚合的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨华北北缘碱性粗面岩成因及古亚洲洋最终闭合与盘古大陆聚合时限。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩石学、地球化学、锆石U-Pb年代学与Hf同位素分析粗面岩和角闪岩。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 粗面岩形成于274、249、235Ma，源于古老地壳部分熔融，指示古亚洲洋晚二叠世闭合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以跨二叠纪至三叠纪多期粗面岩和角闪岩联合约束区域构造演化与闭合机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为中亚造山带闭合争议、东亚古地理重建及盘古大陆聚合研究提供关键证据。

works.title: Late Devonian Mn mineralization as a result of volcanism- and orbital-forced palaeoceanographic changes
works.abstract: Sedimentary Mn carbonate deposits (SMCDs) constitute the dominant global reservoir of Mn, a critical metal essential for modern technologies, yet their formation timing and links to environmental perturbations remain elusive owing to sparse datable minerals and coarse chronostratigraphic resolution. Here, we report astronomical cycle signals preserved in P (indicative of marine productivity) and (Zr+K)/Al (indicative of detrital flux and relative sea level) from drill core ZK2407 of the Xialei SMCD (∼143 Mt Mn), South China, which is embedded in Late Devonian platform/slope facies strata of the Youjiang Basin. Leveraging the 405 kyr eccentricity cycle and conodont biostratigraphy, the astronomical timescale for the Xialei SMCD was established. The deposition of ore layers I and II+III in the Xialei SMCD took ∼130 and ∼550 kyr, respectively. Ore layer I aligns precisely with the Late Famennian Annulata Event (∼363.4 Ma), while ore layer II+III coincides with the Dasberg Event (∼361.9 Ma). As both mass extinctions were volcanically driven, these temporal couplings suggest large volcanic eruptions as the primary forcing for Mn metallogeny. Massive CO2 emissions from large volcanism induced global warming and sea-level rise, fostering redox-stratified oceanic conditions conducive to SMCD formation. Mn concentrations covary positively in-phase with P and sea-level, indicating transgression-mediated co-transport of anoxic deep-sea hydrothermal Mn(II) and nutrients to the oxic shallow sea, where Mn(III/IV) oxides precipitated. The resulting heightened productivity drove organic matter burial, which subsequently facilitated the reductive transformation of these oxides into Mn carbonates during early diagenesis. Orbital forcing modulated the rhythm of Mn enrichment on astronomical timescales by periodically driving paleoenvironmental variations. This work delineates a temporal framework for the formation of SMCDs and demonstrates that the metallogeny of SMCDs resulted from paleoceanographic changes induced by large volcanism and orbital dynamics.

works.translated_title: 晚泥盆世锰成矿作用：火山活动与轨道驱动的古海洋变化的结果

summary_bullets.research_question: 探明晚泥盆世沉积锰碳酸盐矿的形成时序及环境驱动机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合钻芯地球化学旋回、405千年偏心率定年与牙形石生物地层分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 锰矿层形成与两次火山驱动灭绝事件同步，并受轨道旋回调制富集节律。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次为该锰矿床建立天文时间标尺并链接火山、海洋变化与成矿过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为关键金属锰资源成因、古海洋演化及深时气候事件研究提供新框架。

works.title: Controls on the cadmium isotopic compositions of marine sediments in the oligotrophic Western Pacific
works.abstract: The oceanic biogeochemical cycle of cadmium (Cd) is classically interpreted through its nutrient-like distribution, yet major sinks balancing its isotopic budget remain debated. While Cd sequestration in sub-oxic/anoxic margin sediments has been emphasized, the role of vast expanses of oxic sediments is poorly constrained. This study presents Cd concentrations and stable isotope compositions ( δ 114/110 Cd) of surface sediments from the oligotrophic Western Pacific (CJ09), spanning water depths of 2,100–5,580 m, to identify Cd hosts and assess their significance in the global Cd cycle. Results show significant enrichment of non-detrital Cd, primarily hosted in carbonate minerals, organic matter, and Mn oxides, with their relative proportions shifting systematically with depth. Specifically, near-complete loss of carbonate-derived Cd is observed during carbonate dissolution at depth, with limited re-adsorption by other phases. The bulk sedimentary Cd isotopic composition decreases from +0.14 ± 0.06‰ in shallow sediments (2,100–2,700 m) to +0.05 ±0.04‰ in intermediate sediments (4,700–5,580 m), and further to 0.00 ± 0.06‰ in deep sediments. Although Mn oxides dominate non-detrital Cd at deep sediments, the constrained δ 114/110 Cd of Mn oxides (+0.13 ± 0.05‰) is significantly higher than bulk δ 114/110 Cd values. Mass balance calculations further reveal an exceptionally light Cd isotopic composition ( δ 114/110 Cd δ 114/110 Cd values of deep sediments. This light isotope signature likely originates from the combined effects of rapid export via zooplankton fecal pellets, preferential adsorption of light Cd isotopes onto organic matter, and the delivery of a refractory, isotopically light subsurface particulate Cd pool to the seafloor in the oligotrophic Western Pacific. A first-order flux estimation suggests that Cd burial in these oxic, pelagic clays represents a non-negligible sink (∼2–18% of total input), which is characterized by isotopically lighter Cd compared to deepwater. This finding highlights that oxic sediments in the open ocean constitute a significant light isotopic sink, which must be incorporated into models to fully resolve the marine Cd isotopic mass balance.

works.translated_title: 寡营养西太平洋海洋沉积物镉同位素组成的控制因素

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究寡营养西太平洋氧化沉积物如何控制海洋Cd同位素收支。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定2100—5580米表层沉积物Cd含量与δ114/110Cd并进行质量平衡分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 深海氧化远洋黏土埋藏较轻Cd同位素，约占海洋Cd输入的2%—18%。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统量化开放大洋氧化沉积物作为轻Cd同位素汇的作用与机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为完善海洋Cd生物地球化学与同位素质量平衡模型提供关键约束。

works.title: Rift‐Induced Repositioning of Mantle Plumes Beneath the Indian Lithosphere: Implications for Deccan Volcanism
works.abstract: Abstract The rift system in Indian craton underwent reactivation at the Cretaceous‐Tertiary boundary when the Réunion plume encountered the Indian lithosphere, leading to the 66 Ma massive Deccan volcanism. Although the plume‐driven rift tectonics is a subject of lively research, how a pre‐existing rift system can modulate the plume dynamics, particularly in continental settings has remained inadequately explored. The present study addresses this issue in the framework of the Réunion plume—Indian lithosphere geodynamics. We develop 2D thermomechanical models to simulate plume–rift interactions, systematically investigating the modes of interactions as a function of plate's pull velocity ( V p ) and plume–rift distance ( δ ). Our numerical experiments reveal that small δ ( V p (>1 cm/yr) conditions redirect a large portion of the plume materials toward the pre‐existing rift, resulting in significant melting beneath the rift undergoing rejuvenation. Increasing δ or decreasing V p weakens the plume‐rift interaction, leaving the pre‐existing rift zone almost passive, and stagnation of the plume materials with little melting. The model results suggest that the Narmada rift, which was closer to the Réunion plume, significantly deflected the plume materials, leading to partial melting with Moho upwarping and profuse magmatism. In contrast, the Godavari rift, located at a larger distance from the plume behaved passively, allowing the plume materials to stagnate with little melting at the lithospheric base and facilitate Moho downwarping, as supported by geophysical observations. This article provides a new insight of the differential responses of the Indian rift system to the Réunion event.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth

works.translated_title: 印度岩石圈下方裂谷作用诱发的地幔柱重新定位：对德干火山作用的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究预存裂谷如何调制留尼汪地幔柱并影响德干火山作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 建立二维热—力学数值模型，系统改变板块拉速与柱裂距离。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 近距且高速时地幔柱被裂谷重定向并强熔融，远距或低速则滞留少熔融。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示不同裂谷对同一地幔柱事件的差异响应机制及其控制参数。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释德干火山活动与印度裂谷构造差异提供新的动力学框架。

works.title: Melt re-injection into large magma reservoir after giant caldera eruption at Kikai Caldera Volcano
works.abstract: Abstract Melt re-injection after a giant caldera eruption was quantitatively investigated for the Kikai Caldera Volcano in Japan, which erupted 7300 years ago (Kikai-Akahoya eruption). Our seismic refraction survey revealed a low-velocity anomaly directly beneath the Kikai Caldera Volcano, indicating the existence of a large magma reservoir at a shallow depth of 2.5–6 km. The reservoir can be approximated by a trapezoidal shape in this 2D section, with its width being at least the same as the width of the inner caldera, and its melt fraction was estimated as 3–6%, but could be limited to 10% at most. We propose a melt re-injection model in which new melt is re-injected into this large magma reservoir at the shallow depth just beneath the caldera, which is the same magma reservoir for the Kikai-Akahoya eruption. This model may demonstrate a common feature of volcanoes that have experienced a giant caldera eruption.

works.translated_title: 鬼界破火山口火山巨大破火山口喷发后熔体重新注入大型岩浆储库

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究7300年前鬼界破火山口巨喷发后，浅部大型岩浆库是否发生熔体再注入。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用海上地震折射剖面，反演火山口下方2.5–6公里低速异常与熔体比例。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现浅部大型岩浆库仍存在，熔体占比约3–6%，最高不超过10%，支持喷发后再注入。
summary_bullets.innovation: 定量提出并约束巨型破火山喷发后同一浅部岩浆库的熔体再注入模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解破火山喷发后的岩浆系统恢复、再活化及火山灾害评估提供关键依据。

works.title:
Dynamic disordering in discrete states: Disconnected hopping boosts anharmonicity in CuInP
                    <sub>2</sub>
                    S
                    <sub>6</sub>
works.abstract: Delineation of matter into solid and fluid (liquid and gas) phases is grounded in the contrasting localization and mobility of atomic/molecular aggregates, with the fluid phase distinguished by connected pathways for these entities. Here, we demonstrate that CuInP 2 S 6 , a layered material, manifests as a unique system differing from both solid and fluid: It is solid but contains disconnected pathways of highly mobile Cu species. Each pathway comprises two main docking sites, facilitating rapid intersite hopping of Cu that disrupts lattice waves of the immobilized sulfur sublattice, thereby inducing strong phonon anharmonicity. The Cu + ions, ordered at low temperatures, become highly activated and dynamically disordered even at room temperature. This suppresses the virial contribution, a dominant heat conduction mechanism in conventional solids, while inducing a moderate liquid-like convective mode of heat transfer. Identifying analogous systems featuring disconnected pathways and dynamical disordering states offers a promising route for increased anharmonicity.

works.translated_title: 离散状态中的动态无序：非连通跳跃增强 CuInP2S6 中的非谐性

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究固态CuInP2S6中离散Cu跳跃如何引发强非谐性与异常热输运。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合晶格动力学、热输运分析与温度相关结构表征研究Cu离子动态无序。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Cu离子在两离散位点间快速跳跃，破坏硫子晶格波并显著抑制常规导热。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出固体中“断连迁移路径+动态无序”新机制，连接固态与液态热行为特征。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为设计高非谐、低热导功能材料提供新思路，利于热电与声子工程研究。

works.title: Deciphering Fluid and Uranium Mobilities in Unconformity-Related Uranium Deposits Using Uranium Oxides: The Waterfound Case Study
works.abstract: Abstract The Athabasca basin (Saskatchewan, Canada) hosts high-grade unconformity-related uranium deposits occurring at the interface between Archean-Paleoproterozoic crystalline basement and the Paleozoic to Meso-proterozoic sedimentary basin, rooted above basement-hosted graphite-rich structures. Episodic fluid circulations (1.6–1.0 Ga) are considered to have produced extensive mineralization and hydrothermal haloes in this context. The succession of fluid episodes after the initial uranium deposition nevertheless obscures understanding of the timing and conditions of deposit formation. This study targets the Waterfound U prospect in the northeastern basin, where structural and mineralogical contexts linked to uranium oxides are preserved. A framework is developed and applied to uranium oxides to decipher the structural, physico-chemical, and geochronological evolution of the prospect. The results indicate that uranium oxides at Waterfound formed at 1360 ± 5 Ma in veins and fault cores, in a context of fluid overpressure, associated with clay minerals (first generation of illite and chlorite). These oxides subsequently experienced three main alteration phases: (1) localized brecciation circa 1263 Ma, associated with Ni-Co sulfarsenide precipitation; (2) alteration around 1050 Ma with partial UO2 dissolution, Pb loss, and first chemical trend substitutions, linked to formation of clay minerals (second generation of illite and chlorite); and (3) a near-recent (<100 Ma) alteration causing Pb loss, a second trend of chemical substitutions, and formation of new generation UO2 from oxidized meteoric water. The study highlights the necessity of integrating structural, mineralogical, and geochemical data to accurately reconstruct uranium deposit formation and postcrystallization alteration throughout the geologic history of the Athabasca basin and related Canadian Shield.

works.translated_title: 利用铀氧化物解析不整合面相关铀矿床中流体与铀的迁移性：以 Waterfound 为例

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究Waterfound铀矿床中流体活动与铀迁移的时序、条件及后期改造过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合铀氧化物的构造、矿物学、地球化学与年代学分析，重建矿床演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铀氧化物形成于1360±5 Ma，后经历1263 Ma、约1050 Ma及近现代三期蚀变。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立并应用以铀氧化物为核心的综合解析框架，区分成矿与后期流体事件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于更准确重建Athabasca型铀矿成矿史，并指导矿床解释与找矿。

works.title: Prokaryotic bias in surface ocean particles
works.abstract: While the ocean’s photosynthetic production of organic matter rivals that on land, a combination of heterotrophy and sinking prevents significant accumulation of particulate organic matter (POM) in open ocean surface waters. The origins and fates of POM in ocean surface waters are unclear, in part due to the dominance of nonliving, altered material. From the natural nitrogen isotopic composition of chlorophyll and its degradation products, we estimate the fraction of particles from eukaryotic vs. prokaryotic phytoplankton. In subtropical gyres and along the eastern North Pacific margin, the eukaryotic-to-prokaryotic ratio in particles matches that of living phytoplankton. However, in the North Atlantic outside its subtropical gyre, particles have a lower eukaryotic-to-prokaryotic ratio than do the living phytoplankton. This discrepancy at least partly arises from preferential sinking of eukaryotic biomass, consistent with the canonical but disputed paradigm that cyanobacteria disproportionately fulfill the energetic demands of the upper ocean microbial community while eukaryotes drive export production. The prokaryotic bias in surface ocean particles may also result from slow decomposition of specific components of prokaryotic biomass, a possible bottleneck in the ocean’s microbial loop. The different fates of organic matter produced by eukaryotic and prokaryotic phytoplankton affect the productivity of the surface ocean, carbon export to the interior, and the signals recorded in deep-sea sediments.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences

works.translated_title: 表层海洋颗粒中的原核生物偏倚

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究海洋表层颗粒有机物中真核与原核来源比例及其归宿差异。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用叶绿素及其降解产物的天然氮同位素组成估算颗粒来源并区域比较。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 北大西洋部分海区颗粒更偏原核，部分因真核生物量更易下沉输出。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以天然氮同位素追踪颗粒中真核和原核浮游植物贡献，揭示表层原核偏向。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助理解表层生产力、碳输出、生物泵及深海沉积记录形成机制。

works.title: Sulfur isotope heterogeneity in Martian shergottites reveals early atmosphere - mantle exchange
works.abstract: The study of sulfur isotopes on Mars provides crucial insights into the planet’s formation, differentiation, and volatile evolution. Primordial sulfur isotope compositions help distinguish Martian sulfur sources, including core-mantle interactions, magmatic outgassing, and atmospheric cycling. While bulk analyses have shown limited mass-independent fractionation (MIF-S), the mechanisms introducing MIF-S into Martian magmas remain poorly understood. Using in situ secondary ion mass spectrometry (SIMS), we analysed sulfides in four shergottites: Yamato 980459, Tissint, Gadamis 001, and NWA 11300, and found extreme heterogeneity in Δ³³S (–1.3 ± 0.48‰ to +1.42 ± 0.64‰) and δ³⁴S (–3.5 ± 0.11‰ to +0.73 ± 0.15‰). Large Δ³³S anomalies are observed in both depleted and enriched samples, indicating that MIF-S sulfur was incorporated into Martian magmatic systems through prolonged mantle-atmosphere exchange. This exchange likely began during magma ocean crystallisation and continued into later magmatic stages through ingassing, crustal assimilation, and/or recycling of crustal sulfur. In situ S isotope analyses of Martian shergottites reveal extreme Δ³³S heterogeneity at the mineral scale, indicating that mass-independent S signatures were incorporated into the mantle early via atmosphere–mantle exchange during magma ocean evolution

works.translated_title: 火星辉玻无球粒陨石中的硫同位素非均一性揭示了早期大气—地幔交换

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究火星陨辉橄无球粒陨石中MIF-S来源及大气—地幔交换机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用原位SIMS测量四种陨辉橄无球粒陨石硫化物硫同位素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 样品矿物尺度Δ33S与δ34S极不均一，显示MIF-S早期进入火星地幔。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文以矿物原位高分辨率数据揭示先前整体分析难见的极端硫同位素异质性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于重建火星挥发分演化、地幔形成及大气地球化学循环历史。

works.title: Two‐Stage Garnet Growth and Polyphase Metamorphism in Eclogites From the Serkout Area (Central Hoggar, Algeria): Constraints From Petrology and Thermodynamic Modelling
works.abstract: ABSTRACT Garnet in eclogites is routinely analysed to reconstruct detailed P–T paths, as its chemical zoning records multiple metamorphic stages. In this aim, eclogites from the Serkout area (Aleksod terrane, Central Hoggar, Southern Algeria) have been petrologically investigated and thermodynamically modelled to trace their P–T history. Our study reveals that the samples have preserved the eclogite‐facies paragenesis, characterised by garnet, omphacite, quartz, clinozoisite and amphibole, indicative of prograde to peak metamorphism. However, these minerals have been partially replaced during retrogression by clinopyroxene–plagioclase and amphibole–plagioclase symplectites. Coarse garnet crystals have highly heterogeneous, almandine‐dominated compositions ( X Alm ranging from 0.30 to 0.56), whereas omphacite has a maximum jadeite content ( X Jd ) of 0.31. Coarse amphibole, assumed to be of eclogite facies, is magnesio‐hornblende with Na M4 = 0.31–0.47. Secondary plagioclase shows a wide range of compositions ( X An = 0.20–0.99), from albite‐rich in plagioclase–diopside symplectites after omphacite to anorthite‐rich in plagioclase coronae around clinozoisite. The garnet grains in the Serkout eclogites display clear core–rim zoning, which, together with the evolution of mineral inclusions, allows the garnet growth to be correlated with different metamorphic events. Garnet cores formed under low‐pressure, relatively high‐temperature conditions (first M1 event), whereas garnet inner to outer rims developed during the prograde path from M1 to M2 stages. The late symplectites and coronas are related to retrogression (M3 stage). The combination of detailed mineralogical analysis, Ti‐in‐amphibole thermometry and thermodynamic modelling ( P–T‐M H2O pseudosections), using THERMOCALC‐345, has revealed the existence of two distinct events: (a) an older high‐temperature event (718°C) most likely Paleoproterozoic in age, and (b) a younger eclogitic event characterised by (i) a prograde P–T path starting at 9 ± 1 kbar and 610 ± 50°C under H 2 O‐undersaturated conditions, progressing to peak conditions of 21.5 ± 1 kbar and 720 ± 50°C under H 2 O‐saturated conditions, and (ii) a retrograde path characterised by nearly isothermal decompression towards 5.5 kbar and 685°C.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 阿尔及利亚中部 Hoggar 地区 Serkout 区榴辉岩中的两阶段石榴子石生长与多期变质作用：岩石学与热力学建模约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究塞尔库特榴辉岩石榴子石分带所记录的多阶段变质P-T演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学、矿物化学、角闪石Ti温度计与THERMOCALC伪剖面建模。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出古元古代高温事件及一次榴辉岩相进变质—退变质两阶段演化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将石榴子石核边分带与矿物包裹体、P-T-MH2O建模耦合重建双期历史。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为北非高压变质作用、俯冲演化及榴辉岩P-T路径恢复提供关键约束。

works.title: Nature and genesis of post-collisional potassic volcanic rocks in the western Kunlun, NW Tibetan Plateau: implication for the recycling of carbonate-bearing sediments
works.abstract: Post-collisional potassic volcanic rocks in the western Kunlun possibly signify the youngest volcanism on the Tibetan Plateau, providing a lithoprobe into the crust-mantle interaction and associated geodynamics. However, their source and petrogenesis are still controversial. Here, we have analyzed the elements and Mg-Pb-Sr-Nd isotopes of these rocks in this area. Western Kunlun potassic rocks primarily include trachyandesite, basaltic trachyandesite and trachyte. They exhibit arc-like trace element distributions, accompanied by enrichments in Sr-Nd-Pb isotopes, which imply their derivation from an enriched sub-continental lithospheric mantle (SCLM), like EM2 end-member. Modeling of trace element ratios indicates that they stem from partial melting of phlogopite-bearing garnet lherzolite. Moreover, these rocks exhibit light δ 26 Mg (−0.49‰ to −0.24‰) values, low Ti/Ti* and Hf/Hf*ratios. These features alongside positive correlation of Zr/Hf with Hf/Sm ratios, suggest that their source was involved in recycled sedimentary carbonates. The enriched component (EM2) is most plausibly attributed to ancient carbonate-bearing sediments associated with oceanic subduction, as indicated by Sr-Nd isotopic variation, low Hf/Sm and δ 26 Mg values. Our findings reveal the characteristics and genesis of EM2-type lithospheric mantle beneath the western Kunlun. We hypothesized that the melting of recycled carbonate-bearing sediments trapped by an ancient oceanic slab modified the overlying SCLM. The subsequent lithospheric delamination likely initiated partial melting of this carbonated mantle, producing the potassic volcanism in the western Kunlun. Herein, we emphasize the importance of recycled carbonate-bearing sediments in the formation of post-collisional K-rich magmas.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 青藏高原西北部西昆仑后碰撞钾质火山岩的性质与成因：对含碳酸盐沉积物再循环的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨西昆仑后碰撞钾质火山岩的源区、成因及其地球动力学意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合主微量元素、Mg-Pb-Sr-Nd同位素与源区部分熔融地球化学建模分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆源于受含碳酸盐沉积物改造的富集岩石圈地幔，后期拆沉触发部分熔融。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以Mg同位素等证据明确含碳酸盐沉积物再循环对EM2型地幔改造作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解青藏高原后碰撞钾质岩成因及壳幔相互作用提供关键约束。

works.title: Reworked staurolite-rich metamorphic belts as lithium-fertile terranes
works.abstract: Lithium is a strategically critical yet scarce metal vital for the global energy revolution. Understanding how lithium becomes enriched during orogenesis helps locate lithium-fertile terranes. We investigated seven Barrovian metamorphic sequences and metamorphic country rocks from eleven pegmatite-type lithium deposits/pegmatite fields. Staurolite and biotite are the primary lithium hosts (staurolite > biotite ≥ chlorite > muscovite) in metapelites, with average lithium contents increasing from distal Barrovian metamorphic rocks (426 ppm and 75 ppm) to those 200-500 meters from evolved granites (738 ppm and 149 ppm), and to metamorphic country rocks within 200 meters of lithium-rich intrusions (1395 ppm and 560 ppm). Integrated whole‑rock data and phase equilibrium modelling reveal that staurolite-rich layers with considerable biotite function as natural lithium “sponges”, sequestering lithium during metamorphism and fluid metasomatism to form fertile sources for mineralization. These findings establish staurolite‑rich terranes, reworked by multistage metamorphism and anatexis, as promising areas for lithium exploration. Staurolite-bearing layers can effectively capture lithium from crustal reworking processes, leading to the formation of enriched sources for producing lithium-rich melts during melting, according to geochemical analysis and phase equilibrium modelling of Barrovian metamorphic sequences and metamorphic country rocks.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 经再造的富十字石变质带可作为富锂有利地体

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究造山过程中锂如何富集，并识别具锂成矿潜力的变质地体。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析七套巴罗式变质序列和十一处锂伟晶岩围岩的矿物、全岩地球化学及相平衡模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 十字石和黑云母是主要载锂矿物，近花岗岩与锂侵入体围岩的锂含量显著升高。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出富十字石层可作为锂海绵，在多期变质与深熔改造中富集并释放成矿锂源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为锂资源勘查提供新判据，帮助研究者优先锁定富十字石改造变质带。

works.title: Mantle plume-lithosphere interaction: Evolution and resource environmental effects
works.abstract: Mantle plumes represent crucial carriers for the cross-layer transport of material and energy within Earth’s interior. Originating from the deep interior, they carry deep-seated materials upward to interact with the lithosphere, generating significant volcanic activity. Mantle plumes exhibit a characteristic head-tail morphology, where their thermal anomaly and carried chemical components (e.g., primitive mantle, subducted oceanic crust) significantly influence their morphology and the composition of related surface volcanic rocks. Upon interaction with the lithosphere, the plume head can trigger large-scale flood basalt eruptions and the formation of large igneous provinces (LIPs), while the plume tail gives rise to hotspot tracks, controlling their associated topography and heat flow distribution. These interaction processes are influenced by source composition, lithospheric thickness, mantle rheological structure, etc. The plume-lithosphere interaction has important resource and environmental implications: first, the released volatiles can trigger climate anomalies and even mass extinction events, second, it can form various mineral deposits. Future research should focus on whole-lifecycle modeling of the plume, integrating geochemical and geodynamical models, investigating plume activity within the supercontinent cycle framework, and simulating plume-related mineralization processes to advance our understanding of this key geodynamic process.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地幔柱—岩石圈相互作用：演化及其资源环境效应

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨地幔柱—岩石圈相互作用的演化机制及其资源环境效应。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合地球化学、地球动力学与岩浆作用证据开展综述分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地幔柱头尾分别控制大火成岩省与热点轨迹，并影响气候和成矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 从全生命周期视角整合演化、成矿与环境效应并提出未来方向。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解深部动力学、灾变环境变化及矿产预测提供统一框架。

works.title: A relic slow-spreading ridge preserved beneath the western Makran forearc basin in Iran
works.abstract: Forearc basins develop at convergent plate boundaries through interactions between subducting oceanic slabs and overriding plates. Their basement composition and sedimentary fill vary significantly across different convergent margins, offering critical insights into the evolution of subduction zone. The Jaz Murian basin in Iran, located above the western Makran subduction zone, is critical to unravel the subduction history of the central Tethys. In this study, we investigate the deep structure of the Jaz Murian basin by integrating teleseismic data from a recent broadband deployment with high-resolution aeromagnetic data, employing innovative analytical methods. Our findings reveal a combination of high seismic velocities, elevated Poisson’s ratios, and high magnetization intensity, collectively indicating the presence of ophiolites beneath the sedimentary cover. By correlating basin provenance analysis with geochronological data from the Makran ophiolite, we propose a model of oceanic lithosphere characterized by discontinuous or locally absent crust transitioning into the basement of Jaz Murian basin. This ophiolitic basement reflects highly focused magmatism and a reduced magma budget typical of modern ultraslow-spreading ridges. Our findings suggest that the subduction and subsequent incorporation of (ultra)slow-spreading mid-ocean ridges into the continental margin played a pivotal role in the formation of the ophiolites and the forearc basin basement systems of the central Neo-Tethys along the southern Eurasian margin.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 伊朗马克兰西部前弧盆地下保存的一个残留慢速扩张洋中脊

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究伊朗Jaz Murian前弧盆地下基底性质及其对Makran俯冲演化的指示。
summary_bullets.methodology: 联合远震宽频带地震与高分辨率航磁数据，分析盆地深部结构与磁性特征。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 盆地下覆蛇绿岩质基底，代表岩浆供给不足的慢至超慢扩张洋壳残迹。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次综合地震与航磁证据，提出古慢扩张洋中脊并入前弧盆地基底模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解新特提斯俯冲、蛇绿岩成因及前弧盆地演化提供关键约束。

works.title: SWOT detects dispersive tsunami tied to a near-trench source in the 2025 Kamchatka earthquake
